вҖҰ? Did you get this cake5 from the place in front of the train station?
Yep! I bought it to congratulate you on your hard work on the test. ItвҖҷs aaall yours to eat~вҷӘ
Really?! IвҖҷm so grateful~! вҖҰ But since we're all here anyways, IвҖҷd love it if you two could eat it with me too. вҖҳCuz itвҖҷs thanks to my seniors I was able to get such a good grade!
вҖҰ Is that really okay? Mikejima is the one who bought that for youвҖҰ
I canвҖҷt eat this by myself. Besides, this sorta thing tastes better if you share it with others!
I don't mind. Tetora-sanвҖҷs sooo kind~вҷӘ Well then, I'll go get the plates and forks!
Ah, I'll go with you, Mikejima-senpai!
(I'm glad to see your efforts pay off, Nagumo.)
Hasumi-senpai. Do you know who this belongs to?
Hm? Is that a magazine?
I think so. It was on the kitchen table, so I brought it over just in case...
Someone mustвҖҷve left it behind. Maaaybe theyвҖҷll notice and come and get it.
Yeah, you're right. I'll put it back where it was, then.
вҖҰ Wait a second, a paper slipped out from the magazine.
This looks likeвҖҰ some kind of printout?
Yeah, it does. вҖҰ Uwaa! That scoreвҖҷs as low as mine was. Who in the world does this belong toвҖ”?
вҖ” Shiratori AiraвҖҰ?
вҖҰ H-Hasumi-senpai? Where are you going?
Sorry, Nagumo. The two of you, eat the cake for me. Looks like IвҖҷve found someone new to tutor.
Shiratori-kunвҖҰ
Hahaha! Looks like Keito-san's gonna be busy agaaain...вҳҶ
Translation Notes вҶ‘ Supervillains refers to the blockbuster tokusatsu show that Ryuseitai acted in, where their acting roles were as heroes dyed in evil. You can learn more about it in the event story Supervillain.вҶ‘ Referencing Keito Lecture: Spinoff Edition, where Keito catches Hinata, Aira and Tetora hiding their bad grades.вҶ‘ When faced with uncertainty, гғӨгғһгӮ’ејөгӮӢ (lit. mountain stretching) is essentially relying on your gut instinct to take a chance on something.вҶ‘ Flip cards look like thisвҶ‘ If you're curious about what the dry ice was for, apparently you use it to keep cakes cool

entry.title: The Child God of Machines
entry.content:
Characters
Era
!!, ES 2nd Year of Establishment
Translation
citrinesea
Proofreading
310mc
Season: Spring
Chapter 1
Location: Seisoukan Courtyard
Spring, ESвҖҷs 2nd Year of Establishment. Mid-April.
вҖҰвҖҰ
Hm? Oh? Hasumi-senpai! Good evening~... Er, what are you doing out here in the middle of the night?
That should be my line. DonвҖҷt make that face, IвҖҷm not criticizing you for being up so late. I'm in the same boat as you in that regard.
Hmph. Are you also awake because the fiscal year1 just started, and it leaves you with too much to do and too little time to sleep?
Eh? вҖҰ Ah, yeah, something like that! (I can't say it! I canвҖҷt say IвҖҷve been downloading and playing so many new spring titles, I let the time to sleep slip away!) (IвҖҷve been so wrapped up in gaming, IвҖҷve been neglecting workвҖҰ!)
Ahaha. Err, I just graduated from Yumenosaki too, so it feels like everythingвҖҷs been rushing past me~? So that's why I can't sleep~? Hmph. What, are you as delicate as you look? If you wanted, I could teach you how to navigate the new life.
Eh? Navigate the New Life Fair?2 Yeah, thatвҖҷs right, that was weighing on my mind! ItвҖҷs like one big bargain bin of rare and unusual games thatвҖҷd usually have crazy premium prices!
What are you on about? Hmph, I don't know much about the games you like, butвҖҰ
(D-Did I give myself away? Is he gonna get angry?)
ThatвҖҷs exactly why IвҖҷd like your advice. Here. What do you think this is?
? ThisвҖҰ? Eh, whatвҖҷs this? There's a weird machine nestled in the shade of the trees. I-Is this a UFO that crash-landed?
IвҖҷm not sure. I couldn't sleep, so I ran my supervisory night patrol shift and found this strange object. I couldnвҖҷt just ignore it, so I was trying to figure out what to do. How incorrigible.
What could this beвҖҰ ItвҖҷs making all sorts of beep-boopy sounds, though. ItвҖҷs so futuristic~ ItвҖҷs like something out of sci-fi~
Oi, donвҖҷt touch it so carelessly. It could explode.
I donвҖҷt think itвҖҷll explode, thoughвҖҰ Ah, of course, I thought IвҖҷd seen something like this. IвҖҷm sure thereвҖҷs a control panel hereвҖ“ Mhm. Alright, I can get this moving.
M-Moving? Is this supposed to be some giant robot that combines and transforms or something?
I don't know about combining, but maybe it can transform? Here! Look, Hasumi-senpai, open~ sesame~вҷӘ
Why exactly are you getting excited about this? I see that at the end of the day, youвҖҷre also just вҖңTrickstarвҖқ!
вҖҰвҖҰ
WhвҖ“ the lidвҖҰ? Opened and revealed what's inside! This isвҖҰ?
Good morning to you.
Eh? AвҖ“... Ahh, yeahвҖҰ Good morning.
Wait, this isnвҖҷt the time for casual greetings! Why were you stored inside this strange, mechanical thing, you!? Are you some sort of alien? If Tsukinaga knew about this, heвҖҷd be thrilled!
IвҖҷm not an alien of any sort. IвҖҷm sorry. I seem to have surprised you. IвҖҷm sleepy, so itвҖҷll be a bother to explain, butвҖҰ in this situation, I have no choiceвҖҰ but to do it.
My previous greeting was not accurate. For me itвҖҷs "good morning," butвҖҰ for you, I believe itвҖҷs the time to say "good evening."
Er, what are you on about?
YouвҖҷre the kind of kid who goes at his own pace, huh?
To sum it up, I was turning in for the night here. The bed in the room that was assigned to me wasnвҖҷt very comfortable.
I see. So you were kept up late by something weighing on your mind like us?
I wouldnвҖҷt say I was particularly worried about anything. I couldnвҖҷt sleep, so I brought the bed I use at home.
B-Bed? You call this strange contraption your bed?
Yes. IвҖҷve already checked with the dormitory rules, and I donвҖҷt believe that bringing furniture to Seisoukan is prohibited. However, its size is too big to fit inside the roomвҖҰ so thatвҖҷs why I was sleeping outside instead. As long as itвҖҷs on SeisoukanвҖҷs premises, It shouldnвҖҷt be against the rules to be sleeping in a tent or a sleeping bag in the courtyard.
It isnвҖҷt recommended to do that, though. Also, it may sound convincing with the matter-of-fact way you speak about it, but I think it's a bit of a stretch to call this strange machine a sleeping bag.
Chapter 2
HaaвҖҰ You donвҖҷt know anything, do you, Senpai? This is the latest model of the sleeping device I developedвҖ“ Called "Snooze-Snooze Any-Time-Any-Place-kun."
What's with the name? It sounds like a half-rate comedian.
(Hasumi-senpaiвҖҷs quick and snappy with the straight-man actвҖҰ I should take a lesson or two from him.)
Its name isnвҖҷt worth worrying about. I wasnвҖҷt the one who gave it that name. Based on the latest research in ergonomics, this bed is perfectly constructed to help anyone get an instant good night's sleep. On top of that, its functions enhance the fatigue recovery you get during sleep by several dozen times. If youвҖҷre not sold on it, why not try it out? It seems like you two had trouble falling asleep like I did. But if you use Snooze-kun (abbr.), you'll be asleep in no time.
Ah, I might be a little interested. Ehehe. Even when I know I'll just use it once and let it gather dust in the closet, I still buy the latest gadgets on the market.
As long as there are curious customers like you out there, my job will survive.
Your job? YouвҖҷre here at Seisoukan, so arenвҖҷt you an idol like us?
That's more or less the configuration for now, but my main job lies somewhere else. Calling myself an inventor is a little dubious, but that's the kind of work I do.
Ah, I might have heard of you. I see, as I thought, youвҖҷre definitely that вҖңDeus Ex MachinaвҖқ3 guy, right?
What? That sounds like the alias of someone whoвҖҷs come down with a serious case of Chuunibyou.4
(Wow, He really is incredible! That straight-man actвҖҷs top notch, please teach me your ways, Shishou!)5
Why are you looking at me with those sparkly eyesвҖҰ?
I didn't give myself that pseudonym, either. "Deus Ex MachinaвҖқ isnвҖҷt a very auspicious name, after all.
Mechanical god6, huhвҖҰ You, could you actually be a robot skillfully crafted to look human?
Ahaha, thatвҖҷs kinda the vibe he gives off.
вҖҰ IвҖҷm told that often. LetвҖҷs put all that aside. Why donвҖҷt you two try testing out this bed? As an apology for making you worry, I will give you both the gift of a good night's sleep.
Ah, like I said before, I'm definitely curious~вҷӘ Do I just lie down here? And then sleep soundly until morning?
O-Oi, hold on a second, Yuuki. DonвҖҷt be so carelessвҖ“
Hup. (Shoves)
Uuwhoa!? (Wh-What the? I got pushed right inвҖҰ.!?)
Whoawhoa, please don't flop on me, Hasumi-senpai, IвҖҷm getting squished! I think this bed was made for one person, you know!?
вҖ” Good night, my seniors. Rest in peace. If you do, youвҖҷll completely forget this troublesome reality in its entirety. That I can guarantee.
Location: Makoto, Adonis and Chiaki's Room
вҖҰвҖҰ (H-Huh? I-I was asleep? So it was a dream after allвҖҰ?) (I had the strangest dream... But thatвҖҷs right, it really was just a dream, yeah? It was a little too unrealistic after all.) (I had a strange conversation with a peculiar kid under the moonlight. It was a dream, so no matter who IвҖҷd tell it to, theyвҖҷd just say "so what?", because itвҖҷs that trivial of a story.)
Ahaha. I game so much, IвҖҷm bound to have some wacky dreams. IвҖҷd better stop trying to unravel such wild delusions and get back to realityвҖ”
Yuuki! Are you here!?
Uwaah, you scared me!? H-Hasumi-senpai? WhatвҖҷs the matter?
You, do you remember anything that happened yesterday?
Pardon?
I figured, I thought it was a dreamвҖҰ A dreamвҖҷs a dream, and my recollection of it is gradually fading to where I canвҖҷt remember, butвҖҰ Didn't we see a weird contraption and a strange child last night?
ErвҖҰ No, but it was a dream, wasnвҖҷt it? But, huh, did you have the same one, Hasumi-senpai?
Location: Courtyard
вҖҰвҖҰ
(NnnвҖҰ~ I shouldвҖҷve completely erased their memories by tampering with their cerebral nerves, but it looks like there were some parts I let slip through the cracks.) (It's far from perfect yet.)
(If its results donвҖҷt meet the developerвҖҷs expectationsвҖ“ if it doesnвҖҷt perform like itвҖҷs supposed toвҖ“ then it's nothing but a dud.) (Just like me.)
(I suppose I canвҖҷt get this on the shelves. ThereвҖҷs still plenty of room for improvement.)
hmmnвҖҰ mnnmвҖҰ?
Is something troubling you?
? yes, well, i like to [soak in water], but as expected, this [season] is chilly enough where i would catch a [cold] if i did.
I see. Then, why donвҖҷt you try out the invention I have here? This is called the вҖңPiping Hot Whenever You Want Kettle-kunвҖқ вҖ”
(Humans find things that mimic humanity to be uncanny.) (The uncanny valleyвҖҰ I want to overcome that too.)
(IвҖҰвҖ”) (I am not... a machine.)
? is something the matter~?
вҖҰ No. IвҖҷm sorry, every once in a while, thereвҖҷs a malfunction.
(For now, that is...) (But, someday surely.)
Translation Notes вҶ‘ In Japan, the fiscal year begins in April.вҶ‘ From what I can tell, a New Life Fair seems to be a sale in the spring, where second-hand or discounted goods вҖ” usually furniture or appliances вҖ” are sold for the new (fiscal) year. I'm guessing Makoto's talking about a seasonal Steam Sale-esque sale for video games here.вҶ‘ Deus ex Machina (lit. god from the machine in Latin) is a plot device where an impossible situation suddenly gets solved by an unexpected event or force. The term comes from ancient Greek theater, when actors who played gods were lowered into the scenes with machines (imagine them being hoisted in the air by a crane).вҶ‘ Chuunibyou (дёӯдәҢз—…, lit. middle school disease) is in essence, having a cringey middle school phase. Shinobu has a scout story named Chuunibyou.вҶ‘ Shishou (её«еҢ lit. master) is an honorific for someone who has mastered a craft.вҶ‘ This (ж©ҹжў°д»•жҺӣгҒ‘гҒ®зҘһ) is literally "god of machines".

entry.title: Intelligence | Disclosure Chapter 4 (Partial Translation)
entry.content:
Partial Translation Disclaimer: This is aВ partial translation of theВ Intelligence cross-scout gacha story. If you're looking for a full translation, you can find it here.
Characters
Writer
Happy Elements
Translation
citrinesea
Proofreading
310mc
Season: Spring, ES's second year of Establishment
Up to this point: Yuzuru embarks on a quest for better business management skills, and comes to Kaoru's Live House to learn more. Kaoru mentions Kanata and AOUMI Aquarium as a place Yuzuru could learn from, and Yuzuru reserves tickets for the two of them to see him the next day. When Kaoru and Yuzuru get to AOUMI Aquarium, Jun is there with Kanata to prep for an aquarium photo shoot. Kanata tells them that he's on an investigation regarding Mendako1 aliens that have been appearing in Seisoukan dorms. The Mendako alien costume has been making the rounds around the dorm without Kanata's permission, so he's in the aquarium to check the storage room. Yuzuru cooberates the story: he's experienced a past sighting with Eichi: a Mendako alien dancing around in the courtyard. Kanata returns with his Mendako costume, so it hasn't been stolen. With the matter settled, Yuzuru and Kanata discuss business. Later that night, Kaoru goes into the kitchen for water and sees a group of Mendako aliens in the dorm commons performing a ritual around the table. Intelligence Chapter 4
Location: Seisoukan Dorm Common Room
The next day
You saw the Mendako aliens2 gathered together...?
Yeah. I happened to be looking at the common room from the kitchen when I saw them last night. There were a few Mendako aliens circled around the dining table... It was like they were holding a ritual.
But isnвҖҷt it really weird~? A mysterious group of mascot costumes inside Seisoukan, appearing and disappearing at will... I canвҖҷt understand who on earth it is, and why the hell theyвҖҷre doing it.
Indeed, since itвҖҷs hard to see what they gain by doing this.
Do you have any clue, Kanata-kun?
could it be that youвҖҷre suspicious of me, kaoru...?
youвҖҷre heartless...! i have had [nothing to do with this]...!
No, no, itвҖҷs not thatвҖ“ nothingвҖҷs coming to mind for me, so I just wanted to hear your opinion, Kanata-kun. You have the most enthusiasm for spreading the wonders of mendako out of all of us, so I figured you might have an idea!
вҖҰ really? hm~ well, if thatвҖҷs what you meant it is fine, butвҖҰ i hardly ever [walk around] in a mascot [costume], so i do not know either.
Yeah, I thought so~ So thereвҖҷs nothing we can doвҖҰ I guess the only way to get the truth is to catch the person in question and make them confess, huh~?
That's kinda disturbing~ Well, I get that itвҖҷs creepy if people in mascot suits materialized in someoneвҖҷs living space out of nowhere, though. If we could just understand the goal of the Mendako aliens, we might get a clue on who they truly are.
Well then, how about the four of us investigate the Mendako alien eyewitness accounts together? They seem to have been making appearances here many times recently, so I imagine there must be a number of witnesses around.
[good idea]. if we collect some [eyewitness reports], we might get a better idea of the why they have been on the [move] lately.
when it comes to someone who might know more [about this]вҖҰ
How about someone like Hasumi-kun?
AhвҖҰ~ Oh yeah, вҖҳcause Hasumi-senpaiвҖҷs the dorm supervisor, right? I usually check with him on the dorm rules, so maybe heвҖҷs got reports of sightings too.
Well then, itвҖҷs settled. Let us start by speaking with Keito-sama and seeing what he has to say.
I was wondering what the commotion was hereвҖҰ So youвҖҷre talking about that thing? IвҖҷm certainly aware of the gist of it.. This is about the Mendako aliens that appear night after night, right? They havenвҖҷt been a nuisance for people, so IвҖҷve also been keeping an eye out for them, butвҖҰ Did they cause any trouble?
As we thought, Keito-sama has heard about them as well. Both myself and Kaoru-sama witnessed them, but it was neither a bother nor a danger; the strange sight merely startled us and nothing more. However, we were wondering if Keito-sama might have any idea what on earth theyвҖҷre doing.
We figured if we could get some more eyewitness reports, weвҖҷd be able to understand what those guys are getting out of dressing up like Mendako aliens. Do you know anything about it, Hasumi-kun?
Hm. Since IвҖҷm the dorm supervisor, I've been gathering testimonies, but... To be honest, I feel as if none of them are conclusive. ItвҖҷs just bizarre rumors going around, like that they were having a nighttime takoyaki3 party in the dorm, or that they were chanting mysterious spells, or that they were sprawled out and lying down flat.
ItвҖҷs hard to say whether or not they're nuisances when I canвҖҷt even begin to describe whatвҖҷs going on, so it frustrates me not being able to do my job and lecture them on it....
i feel that at this point, they are already being [nuisances] though. but i am also someone who seems [strange] from [other peopleвҖҷs] perspectives, so~ i donвҖҷt think we should [crack down on it] that much.
It's not up to one single resident to decide whatвҖҷs normal and whatвҖҷs weird, after all. I wouldnвҖҷt be able to get comfortable either if I wasnвҖҷt allowed to do weight training in the room.
However, considering how careful they are in ensuring they are within the line that will not incur a scolding, it seems as if their actions are thoroughly planned. All the more intriguing.
Then should we go and interview the witnesses next? Going around on foot is the classic way to investigate~ Maybe the ringleader of the Mendako aliens himself will be among them.
Let us do so. This is not an operation you can conduct alone, and there may be a likelihood that they are recruiting people who have discovered their true identity. Keito-sama, would you be able to tell us the identity of the witnesses?
Hmm... I guess itвҖҷs fine. I donвҖҷt think thereвҖҷs a need to hide any sources of information in this case. IвҖҷm hoping for a full portrait of the situation too. I'm counting on you.
Translation Notes вҶ‘ Mendako (or flapjack octopus) are a species of umbrella octopus.вҶ‘ As Kanata explains at the beginning of Disclosure Chapter 3, the costume they're talking about was originally used by Chiaki for hero shows, most notably in Supernova Live. Midori and Wataru have also used it.вҶ‘ Takoyaki is a ball-shaped grilled snack that typically consists of tako (octopus).

entry.title: Happy Everyday Life
entry.content:
Characters
Writer
Happy Elements Staff
Translation
citrinesea
Proofreading
310mc
Season: Spring
Chapter 1
Location: Auditorium
Alright, everyone! LetвҖҷs stop right here and take a short break!
EhвҖҰ? Wait a sec, whatвҖҷs that meanвҖҰ? IsnвҖҷt practice already overвҖҰ?
Yep. Indoor practice is over, but next weвҖҷll practice outside!
EhвҖҰ~ I never heard anything about this, though...
ItвҖҷs rare the weatherвҖҷs this great, so itвҖҷd be a waste if we didnвҖҷt practice outside! Besides, look! As you mightвҖҷve noticed, there wasnвҖҷt as much space to move around in the auditorium. WeвҖҷll take a thirty-minute break, and meet outside the auditorium after weвҖҷre done!
ehehe, letвҖҷs go [rehydrate] during break~вҷӘ
Hmm~mm, it doesnвҖҷt feel like enough time for a good break. What about you guys? WhatвҖҷre you gonna do, Midori-kun?
Moving around feels like a pain, so IвҖҷll just hang out here and chillвҖҰ
Ahaha. Midori-kun, youвҖҷre dozing off. YouвҖҷll catch a cold if you fall asleep just like that, yвҖҷknow~? IвҖҷll go fetch some blankets and stuff from the green room!
Ah, Tetora-kun, IвҖҷll come help you!
Ahh, itвҖҷs alright. ItвҖҷs not like theyвҖҷll be heavy, so you should take a break too, Sengoku-kun.
(Mm~mm, he left. Taichou-dono and everyone else is taking a break, so perhaps I should just sit around and relax, as wellвҖҰ?) (But, I donвҖҷt come here often~ so maybe I could explore and look around a bit?)
(... Yeah! There might be unexpected discoveries that lie in wait for me! Time to go on an expedition~вҷӘ) (I don't know anything about sewing. Is there any other way I could cheer her upвҖҰ?)
Location: Auditorium Hallway
(Hmm, IвҖҷm always amazed to see how big that TV screen is. They display live shows on this screen, right?)
(When I first saw it, I was so overwhelmed with excitement that I shouted out loud, and everyone looked at me. I felt so embarrassed.)
вҖҰ Hm? Transfer Student-dono? Ahh, it really is you. What are you doing in a place like this?
HmmвҖҰ So youвҖҷre doing needlework. Speaking of which, I heard from Isara-dono that Transfer Student-dono is the one who makes TrickstarвҖҷs outfits. What are you sewing right now?
Ah, am I disturbing you by any chance?
IвҖҷm not? T-ThatвҖҷs good to know, then~вҷӘ
Um, Transfer Student-dono. This might be too forward of me to say, but you seem down. Are you perhaps worried about something? If youвҖҷre fine speaking with me, I could lend you an ear~?
Hm, hm. ItвҖҷs troubling you that the outfit youвҖҷre working on isnвҖҷt turning out how you wanted it to? вҖҰвҖҰ
(Hmm~ I really am just listening to what she has to sayвҖҰ) (I don't know anything about sewing. Is there any other way I could cheer her upвҖҰ?)
AhвҖ”! Look, look! DonвҖҷt I look like a ninja if I wear it like this~вҷӘ Hm? You look puzzled, Transfer Student-dono. YouвҖҷre not familiar with ninjas? Ninjas run with a scarf wrapped around their necks~вҷӘ 1 Well, itвҖҷs actually a hood they wear, not a scarf, though. Ah, but this oneвҖҷs pretty long, maybe I could use it as a hoodвҖҰ?
Fwah? This isnвҖҷt for playing around, so I should give it back?
T-That was rude of me! Are you angry with me, Transfer Student-dono? IвҖҷm so sorry~! Ohh, youвҖҷre petting my head for some reasonвҖҰ
Eh, youвҖҷre thanking me for giving you encouragement? Ehehe, was I able to be of service a little? Hm? Ahh, I have practice with RYUSEITAI, so thatвҖҷs why IвҖҷm in the schoolвҖҷs idol uniform. Transfer Student-dono, I just got an idea! If itвҖҷs alright, how about you come watch RYUSEITAIвҖҷs practice? Maybe if you take a break from your work, your progress will get betterвҖҰ!
Whoa, youвҖҷre interested~? вҷӘ
Ohh, really, whatвҖҷs making you keep petting meвҖҰ? But, well, if it makes Transfer Student-dono smile, then IвҖҷm also happyвҖҰ?
Mm, so Transfer Student-dono will be here for a while? WeвҖҷll be gathering outside the auditorium in a little bit, so... IвҖҷll call for you when the time comes.
Until then, please keep doing your work. If thereвҖҷs anything you need, IвҖҷll buy it for you! DonвҖҷt hold back, please think of me as your hands and feet and use me as such~вҷӘ
Chapter 2
Location: Outside the Auditorium
We all met up right on time! Now then, letвҖҷs move locations and get practice startedвҖҰ
ThatвҖҷs what IвҖҷd like to say, but before that, why is the Transfer Student here?
Ah, I invited her. Transfer Student-dono was interested in how we do our practice, so sheвҖҷs here to observe us.
I see, I see! Having a spectator would be a big help! Oh, no, you donвҖҷt have to look so nervous. All you have to do is cheer for us, like вҖңDo your best, donвҖҷt give up!вҖқ, Transfer Student. Your cheers will give us strengthвҖҰвҳҶ
chiaki~ since itвҖҷs such a lovely opportunity to have transfer student-san watch us, why donвҖҷt we put on our personal [unit] uniforms?
Ohh, thatвҖҷs nice idea! Everyone, itвҖҷs time to transform!
EhhhвҖҰ~ I just wanna go home at this point, thoughвҖҰ?
ThereвҖҷs no other choice but to give in, Midori-kun. Taichou never listens when it gets to this point.
Ah~ IвҖҷm so depressedвҖҰ I wanna dieвҖҰ
Everyone~? Transfer Student-dono is kindly turning away from us. So letвҖҷs change while her backвҖҷs turned.
Location: Fountain
puka, pukaвҖҰвҷӘ ehehe, the [waterвҖҷs] cold, it feels so niceвҖҰвҷӘ
OhhвҖҰ The first thing Shinkai-dono did was approach the water fountain, huh? Actually, it looks like heвҖҷll jump in any second now, but is it really alright if no one stops himвҖҰ?
Kanata. I know you want to get in the water, but hold it in for now.
itвҖҷs okay~ i [hydrated] myself during our break, so~ i wonвҖҷt [dry] up just yet.
Ehh, what does that mean? I did think it was a little odd how drenched you were just from sweat alone, butвҖҰ Uu, itвҖҷs so incomprehensible that itвҖҷs scary~
Ahaha, as youвҖҷd expect from the вҖңThree EccentricsвҖқ, huh? Anyways, we canвҖҷt keep Transfer Student-san waitinвҖҷ any longer.
ThatвҖҷs true. Alright guys, letвҖҷs start by greeting the Transfer Student enthusiastically! Thank you for coming to spectate our activitiesвҖҰвҳҶ
Ahh, rightвҖҰ The settingвҖҷs a hero show, wasnвҖҷt itвҖҰ Egh, people passing by are looking this wayвҖҰ
Ossu! WeвҖҷre idols, gettinвҖҷ attentionвҖҷs a good thing!
Well, to be fair, thatвҖҷs a much different kind of attentionвҖҰ
Ah, Transfer Student-dono is cheering us on with a вҖңDo your best~!вҖқ.
Heheh, itвҖҷs only embarrassing if you think itвҖҷs embarrassing. IвҖҷll also make an enthusiastic pose. Nin ninвҖҰвҷӘ (Ehehe. With my ninjutsu, I vanquished the villain spectacularly!) (Well, the villains are members of RYUSEITAI too, so even though itвҖҷs a play, I feel a little bad taking them down.) (But then again, yesterday, I played the villain instead, and fell victim to Shinkai-donoвҖҷs offensive.2)
(This feels more like playing hero than actual idol activities, so sometimes I wonder if it really is alright with things like this...) (But itвҖҷs fun! ThatвҖҷs the most important feeling, without a doubt~вҷӘ)
Ohh, I feel myself overflowing with power thanks to the Transfer StudentвҖҷs encouragement! Aaalright! We defeated the final boss! Thank you! WeвҖҷve protected the peace of the Earth! As long as weвҖҷre here, justice will never perishвҖҰвҳҶ
Mhm, with that, practice is over for today. You did a great job, everyone!
Then I can go home now, rightвҖҰ вҖҳKay, byeвҖҰ
Mm. I see youвҖҷre about to hurry home, but weвҖҷre actually going to eat together after this! WeвҖҷll celebrate the fruits of our labor~вҳҶ If itвҖҷs alright, why donвҖҷt you come too, Transfer Student?
Oh? Watching our performance got your creative juices flowing?
No, no, no need to thank me at all! ItвҖҷs a shame that you can't join us, Transfer Student-dono, but if you say you want to go back and start sewing right away, we can't stop you. Hm? Yeah, Kiryu-dono made our RYUSEITAI uniforms for us!
Ohh, from now on, youвҖҷre going to make them too? ThatвҖҷs all we could ever want, Transfer Student-dono~!
Yeah, weвҖҷd be saved plenty! Thank you, Transfer Student!
I hope you'll come and watch us again, Transfer Student-dono~вҷӘ Promise, okay~?
Translation Notes вҶ‘ Ninjas use zukin (hoods) for concealing their faces.вҶ‘ RYUSEITAI plays heroes like this in Hero Game.

entry.title: Hey Guys, Let's Have Some SUSHI!
entry.content:
Characters
Writer
Happy Elements Staff
Translation
citrinesea
Proofreading
mika enstars
Chapter 1
Season: Spring (ES second year of establishment)
Location: Beachside
(WheezeвҖҰ wheezeвҖҰ)
(HahвҖҰ hahвҖҰ) Hahah. Completely out of breath, arentcha~? You good, Taki-kun?
Yeah. IвҖҷm all good~ But who woulda thought this big guyвҖҷd take two people to reel вҖҳem in, huh~?
RunninвҖҷ into you here when I came to fish was one surprise, butвҖҰ Taki-kunвҖҷs fishing rod snagging that ginormous fish вҖ” Now that I didnвҖҷt see coming at all~!
Mm-hmm. I was surprised too~? Genuinely, u~hhhвҖҰ. SaвҖҰ zanami-san? IвҖҷm glad you were there~
вҖҳCuz if it were just me, I definitely woulda been pulled right into the ocean, right~?
Even with two people, we still got our whole bodies drenched in seawater, huh~? Never woulda thought training my body regularly woulda come in handy for wrestling with such a huge ass fish.
We put our whole bodies into bringing it in, and ended up sopping wetвҖҰ I was shocked how much fight these big mainland fish have in вҖҳem too. AnywaysвҖҰ I wanna bring the fish we caught back with us, but how should we do it~? вҖҳCuz somethinвҖҷ this huge canвҖҷt be put on Sazanami-sanвҖҷs motorbike, right?
YouвҖҷre right~ ItвҖҷs what I usually use when I gotta pick Ohii-san up when we gotta go somewhere, so fish are a bit... That guyвҖҷs just awful. I went through all the trouble of gettinвҖҷ my motorcycle license, and he still yammers stuff like, "Riding double on a bike is improper! If IвҖҷm going to ride something, I want it to be a horsie!" And yet, he works me harder than ever now that IвҖҷve got a means of transportinвҖҷ himвҖ” вҖҰ Sorry. Got off track. If IвҖҷd gotten a driverвҖҷs license instead of a motorcycle license, we coulda piled this thing in a car and brought it back, butвҖҰвҖҰ
Hm~mm. ItвҖҷd take two people to carry, but that would be tough too~ But IвҖҷll do anything to get this big guy back home, yвҖҷknow~? If we had a car, itвҖҷd be problem solvedвҖҰ Well, it canвҖҷt be helped. LetвҖҷs just give in and call a car over here. IвҖҷd told someone I was gonna go catch some fish and bring вҖҳem back to eat with him anyways, so IвҖҷll give him a call~ Hello? Tatsumi-senpai? ItвҖҷs SazanamiвҖҰ
Two days later
CвҖҷmon, cвҖҷmon, itвҖҷs time!
IвҖҷve been waiting forever for the day to come eat that big olвҖҷ fish~! It got put off for two days, so I was itchinвҖҷ to know when it was time, yвҖҷknow~?
IвҖҷm completely with ya. HavinвҖҷ to wait two whole days is just too damn cruel, yвҖҷвҖҷknow?
вҖҰ So. WhatвҖҷre you doing here, Amagi-san? It was me and Sazanami-san who caught the fish~?
IвҖҷd heard the entire cafeteria was gettinвҖҷ rented out to eat some tasty food, how could I not join in? вҷӘ вҖҳSides, I helped a bit too, yвҖҷknow! When Niki saw the fish get brought in, he was like, "Let's put it on ice and make it a tasty meal!" And I gave him a lilвҖҷ hand carryinвҖҷ it to the fridge, so I deserve at least a lilвҖҷ bite, donвҖҷt I!
NikiвҖҰ Ahh, Shiina-san. ESвҖҷs got an idol who can master the art of making a tasty fish dish too, huh~?
If weвҖҷre talkinвҖҷ fish, thereвҖҷs people who can handle and cook it well other than me, though~вҷӘ Anyways, IвҖҷm bringing out the food and youвҖҷre in the way, Rinne-kun. Stand back!
Ohh~! The huge fish we caughtвҖҷs been totally remodeledвҖҰ!
Totally remodeled, huh? I think the fish would probably be more pleased if it was made to look so deliciously cooked~?
Indeed. I thought so when I helped with plating the food, but it looks so delicious, even I can't help but get hungry.
It took three people to carry all those plates, huh? A big guy to the very end, it seems like thereвҖҷs not just a lotta him to eat but lots of different ways to prepare him tooвҖҰвҷӘ
Hey, Rinne-san. What are you doing here? If youвҖҷve come all the way out here, go ahead and bring over one of the plates, please.
I already told Bukki the reason earlier, so pass! I can't just leave Bukki alone, you see?
The only reason IвҖҷm waiting is вҖҳcuz I was told to, so I don't mind being alone, though~? Actually, if you need help carrying dishes, IвҖҷll help out~? ItвҖҷd bother me if I didnвҖҷt do anything to help just вҖҳcuz I'm the one who caught it.
Putting Rinne-kun aside, Shirataki-kun1 is wonderful~ I'm seriously impressed that you managed to catch a fish as big as this for us!
Consider this your welcome party and please take it easy until we bring the food out to you.
IвҖҷm just helping Tatsumi-senpai because I wanna. Look, thereвҖҷs still so much more~вҷӘ
It looks like this one here is sauteed, thatвҖҷs carpaccio2. Teriyaki, nimono3вҖҰ fried too? Nyahaha. Everything looks so delicious, IвҖҷm staaarving~вҷӘ I wanna hurry up and eat~вҷӘ вҖҰвҖҰ Fufu. As a matter of fact, Niki-san actually hasnвҖҷt revealed his trump card just yet.
Trump card?
Oh, speak and it shall appear~ Shiina-senpaiвҖҷs piece de resistance~вҷӘ
Fu fu fu. First we haveвҖҰ sashimi! I drained the blood out while it was alive and put it on ice, so the delectable flavor will be enhanced beyond compare~ Oooh, IвҖҷm drooling just thinking about it!
Wah, itвҖҷs glittering! The platingвҖҷs so bright and colorful, itвҖҷs invigorating~вҷӘ
And thenвҖҰвҖҰ ta-daa~aaa! With the utmost respect to all that sushi artisans do, I hold before you my sushi platter!
вҖҰвҖҰ!?
Sushi! Hell yeah, we got some flame-seared ones4, some marinated5вҖҰвҖҰ Bet I could stuff myself silly off this sushi alone вҷӘ
Hold it. Please refrain from snacking prior to when the meal starts. Ibuki-san is the man of the hour after all.
вҖҰ Taki-kun? YouвҖҷve stiffened up since you saw the sushi, whatвҖҷs the matter?
A cut of fish laid on top6вҖҰвҖҰ Th-This is sushiвҖҰ??
What about it?
I know this all looks really delicious, and I know youвҖҷve prepared so many different kinds for me, butвҖҰвҖҰ! This sushiвҖҷs different from the kind I know~!
Chapter 2
A little while later
Spread the rice along the seaweed and turn it over so the rice is on the matвҖҰ place the ingredients on top and then roll it all up... I'll place the grilled steak on the rice like this, and then on top of that, putвҖ”
(Whispering) I can't wait any longer! CanвҖҷt we just eat first?!
(Whispering) No can do. IвҖҷve been made to hold back from snatching up the food too, yвҖҷknow.
(Whispering) Would you two hush down, please. We all decided to observe how Ibuki-san prepares sushi, didnвҖҷt we?
(Whispering) I mean, meatвҖҷs getting steamed in the tin7, but is this really how sushi gets made~? WouldnвҖҷt it make the meat a little too overpowerinвҖҷ?
(Whispering) ItвҖҷs got a real colorful look overall too. The sushi Bukki knows seems real different from the sushi we know...
WhatвҖҷre you guys whispering about? Are you that interested in the sushi I made?
For sure! вҖҳCuz that right thereвҖҷs American sushi, right?
Huhh~, so itвҖҷs American. When I went to America for Absolute8, I didn't have any of the local sushi, so I'm kinda curious too~вҷӘ
Oh. Everyone was keeping their distance and watching from afar, so I thought you were all freaked out~? If you think it looks tasty, eat up right away! Look, I've arranged it all nice and pretty too! IвҖҷd like everyone to try the sushi thatвҖҷs from the land I grew up~
Ahh, come to think of it... I heard that Ibuki-san was brought up in America. So you mean to sayвҖҰ this sushi originates from American cuisine?
Some of these feel less like sushi and more like steak, though. Welp, only way to tell whether itвҖҷs sushi or meat is to try it~вҷӘ вҖ” On that note, thanks for the meal! (Chomp, chomp, chew, chew)...
Thanks for the meal. (Munch, munch)...
Oh...? When ya look at it, the meatвҖҷs whatвҖҷs most prominent, but the juices and sauces cominвҖҷ together with the rice is makinвҖҷ it real scrumptious.
And the way the texture and richness of the avocado brings out the entire dish like this makes it immensely delicious as well.
Right~? I'm happy youвҖҷre happy~вҷӘ
Even though all I did was catch a fish, you all rented out the place and made tons of food for meвҖҰ Obviously I couldn't just sit back and watch, yeah~?
And I wanted everyone to get to know the cuisine of the country I was from, so I'm glad I could treat you all to it~вҷӘ
(Munch, munch).... I just enjoy beinвҖҷ able to cook for others, thatвҖҷs all.. (Chomp, chomp) I don't feel like I did anything for you in the slightest, butвҖҰ If you say so, I'm glad you made sushi for me, Shirataki-kun! (Munch munch)
Niki-san. I think you should choose between talking or eating.
I mean, aren't ya eatinвҖҷ too fast? Taki-kunвҖҷs gonna eat soon too, so please make sure to leave some for him~? Here, Taki-kun. WeвҖҷve done enough cooking already, so let's just eat together from here.
Your seatвҖҷs over here, Bukki! Now, for an especially special offer! Rinne-kunвҖҷs gonna fill up your plate, just for you вҳҶ
Nyahaha. IвҖҷm the one who made the sushi though, what are you talking about~? But thankies! 9 I'll scarf it up with the food Shiina-san made~вҷӘ
Fade to black.
... WeвҖҷre already runninвҖҷ outta the sushi Bukki made for us, huh~? The food that Shiina-senpai made us got whittled down too. If it's tasty, itвҖҷll be gone in a blink of an eye, huh~?
SeriouslyвҖҰ Even though there was just so much, where did all the food go off to? Kiii~dding... It all went in our tummies...вҷӘ If thatвҖҷs the case, should I make something next? I'll be doinвҖҷ somethinвҖҷ simple though, if that's cool.
ErвҖҰ Everyone, arenвҖҷt you forgetting something?
Forgetting somethingвҖҰ? Like what?
I figured itвҖҷd be bad to leave it out at room temperature when Ibuki-san started making his sushi... so I moved it into the refrigerator.
Ah. Then could it be thatвҖҰ!
Yes, thatвҖҷs right. We still have some of the sushi and sashimi that Niki-san prepared for us left вҷӘ
WasnвҖҷt that supposed to be the main dish?! HowвҖҷd we forget that вҖҳtil just now?
Gh, what have I done...! I was so invested in Shirataki's sushi I forgot about my own cooking! Wait, if there's sashimi and sushi, that means... there's still much more left to eat, doesnвҖҷt it?! Nice, Kazehaya-kun!
So youвҖҷre sayinвҖҷ ya did somethinвҖҷ like sending Shiina-sanвҖҷs sashimi and sushi back to the fridge because of me~? But that just means that I wanna make it up to you with tasty food~! Yes, IвҖҷve brought it over. Taking another look at it, the flesh sure is glossy and beautiful, isnвҖҷt it.
It really is! It totally surprised me earlier, but itвҖҷs beautiful when you take a closer look at it, huh~вҷӘ
вҖҰ Yeah. It looks really, really delicious~вҷӘ I wanna hurry up and eat it! GyahahaвҳҶ ThatвҖҷs a lilвҖҷ brat for ya, look at that hearty appetite вҷӘ
Well, hereвҖҷs a small dish, some soy sauce, andвҖҰ Taki-kun, would you like wasabi?
WasabiвҖҷsвҖҰ waa~ay too pungent, no thanks! IвҖҷll just enjoy the flavors of the ingredients~ LetвҖҷs seeвҖҰ The meat of this one looks particularly tastyвҖҰ This, this one hereвҖҰ And a little bit of this~ IвҖҷll give some to Shirataki-kun and Jun-kun!
Haha, a big thanks from me вҷӘ
Has everyone picked out what they like? Place your hands together and give thanksвҖҰ Now then, let us say grace.
Thank you for the foo~ood!
Thank you for the foo~ood! (Munch munch)....вҷӘ (We caught a ginormous fish together, and when I said I wanted to bring it back, they helped me out...) (They even went so far as to cook for me like this and ate what I made too. Everyone at ES seems like a really nice bunch of people, huh?) (There's still so much I don't understand, but if IвҖҷm able to have fun times like this, the windвҖҷs in my sails~вҷӘ)
Translation Notes вҶ‘ A nickname based on shirataki noodles and Ibuki's last name, Taki.вҶ‘ Carpaccio is meat or fish thinly sliced or pounded thin, and served raw.вҶ‘ A nimono consists of a base ingredient simmered in shiru stock and seasoned with sake, soy sauce, and a small amount of sweetening. Nikujaga is a type of nimono.вҶ‘ Aburi sushi, or roasted sushi. You use a blow torch to sear it.вҶ‘ Zuke sushi, usually marinated in shoyu (soy sauce)вҶ‘ It looks like thisвҶ‘ Ganganyaki (гӮ¬гғігӮ¬гғіз„јгҒӢ) is usually for shellfish: you steam or grill them inside a tin.вҶ‘ Referencing the Eden climax story Absolute.вҶ‘ He says гӮөгғігӮӯгғҘгғј (sankyuu) here.

entry.title: Keito Lecture, Spinoff Edition
entry.content:
Characters
Writer
Yuumasu
Translation
citrinesea
Proofreading
310mc
Season: Autumn
Location: Seisoukan Apartment Library
(вҖҰ All done.) (ItвҖҷs been a long time since I set aside the time to read like this. These days, IвҖҷve been working nonstop.) (... ItвҖҷs five in the afternoon already? Usually, around this timeвҖ”)
(Urgh, I almost checked Hold-Hands again without even thinking about it. As soon as my mind wanders, it goes right back to thinking about work.) (I decided to set aside the whole day for a break. For the sake of the future, I have to look after my mind and body right now.)
(Now then, which should I go with next? IвҖҷm getting a little tired of going through some of my backlog.) (Reading something I wouldnвҖҷt usually pick up might be a good palette cleanser. It wouldnвҖҷt hurt to peek at BIBLIONвҖҷS recommendations section.)
(... Hm? Seems like someoneвҖҷs coming.)
Alri~ght, weвҖҷre here~вҷӘ We should be safe here. Are you sure~?
(Those voicesвҖҰ is that Aoi and Shiratori?)
This place always seems to have a lot of people going in and out of it. I think Tattsun-senpai comes here a lot. I feel like IвҖҷve even heard Mayo-san say something like, "It's soothing and quiet,вҖқ too.
Heh-heh-heh. ItвҖҷs true that there are a lotta people who use this place. And thatвҖҷs exactly why IвҖҷve taken advantage of it as a good hiding spot~вҳҶ
I sure hope so. (Sighs)... Why do I get these grades all the time? IвҖҷm sick of it! It was last second, but I still basically studied for the test overnight. Am I just bad at this kinda thing?
Speaking of grades, our Hiro-kunвҖҷs an idiot and yet heвҖҷs the top of his class вҖҷcause of his grades. So when I asked him for tips about studying, he was just like, "How do you manage to get those kinds of grades? I'm curious!"
ThatвҖҷs what IвҖҷd like to know. It pisses me off~!
Ahaha. Being close to a genius is tough, right?
YeahвҖҰ So thatвҖҷs why I was happy that you heard me out and gave me advice~вҷӘ IвҖҷm hesitant to just throw it away as kindling, but I don't wanna put it somewhere people can see either.
Mhmhm, I know how you feel. When I got a bad grade, I also looked around everywhere for a place to hide the answer sheetвҖ” ThatвҖҷs when I realized this book room feels like a вҖңFlunk-outвҖҷs ParadiseвҖқвҖҰвҷӘ
(HmвҖҰ I donвҖҷt have a single clue what theyвҖҷre on about. All I can glean from them is that this is a dumb conversation.) (But, thereвҖҷs no doubt in my mind theyвҖҷre scheming something. As dorm supervisor, itвҖҷs my obligation to know what it is.)
вҖңFlunk-OutвҖҷs ParadiseвҖқ..? That seems like a good title for an idol song~ вҷӘ Where should I hide it? In a book maybe?
Nope. The exact location of the hiding spot iiiiiisвҖҰвҖ” between the sofa cushions~вҷӘ ItвҖҷs surprisingly deep, so you can shove it all the way in. You wouldnвҖҷt think to look in a place like this, right?
I get it! No one would notice the gaps of the sofa cushions. You're a genius, Hinata-senpai~вҷӘ
(What вҖңgeniusвҖқ are we talking about here? IncorrigibleвҖҰ)
Time to take those answer sheets and... Wait, what? It looks like there's even more paper here than there was before...
вҖңNagumo TetoraвҖқвҖҷs written here. Ooh, Tetsu-kun stashes his away here too, huh? I had no clue other people used this as storage too. Guess everyone thinks the same way, ahaha.
I bet~ ufufu~вҷӘ
вҖ” You two, is this really the time to be laughingвҖҰ!
Uwaa, Hasumi-senpai!?
A short moment later
U~myu, I didn't think IвҖҷd get found out.
We didnвҖҷt notice Hasumi-senpai was there, so it was our fault. Sorry.
YouвҖҷre beyond help. To think, a cover-up orchestrated not just by Aoi and Shiratori, but Nagumo too.
ItвҖҷs вҖҳcuz these kinds of grades arenвҖҷt manly, so I canвҖҷt let Taishou find out about вҖҳem. UuuвҖҰ
(Kiryu would get these kinds of grades tooвҖҰ But for the sake of his honor, I wonвҖҷt bring it up.)
ThereвҖҷs only so much space between the sofa cushions. You wouldnвҖҷt have been able to stash as many as you wanted in there. Besides, this conduct wouldвҖҷve been sniffed out sooner or later. What exactly did you plan on doing when that time came?
We didnвҖҷt think about it at allвҖҰ If we could think that far ahead, we wouldnвҖҷt be getting grades as bad as these~
HmвҖҰ If thatвҖҷs how it is, then you just need to not get any bad grades. TodayвҖҷs my day off. IвҖҷll stay and help you all study.
Eh? YouвҖҷd do that, Hasumi-senpai?
I kinda wanna refuse or somethingвҖҰ
вҖҳCuz senpai seems like the type to be real intense with his lectures, soвҖҰ?
Hmph, so you are aware. IвҖҷll open up the вҖңKeito Lecture: Spinoff EditionвҖқ as a special occasion for you all. Each of you, go grab some stationary. WeвҖҷll meet up in five minutes. вҖ” Well then, go on!
O-Ossu!
Please be gen~tle...
Uu~ HowвҖҷd things end up like thisвҖҰ
(... I might be straying from the goal of unwinding mind and body, but cultivating the juniors is always important.) (I won't hold back. If I'm going to do it, I'm doing it thoroughly...вҷӘ)

entry.title: Ibuki Appeal Talks
entry.content:
NOTE: From Basic's Appeal Talks, which occur at random points during D.L.F.S. courses.
Characters
Writer
Happy Elements
Translation
citrinesea
Proofreading
Oh~? I canвҖҷt believe you came here, Anzu nee-nee. Didja come to take me on in a match, maybe~?
Could I have a handicapвҖҰ
Nono, I'm just kidding~? ItвҖҷd be trouble if I got someone hurt and got sued, yвҖҷknow~?
If I have toвҖҰ!
Nyahaha, Anzu nee-neeвҖҷs fearless, huh~? Still, thereвҖҷs definitely too big a difference in strength, yвҖҷknow~?
I just wanted to come by and see how things were.
Could it be that you were worried about me~? If so, IвҖҷm happy~вҷӘ
So-rry~ I ended up beinвҖҷ a lilвҖҷ late~?
No worries at all.
Oh? Looks like my body-clock was a lilвҖҷ early~? Heheh, thatвҖҷs good if thatвҖҷs the case~!
Be more mindful next time.
Got it, IвҖҷll try and come a little earlier next time~?
You still had a little time, soвҖҰ
I just barely made it? Nyahaha, if so, itвҖҷs the same as being here right on the dot~вҷӘ

entry.title: Shinobu Management Stories
entry.content:
NOTE: Management stories take place in early !-era spring, so they're a good gauge for relationships pre-development.
Characters
Writer
Happy Elements
Translation
citrinesea
Proofreading
310mc
Season: Early Spring [!]
with Makoto
Location: Hallway
(Nnh. It feels like the second year's floor has such a dignified atmosphere. IвҖҷve only just changed one floor, how is it so different?) (I can only hope I manage to conceal my presence until I reach Isara-dono's classroomвҖҰ)
Huh? Shinobu-kun! What's the matter? Did you have business in the second-year classroom?
Y-Yuuki-dono!? Hold on, I was spotted almost immediatelyвҖҰ!?
Ah, could it be that? You were training to walk without detection? Well, thereвҖҷs no wonder youвҖҷve become a bit of a celebrity around here. I heard people say thereвҖҷs a kid training as a ninja in our school, yвҖҷsee~вҷӘ
Huh!? D-Do I really stand out that much?
Mhm, mhm. There aren't many kids who aspire to be ninjas, much less train like one.
Eeep, spare me~! I'm not doing this to stand out at allвҖҰ Or rather, I don't want to stand out!
Is that so? See, I was thinking of proposing a segment like вҖңBlitzвҳҶYumenosaki Academy's CelebritiesвҖқ for the next noon broadcast. So I was hoping to ask you if you wanted to do an interview as well, yвҖҷknow?
I-If that happens, I'll definitely disappear off the face of the earth for a while?
with Mao
Location: Hallway
Isara-dono~вҳҶ Look, look, the shuriken I ordered online came in! When I saw they ran out, I came to terms with it and abandoned all hope вҖ” But when I checked the site just the other day, it was back in stock! I used up my allowance on it because I had to get it right away. Thanks to that, IвҖҷll have to rely on hyorogan to make it through the month, butвҖҰ I have no regrets! If anything, getting to see the real thing puts my excitement through the roof~вҷӘ
Ah, yeah, I get that youвҖҷre thrilled, but could I ask you to get off my stomach? The pressureвҖҷs been hurting for a while. You jumped on me so suddenly, so I wasnвҖҷt able to brace myself.
Uwaa, are you hurt? I was so happy to get my shuriken and see Isara-dono, I lost my composure.
That sort of trait isnвҖҷt very ninja-like, is it? Anyway, donвҖҷt you always have a shuriken on you?
My rubber shuriken? Of course, I have tons of them~ This time, I ordered a replica of a shuriken said to have been used by Hattori Hanzo.
What? That sounds a little shadyвҖҰ Are you okay, Sengoku? YouвҖҷre not being swindled, are you?
Ahaha, IвҖҷm alright. If it said it were real, even IвҖҷd know it was a scam. IвҖҷll love anything that has to do with ninjas, replica or not~вҷӘ
with Midori
Location: In Front of the Lecture Hall
Midori-kuu~n! I found what you were looking for! Just to be sure, could you check that itвҖҷs the right one?
YeahвҖҰ IвҖҷm sure this is the oneвҖҰ Thanks for helping me out, Sengoku-kunвҖҰ
No need to thank me, it was a help to me that you gave me this mission. There was nothing to do for RYUSEITAI today, so frankly my schedule was pretty openвҖҰ Finding things is my specialty. If you ever need my help again, call out for me without hesitation~вҷӘ But, what kind of basketball practice were you having that sent the basketball flying all the way to a place like this?
ThatвҖҷs what IвҖҷd like to know... I was told that weвҖҷd have practice at the basketball court today, so I came over knowing it was gonna be a painвҖҰ Then Morisawa-senpai said that he launched the basketball or somethingвҖҰ? This isnвҖҷt soccer, for crying out loudвҖҰ
AhahaвҖҰ At any rate, IвҖҷm glad we found it. вҖҰ Hm? Isara-donoвҖҷs messaging me? Heheh, it seems IвҖҷve been given another mission to carry out! Excuse me, but I have to take my leave now! See you tomorrow, Midori-kun!
with Nazuna
Location: Tennis Courts
There~...вҷӘ Like~ that...вҷӘ Oh, Nito-dono? By any chance, is the tennis club in the middle of practice?
Ghh?! Shinobun, donвҖҷt come into the tennis court outta nowhere. I almost hit you with the ball by mistake.
M-My apologies! When I saw Nito-dono, I just couldnвҖҷt help but barge in! I seem to be in your way, so IвҖҷll make my exit.
Nah, IвҖҷm just practicing on my own, so youвҖҷre not bothering me. Anyway, what were you up to, Shinobun?
I was looking around for a good ninja spot. If you find a place like that, please let me know~вҷӘ
Ahaha, a вҖңninja spotвҖқ? Mm, got it. IвҖҷll contact you when I do, Shinobun.
Thank you~! I donвҖҷt know if you would consider this repayment, butвҖҰ If you ever need a ninja, please seek me out~вҷӘ MnnвҖҰ~ Is it fine if I donвҖҷt need a ninja? I feel lonely practicing alone, so if itвҖҷs okay, I'd like you to keep me company.
Of course, as long as it's okay that itвҖҷs me! The Ninja Association conducts solitary activities too, so I donвҖҷt have much to do at the moment. Ehehe, it looks like we'll have fun doing club activities today~вҷӘ
with Yuuta
Location: 1-B Classroom
LetвҖҷs see, weвҖҷve got class duty together today, right? Thanks for having me, Sengoku-kun~вҷӘ
A-And to you as well
Ahaha, weвҖҷre classmates, so you donвҖҷt have to be so nervous~
Fweh? Err, ummвҖҰ~?
Well, IвҖҷm gonna write in the daily log, so could you erase the blackboard?
Y-Yessir! I'll make it quick~! (Uuu~вҖҰ IвҖҷm making Aoi-kun worry about me. IвҖҷm sorry for being so shy.) (At any rate, I must get the job done properly! I'll clean the blackboard and make it as good as new!) Take that! And thaaaaaatвҖҰ ouch?!
A-Are you okay? YouвҖҷre not hurt, are you?
DonвҖҷt worry! I just slipped and fell! IвҖҷd rather you focus on the daily log, Aoi-kun!
You say that, but hearing someone go вҖңTake that!вҖқ is gonna concern me whether you mean to or not. Mm, I know a way to erase the board without having to jump around. If youвҖҷd like, I can show you how?
Eh? But wouldnвҖҷt it be a botherвҖҰ?
We're on the same class duty shift, so weвҖҷll finish up faster if we help each other out. YouвҖҷre not gonna be a bother at all
Aoi-kunвҖҰ W-Well then, please do. Ehehe, I'm glad that Aoi-kunвҖҷs on duty with me today~вҷӘ
with Souma
Location: Garden Space
Take thatвҖҰвҳҶ
HmвҖҰ? Is that you there, Sengoku? Are you playing around with a bug net?
Oh, Kanzaki-dono! I wouldnвҖҷt call it playing around! IвҖҷm in the midst of catching frog food!
I see, come to think of it, you look after frogs, donвҖҷt you?
Indeed I do! I'm glad that you remember what I said before~вҷӘ1 Momocchi and Thunder require lots of food every day, so todayвҖҷs yet another day I'm busy catching insects.
Is that so? If thatвҖҷs the case, IвҖҷll help you.
Eh, are you sure? YouвҖҷd be seriously saving me~! After all, you can hone in on moving objects so well that you can even catch flies with chopsticks! I bet you can catch tons of insects, even with the butterfly net, Kanzaki-dono~!
Heheh, you have such sparkling eyes. That expectation for me makes me happy, and it urges me to respond in full. MmвҖҰ Sengoku, stay stillвҖҰ Take that!
Oh! There are bugs in the net! No way, thatвҖҷs amazing! I didn't even realize there was a bug on my head! As expected of Kanzaki-dono, youвҖҷre seriously the coolest everвҖҰвҳҶ
I feel quite bashful being praised so earnestly like that. Sengoku, do you still need more insects?
Yes, I want to catch lots and lots! If you have the time, IвҖҷd like your assistance just a little longer, Kanzaki-dono~!
I donвҖҷt have any particular matter to attend to after this, so IвҖҷll keep you company until youвҖҷre satisfied.
Wow, I'm so grateful~! Momocchi and Thunder will get to eat to their heartвҖҷs content, kyahoo~вҳҶ
Translation Notes вҶ‘ From Samurais and Ninjas.

entry.title: Ninja Training
entry.content:
Characters
Writer
Happy Elements Staff
Translation
citrinesea
Proofreading
310mc
Season: Spring
Location: Rooftop
Chapter 1
YaaвҖҰ! HaвҖҰ! Whoosh... Nin!
Heh, I perfected the jumping shuriken move too!
If I demonstrate this technique, people flooding into Ninja Association wonвҖҷt be just a dream anymore~вҷӘ In order to get it promoted from an association to a club, I'll show off some splendid ninjutsu and blow the audience away!
YaaвҖҰ! HaвҖҰ! Whoosh...! ShutatatataвҖҰ breezing across the rooftop, then diving into the skyвҖҰ! Nin~! Whoooosh...!!
вҖҰ?! O-Oh nooвҖҰ!! I got caught up in the moment and jumped off the roof~!! This is bad, IвҖҷll slam into the ground~! H-Help! Help mee~!!1
Location: Fountain
HahвҖҰ hahвҖҰ hahвҖҰ I seriously thought IвҖҷd dieвҖҰ I managed to land in a tree, but thereвҖҷs no shot I could perform such a miracle again...
вҖҰ!? It felt like someone just passed behind me just nowвҖҰ?
If rumors spread that I jumped off a roof and made a bad landing like this, then no one will ever regard me as a ninja! UuuвҖҰ I donвҖҷt want to look behind me. But if I donвҖҷt, my life as a ninja will come to an end!
Sengoku Shinobu, summon the courage and look over your shoulder~! вҖҰ! Y-YouвҖҷreвҖҰ!
Is that you, Transfer Student-dono?!
UmmвҖҰ Tr-Transfer Student-dono, how sneaky of you to take a peek at my majestic figure~ Eh? You were here by chance?
So you didnвҖҷt see me jump off the roofвҖҰ No, I mean, you didnвҖҷt see how I majestically lept from it? I-If thatвҖҷs the case, thatвҖҷs goвҖ”вҖҰ (ahem) I mean, how disappointing~
Had you seen it, you wouldвҖҷve been touched to tears by now, Transfer Student-dono. It was quite impressive, if I do say so myselfвҖҰ YouвҖҷre lying? You saw it from the start?
~~~!
Tr-Tr-Transfer Student-dono!! YouвҖҷre playing with my heart with that kind of lie, youвҖҷre heartlessвҖ“!! I was so relieved thinking you hadn't been watching me, you know!?
My joy was short-lived. YouвҖҷre a demon, Transfer Student-dono~ ItвҖҷs too late to say, вҖңOh, I didnвҖҷt actually see itвҖқ now! I wish youвҖҷd have stuck to the lie from the start at that pointвҖҰ
вҖҰ!? Do you really mean what you just said, Transfer Student-dono? That what you saw вҖңwill stay concealed in your heart"?
Ohh, youвҖҷre an angel, Transfer Student-dono! IвҖҷm so sorry that I called you a demon a second ago!!
I'm so happy that it urges me to do some sort of jutsu demonstration for you~!
Ah, don't turn your face away as if youвҖҷre saying that "this kid is cringy"! I'm being really sincere, and it makes me sad that youвҖҷre giving me that kind of attitudeвҖ“!
Transfer Student-dono. ItвҖҷs likely that the jutsu I'm about to show you wonвҖҷt reach your heart if I explain it to you verbally, soвҖҰ Since they say that вҖңseeing is believing", I'll show you right away~ There's no need to make that face, it'll be fine.
Ninjas don't make the same mistake twice! And now, in this instant! I'll prove that to be true~вҷӘ
With a shutatatata, I speed upвҖҰ Imagine youвҖҷre spreading your wings and jumpвҖҰ!! Nin! And then one spin mid-airвҖ”вҖҰ!?
(M-My right foot cramped up this timeвҖҰ!) (I wonвҖҷt be able to stick the landing, at this rate, IвҖҷll fall~!!) W-W-W-WAAAAaaaaaвҖҰ!!
вҖҰ G-Gh. I-IвҖҷmвҖҰ IвҖҷm okay.
B-ButвҖҰ I didnвҖҷt landвҖҰ (Hiccup)вҖҰ I fell right into a puddleвҖҰ UuuвҖҰ IвҖҷm all covered in mud and filthвҖҰ (Hiccup)... IвҖҰ UuuвҖҰ IвҖҷm a failure, (hiccup), as a ninjaвҖҰ UuuвҖҰ
UwaaAAAAAAAAвҖҰ!!
(Hiccup)... I just w-wanted to impress you... But I jumped off the roofвҖҰ UuuвҖҰ and m-messed up the landing, then slipped into a puddleвҖҰ UuuвҖҰ and even fell overвҖҰ And Transfer Student-dono saw the whole thingвҖҰ ItвҖҷs so embarrassing, I want to dieвҖҰ
Becoming a ninja was impossible from the start... (Hiccup)... and yet I'm still giving it my all to become one... I always fail, and I never learn, so I got what was coming to me... (Hiccup)... I'm not going to be a ninja anymore.... Ninjas... N-... Ninjas... I hate them... вҖҰвҖҰвҖҰ
No, I could never do thatвҖ“!! ThereвҖҷs no way I could ever hate ninjas!! No matter how many times I fail, IвҖҷve always wanted to become a ninja since I was a child! Even if Transfer Student-dono looks at me coldly, I canвҖҷt just completely give up~
вҖҰ! Transfer Student-dono, youвҖҷll recognize me as a ninja!?
Just hearing that has revived my spirit! IвҖҷm indebted to you, Transfer Student-dono~!
Chapter 2
Location: Classroom 2A
Transfer Student-dono, are you here~? Ohh, Transfer Student-dono. ItвҖҷs good that I found you before you left the classroom~ To tell you the truth, I wanted you to accompany me for ninja training, so I came to ask you if that was alright. As expected of Transfer Student-dono! I just knew you would accompany my pursuit of knowledgeвҖҰ!! Well then, please follow after me~вҷӘ
Location: Rooftop
вҖҰ! Transfer Student-dono, weвҖҷre so lucky~вҷӘ No oneвҖҷs here~
This time of day, a lot of units practice on the roof, and itвҖҷs difficult to ask people to hand over their spot for the purposes of вҖңninja-trainingвҖқ.
So I always train hard on the edge of the sports grounds instead.
But because the Archangel known as Transfer Student-dono is here with me today, fortune has come my way, too~
Ah, donвҖҷt retreat as if youвҖҷre saying, вҖңDonвҖҷt call me ArchangelвҖқ! Come baaack~!
A-Anyway, what I mean to say is, with a powerful ally such as you, Transfer Student-dono, I wonвҖҷt face defeat!
IвҖҷll become a splendid ninja and make sure the association gets more members~!! Hm? Transfer Student-dono. You seem to have a curious look on your face, did you want to ask me something?
Ah, you want to know the reason why I donвҖҷt practice in a classroom, but outdoors insteadвҖҰ Erm, that would be because there arenвҖҷt enough club members, so IвҖҷm not able to reserve a room. If I could get the Association promoted to club-status, then I could use a clubroom to my heartвҖҷs content for ninja training, butвҖҰ First off, IвҖҷd have to gather enough members, but even if I were to manage that, I was told by the teachers that I need at least a year of club activities2 before IвҖҷm able to get it promotedвҖҰ
The Ninja Association that I established hasnвҖҷt been active for a full year, and on top of that, there arenвҖҷt enough members. So my goal is to gain more members before I graduate, raise its status from an association to a club, and then accomplish my plan to transform the student body into ninjas!
As the first step, IвҖҷd like for Transfer Student-dono to be enlisted as a member of the Ninja AssociationвҖҰ
Huh, Transfer Student-dono? Transfer Student-donoвҖ“? That's strange. She was just right in front of me... Ah, there you were, Transfer Student-dono.
вҖҰ!? DonвҖҷt run away! Your face says вҖңI canвҖҷt take this any longerвҖқ... DonвҖҷt leave me~! I promise I won't try to recruit you again, Transfer Student-dono! So, please, come with me to my training! That's all I ask! I'm begging you...!
Ohh, you'll come!? I'm overjoyed with gratitude~! Well then, Transfer Student-dono, here I go~вҷӘ
ShutatatataвҖҰ ShutatatataвҖҰ Leg strength and jumping power are absolutely essential for a ninja. Training your leg strength like this is the first step on the path to becoming a ninja~ Not just that, but completely erasing the sound of your footsteps is crucial for ninjas. It doesnвҖҷt matter how fast you run вҖ” If the enemy picks up on your footsteps, youвҖҷre done for. What do you think, Transfer Student-dono? Am I managing to properly dash across the field like the breeze?
If thereвҖҷs anything wrong, point it out, even if itвҖҷs just the teeniest bit off-point~ Eh? You canвҖҷt tell whether my footsteps are making a sound because I'm talking while running?
What! I made such a rudimentary mistakeвҖҰ What a critical blunder of a lifetime! Understood. IвҖҷll try running without talking~
ShutatatataвҖҰ ShutatatataвҖҰ Transfer Student-dono, how about that!? Ahh, вҖңshutatatata" is my catchphrase when I run!
Try to run without saying вҖңshutatatataвҖқ? Th-ThatвҖҷs going to be difficult, but for the sake of becoming a ninja, IвҖҷll do my best~!
Location: Rooftop (Nighttime)
вҖҰвҖҰ (HuffвҖҰ huffвҖҰ) The sunвҖҷs already set, it's pitch black outside... Transfer Student-dono! I'm so sorry for keeping you out this late!
But it made me happy that you came along. Despite what you say, youвҖҷve been the only person whoвҖҷs accompanied me in my ninja training in the end.
Everyone would just watch from afar вҖ” The only person who lent a hand was you.
вҖҰ Transfer Student-dono. Thank you for coming with me to my training. Even after the incident in the morning, you encouraged me, and it helped me come to my senses.
IвҖҷll keep your words in my heart as I continue my ninja training! When IвҖҷm able to call myself a ninja with pride, thatвҖҷs when IвҖҷll be able to show off my magnificent ninjutsu skills for sure~!
So please wait until then. If youвҖҷre willing to wait for me, Transfer Student-dono, I can endure the harsh training. Because to me, Transfer Student-dono is a producer and Archangel-dono~вҷӘ
Translation Notes вҶ‘ Said in English.вҶ‘ He ends up conducting Ninja Association activities in Scroll of the Elements, Chuunibyou, and Dead End Land.

entry.title: Keito Management Stories
entry.content:
NOTE: Management stories take place in early !-era spring, so they're a good gauge for relationships pre-development.
Characters
Writer
Happy Elements
Translation
citrinesea
Proofreading
310mc
Season: Early Spring [!]
With Kuro
Location: Library
Kiryu? ItвҖҷs rare to see you in a place like this. What are you doing
Oh, danna. You came at a good time. Couldja tell me what this word means?
English reference books..? Were you studying?
Yeah. Actually, Kanzaki asked me a question about English grammar the other day. It was something I could answer, butвҖҰ Seems like heвҖҷs unbelievably bad at English. Did you know about that, danna?
NoвҖҰ He has a serious disposition, so I was under the impression he could study just as diligently. Come to think of it, there are times where he struggles with English words we use on a daily basis.
Right? Seems he can handle other subjects better than average, but English is the one thing he just can't do. SeeinвҖҷ him like that got me worried, but I'm not that good at studying myself. ThatвҖҷs how I ended up here, reviewinвҖҷ it.
I seeвҖҰ IвҖҷm starting to get worried, tooвҖҰ I donвҖҷt think itвҖҷll affect his grades, but stillвҖҰ Okay. I have some reference books and vocabulary flashcards I can recommend, so stay here. IвҖҷll bring them.
Alright, thanks. It's reassurin' to know youвҖҷre willinвҖҷ to help us out, danna.
With Tsukasa
Location: School Store
ThereвҖҷs no urgent work today. Now and again, I have lunch at the school store, so I thought IвҖҷd come by, butвҖҰ Why is there nothing but soybean bread left? The sign says вҖңNow half-off the regular price!'', but thereвҖҷs still so much left overвҖҰ As I figured, itвҖҷs not very popular. I don't like soybeans either. It's not something IвҖҷm going to force myself to eat. It's a pain, but I have no choice but to go to the cafeteria.
Oh, Hasumi-senpai? Hello. The bread in the school store is exquisite. I also come here quite often.
Suou? . . I don't want to eat soybean bread, even if itвҖҷs exquisite. From what I see, you seem to have bought a different kind of bread. I canвҖҷt believe you managed to buy them in time.
As soon as the bell rang to signal the end of class, I headed straight to the school store. The first yearвҖҷs classrooms are close to the school store, so if you walk quickly, you can buy the popular bread вҷӘ Um, Hasumi-senpai. If you don't like the bread there, do you want to exchange it for the bread I bought?
Is that okayвҖҰ? It would help. To be honest, itвҖҷs not that theyвҖҷre inedible: I just really don't like soybeans. I was just thinking about going to the cafeteria instead.
I see, so Hasumi-senpai doesn't like soybeans. From now on, I will refrain from giving you anything with soybeans in it. But why is there so much surplus today? Is it a purchase order Mistake?
Who knows... Suou, I'm starting to feel a little sick, so I'll wait outside. Jeez, I don't think I can ever overcome soybeans.
With Mao
Location: Cafe
Mm. This coffee is delicious.
HmвҖҰ There arenвҖҷt any seats left. I guess it canвҖҷt be helpedвҖҰ IвҖҷll check another store.
IsaraвҖҰ? I didnвҖҷt expect to meet you in a place like this. The seat in front of me is empty, so why don't you sit down?
Oh, vice president? ! Um, is that okay? It's not like I'm meeting someone.
I'm alone, so itвҖҷs fine. IвҖҷm ordering a refill of coffee, but what about you, Isara?
Well, it's the same for me... Um, do you come to this store often?
Not really. I only come every once in a while whenever I feel like drinking coffee. Well, usually I have Japanese tea, though... What? Even if you look at me like that, I won't let you have my chiffon cake.
A-Ah, itвҖҷs not thatвҖ“ ErвҖҰ There's just something unusual to me about the vice president having cake.
Hmph, even I eat something like this once in a while. Putting that aside, it seems that what I asked for has arrived. It's normal for the student council to be busy, so it's important to take breaks. ItвҖҷs been a while since weвҖҷve seen each other, so it'd be nice to take our time catching up over coffee.
With Yuzuru
Location: Archery Hall
IвҖҷm coming in.
Ah, Hasumi-sama. Are you participating in the archery club's activities today?
Yes. I finished my student council work early, so I thought IвҖҷd show up for once. Judging from appearances, itвҖҷs just you Fushimi. Were you practicing alone?
No. I was simply cleaning.
Ahh, IвҖҷm grateful that you do this without me having to ask. ItвҖҷs thanks to you that the archery range is kept tidy, Fushimi. You have my thanks.
ThereвҖҷs no need to thank me. I'm a member of the archery club, and cleaning is my hobby. Hasumi-sama, the only thing I have left to do is clean the floorвҖҰ Could you please wait in the changing room until it's finished? However, I'd feel terrible to keep you waiting, so I'll prepare something for you to drink afterwards.
Hey, IвҖҷm not a customer. WeвҖҷre both members of the archery club, so let me help with the cleaning, too.
But I cannot allow Vice President-sama himself to do such a thingпјҺ
I told you to call me by my last name during club activities. IвҖҷm also a member of the archery club, so weвҖҷll do the cleaning together. Besides, the sooner we do it, the sooner it will be over. Let's put in some elbow grease every now and then.
With Kaoru
Location: Rooftop
Hakaze, you've come at the right time. I have something to talk to you aboutпјҺ
Mm, well I don't, so cut me a break please~ Your lectures are too long, Hasumi-kun, so I donвҖҷt really care for them.
Hmph, it's your own fault for doing things that need lecturing. Hakaze, youвҖҷve been leaving your surfboard here without permission, havenвҖҷt you? Take it home immediately.
Well, it's the perfect place for air-drying it~ ItвҖҷs not like itвҖҷs bothering anyone if I hang it out here, so it's fine, right?
ItвҖҷs not fine. WeвҖҷve been telling students not to store personal items on campus without permission.
Yeah, yeah. YouвҖҷre not very accommodating, are you Megane-kun~?
Who are you calling "Megane-kun"? If you really want to store it on the roof, take the appropriate stepsвҖҰ
Look, letвҖҷs put that aside, have you seen Transfer student-chan, Hasumi-kun?
The transfer student? No, I haven't. Did you need something from her?
Yeah, kinda~ But if she isn't here, there's no point sticking around the rooftop anymore. I'll be going. Bye bye~
Wait, Hakaze, this conversation isn't over! Hey, donвҖҷt ignore me! Listen to people when theyвҖҷre talking to you!1
With Madara
Location: Student Council Room
вҖҰвҖҰ
Excuse meeee~!
Uwaa, you startled me?! Hey, Mikejima! Knock before you enter a room!
Hahaha, you sound a liiittle like Shu-san. Aaanyways, your smartphone slipped out of your hand Keito-san. I grabbed it right before it hit the floor so I donвҖҷt think it broke, butвҖҰ Please check just to be sure!
вҖҰвҖҰ Ah, itвҖҷs fine. Since you picked it up for me, I should at least show my gratitude. Thank you, Mikejima.
You donвҖҷt need to thank meee. Aaanyway, I caught a glimpse of your screen when I picked it up. You read books on your phone, huh, Keito-san?
I do so every once in a while, yes. Hardcovers are too heavy to carry around, so I just read them as e-books sometimes, thatвҖҷs all. More importantly, you came to the student council room for business, right Mikejima? What did you need? ItвҖҷs just me right now, but I can handle almost anything you need on my own.
Well, here. I created a live proposal, so I was hoping you would check to see if itвҖҷs good enough!
HmmвҖҰ Do you mind if it takes a little while? I want to review it properly.
No problem at aaall~ While I'm waiting, I'd like to read the book you were reading earlier, Keito-san. Could you tell me the title of it? From the sentence I read earlier, it seemed interesting. Consider me intrigued.
Ah, if you like, I donвҖҷt mind if you read it on my phone. ItвҖҷll have to be later, but when I get home I can grab my paperback and lend it to you. I doubt youвҖҷre the type to hold back, but let me know what you think about it.
вҶ‘ Comic World (which takes place in summer) reveals that Keito ends up doing the paperwork for Kaoru himself.

entry.title: Many Minds, One Flower
entry.content:
Characters
Writer
Yuumasu
Translation
citrinesea
Proofreading
310mc
Season: Summer
Location: Starmony Dorm Commons
(... I know that singing and dancing arenвҖҷt the only jobs an idol does, but I never thought I'd have to perform an ikebana1 demonstration) (As Rhythm LinkвҖҷs representative, I have to make sure I present something that doesnвҖҷt bring shame to the agency.)
вҖҰвҖҰ all done~вҷӘ
Really? I havenвҖҷt even put together the main materials yet. Do you have experience in this, by any chanceвҖ”- вҖҰвҖҰ Shinkai. What is that?
what do you mean? itвҖҷs [ikebana], of course. from the school of [shinkai]2вҖҰвҖҰвҳҶ
ThereвҖҷs no helping you. DonвҖҷt claim to be a school as you please. No matter how you look at it, all you did was stick a fish onto the needle bed. WeвҖҷre arranging flowers, not fish. This is beyond unacceptable. As STAR PROвҖҷs representative, donвҖҷt you feel the least bit shameful?
mmphвҖҰ the only people who get to decide whether my [arrangement] is [acceptable] are the [beholders]. not you, [temple guy].вҳҶ is it [bad] if I donвҖҷt follow the [model]? if thatвҖҷs the only way to get [recognized], thatвҖҷs a little boring, isnвҖҷt it? anyway, IвҖҷve grown tired of [ikebana], so iвҖҷm done here. iвҖҷm going to go [soak] in the [pond]вҖҰвҖҰвҷӘ
вҖҰ.. What an uninhibited guy. He does realize that this would make it a вҖңcoral arrangementвҖқ, not a вҖңfloral arrangementвҖқ, right?3 (But Shinkai has a point. ItвҖҷd be hard to say that itвҖҷs my work if I just stick to the textbook.) (However, you should only be creative and break the rules after youвҖҷve learned them. If you take it on with your own style while youвҖҷre inexperienced, youвҖҷll end up with a ridiculous work of art.) (Before anything else, IвҖҷve got to thoroughly drill the basics in my head.)
One hour later
(вҖҰвҖҰ Hmm. This should be good enough for now.) (But it looks just like the picture in the textbookвҖҰвҖҰ)
Hello. Are you doing ikebana? What an unusual hobby~
Not quite. IвҖҷm going to be participating in a flower-arranging demonstration. This is just practice.
I see. And this isвҖҰ a fish arrangement? Is this your work too, Keito-kun?
That would be ShinkaiвҖҷs work. It stinks, as youвҖҷd expect from fishвҖҰ It doesnвҖҷt look like heвҖҷll be coming back either. IвҖҷll have to go put this in the kitchen. That's right. Aoba, if you don't mind, could you give me your thoughts on my work? I can't really judge it for myself.
My thoughts? Mmnnn~ I think it looks nice, butвҖҰ
DonвҖҷt hold back. I want your honest opinion.
No, it's not that IвҖҷm holding back. I just don't know much about ikebana. I know a lot about flower meanings, though. Could I try it too? I feel like I could evaluate your work properly if I try it myself.
Hmm. They do say that teaching is the best way to learnвҖҰвҖҰ
(Sniff sniff)вҖҰ I thought it smelled like flowers here. It was you guys, huh?.
Ah, good afternoon. How about you join us, Ogami-kun?
EhhhвҖҰ?
Another hour later
вҖ” And now for the arrangement. Place the flowers so that they fill in the gaps between the ones you just inserted.
In the gaps, got it~
Gaaaaah! I jumped in вҖҳcuz it looked interesting, but itвҖҷs taking forever! What a pain~! I mean, it's not rock вҖҳn roll to fit into the mold! IвҖҷm just gonna be me, like this, this вҖҳn вҖ” this! HowвҖҷs that, Hasumi-senpai! This looks way more like an UNDEAD flower stand now. Cool, dontcha think~вҷӘ
First it was Shinkai, now itвҖҷs youвҖҰ YouвҖҷre truly hopelessвҖҰвҖҰ WeвҖҷre making flower arrangements, not flower stands.
I'm baaack. Hah~, I'm tiredвҖҰвҖҰ Aoba-onii-chan, youвҖҷre holding something nice, huh. Gimme that rose~вҷӘ
Of course, here you are.
Thank you. (Nibble nibble)вҖҰ
вҖ” Y-You ate it?!
I didnвҖҷt eat it. I just wanted to get energy from the rose~4 Are you all playing with flowers together? How peaceful...
ItвҖҷs ikebana. Come to think of it, arenвҖҷt you also making an appearance on the show?
Making an appearance.... Ah, that variety show. I see, so thatвҖҷs why youвҖҷre doing this. I donвҖҷt think they expect us to be proficient at it, so do we really need to practice? We were invited to do our part as idols, so making the screen lively is enough, right? Kei-chan, your stamina has its bounds, right? If you give anything and everything your all, one of these days youвҖҷre going to collapse.
Hmm. ItвҖҷs a reasonable point. But in order to leave a good mark, I intend to put my entire heart and soul into the task. Rhythm Link is already packed with top veterans, after all. IвҖҷll perform well so theyвҖҷll ask me to return. This is just me laying the groundwork in order to break into semi-regular status.
HmmвҖҰвҖҰ Well, I guess I'll join you guys and have some fun with the flowers, too. You'll probably improve if you have a rival... And as NEW DIвҖҷs representative, I can't just stand by and watchвҖҰ...вҷӘ
Hmph, do whatever you like. You're probably more of a natural at this sort of thing than I am, but... Hard work will not betray me. IвҖҷll have the last laugh.
Translation Notes вҶ‘ Ikebana (з”ҹгҒ‘иҠұ, lit. giving life to flowers) is the art of Japanese flower arrangement. Read about its principles and relationship with Buddhism hereвҶ‘ Schools pass on the art of ikebana to students. Each individual school follows a particular set of principles, philosophies, and arranging techniques, all which vary depending on the school. Matching the name format of (school)-ryu (жөҒ), Kanata calls it ж·ұжө·жөҒ (School of Shinkai).вҶ‘ Originally, he says з”ҹгҒ‘иҠұгҖҒз”ҹгҒ‘йӯҡ (flower arrangement, fish arrangement), but since it rhymed (hana, sakana), I wanted to preserve his pun.вҶ‘ A good reference for this is this Ritsu card from Fleur de Lis

entry.title: Onigashima
entry.content:

When Tetora shows up to the dojo late for after-school training, he gets the shock of his life when he hears Kuro utter вҖңThereвҖҷs nothing left to do but dispose of вҖҳemвҖқ...
Season

Chapters
8

[Respect Towards the Ogre] Tetora Nagumo [й¬јгҒёж•¬ж„Ҹ] еҚ—йӣІ йү„иҷҺ
