TBD TBD.
Onigashima 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8
$(document).ready(function() { $('.preview-wrapper').remove();
Onigashima Chapter 1
Season: Winter
Location: Dojo
Hm? The dojoвҖҷs empty. That guy Tetsu didnвҖҷt come yet? (And IвҖҷm just gonnaвҖҰ bow in front of altar.) Alright, IвҖҷll start ahead of him. If I start practicinвҖҷ, TetsuвҖҷll be here before I know it. вҖҰ Ha! There! Ha! Take that!1 вҖҰ ItвҖҷs no good. My thoughts are distracting me from doinвҖҷ the proper kata formsвҖҰ I thought my head would clear out if I got my body movinвҖҷ, but IвҖҷm still stuck in a rut. I just canвҖҷt get into practice like this. IвҖҷm settinвҖҷ a bad example doinвҖҷ somethinвҖҷ this, arenвҖҷt I? (TellinвҖҷ anyone else about it is tough, thoughвҖҰ At the end of the day, I gotta do somethinвҖҷ about it myself.) вҖҰвҖҰ But. I keep havinвҖҷ second thoughts, or likeвҖҰ I feel at a loss, I guess. How fuckinвҖҷ pathetic, get a grip. There are guys who look up to me вҖҳn put their hopes on me. AhhвҖҰ ItвҖҷs not in my nature to worry this much about thingsвҖҰвҖҰ
(CleaninвҖҷ took so long, IвҖҷm super late~! TaishouвҖҷs2 probably practicing already?) (Even though just about all the third-years retired from club activities already, Taishou shows up for the sake of passinвҖҷ on the club.) (Thanks to that, I get to work on throwing and grappling3 with Taishou!) (DonвҖҷt get me wrong, it's fun to do that with other club members too, but TaishouвҖҷs in a league of his own, so wrestling with him is the most fun!) (Recently, heвҖҷs been having grappling matches with me more than he used to. Guess it means IвҖҷm beinвҖҷ recognized by Taishou~вҷӘ) (Alright! Let's get fired up and do our best today too! I won't say IвҖҷll get a win, but at the very least I wanna be able to get some points.)
There! Ha!
(Ahh, it sounds like TaishouвҖҷs gotten a headstart on practice~ I can feel his fighting spirit eminatinвҖҷ from the dojo!) (Heheh~вҷӘ Am I allowed to play a little prank on Taishou and surprise him~? Like makinвҖҷ a loud noise or something?)
(Will he get angry? But I barely ever see Taishou get surprised, so I kinda wanna see it.) (Lemme juuust take a peek inside and scope it outвҖҰ)
(Ah, he really is practicing right now. вҖҰ Hm? TaishouвҖҷs movements are kinda slower than usual todayвҖҰвҖҰ?)
вҖҰвҖҰ Guess itвҖҷs like I thought. ThereвҖҷs nothing left to do but dispose of вҖҳem.
...!? (Eh? EhhhвҖҰ!? Was that seriously Taishou who said that just now!?) (Dispose? Who will dispose whoвҖҰ!? Erm, itвҖҷs Taishou sayinвҖҷ it, so that means heвҖҷs gonna get rid of someone, right?) (No, no, no, noвҖҰвҖҰ There's no way Taishou would say something so disturbing! I musta heard it wrong!) (Ahaha. ItвҖҷs just like me to jump to the wrong conclusion~ To be a man among men, you gotta take it slow and steady.) (Just take a deep breath and compose yourselfвҖҰ InвҖҰ outвҖҰ) (Ossu, I calmed down a lot~) (LetвҖҷs check again. Taking another peek insiiiideвҖҰ)
All I wanted was to just let this go, but if things keep goinвҖҷ this way, the people I cherish are gonna get hurt. ThereвҖҷs nothinвҖҷ else I can do about it at this point. Next time I meet up with those guys, itвҖҷs time for them to pay up!
...!? (UwaaAAAAA!! I definitely didnвҖҷt mishear him!) (He clearly said it's time for them to pay up! This time, I listened real carefully with my ears!) (What does he mean by that!? I-Is it possible that TaishouвҖҷs really planning to settle his scores with someoneвҖҰ) (Ummm, ummm~? Wh-What should I do!? Stop him!? Support him!?) (No, think rationally, I canвҖҷt support him doing that!? Aaah, I'm getting more and more confused, I can't handle this all by myselfвҖҰ!?) (Ah, thatвҖҷs it. Hasumi-senpai! If I just consult Hasumi-senpaiвҖҰвҖҰ!) (At this time of day, he should be in the student council room. Right, I gotta head there quickly!) (Taishou! DonвҖҷt be too hasty yet~!)
It feels like thereвҖҷs been some rustlinвҖҷ goinвҖҷ on outside for a while nowвҖҰ? Maybe Tetsu came? Oi, Tetsu. Why arenвҖҷt you cominвҖҷ inвҖҰ Wait, no oneвҖҷs here. Was I imagining things? Hm? IsnвҖҷt this TetsuвҖҷs bag? Did he come here after all? WhyвҖҷd he drop his bag here, thenвҖҰ?
Location: Student Council Room
Hasumi-dono4 , how about you take a small break? HavenвҖҷt you been working nonstop?
Hm? Ahh, so much time has passed alreadyвҖҰ? DonвҖҷt worry. Thanks to your help, Kanzaki, IвҖҷm at a stopping point.
Is that right? IвҖҷm glad to hear that! By the way, may I ask why you were doing student council work, Hasumi-dono? You were working when I came, so I offered to help in spite of myself, butвҖҰ HavenвҖҷt you already passed on the work to the other members?
The main things have been finished and passed on, but IвҖҷm just so used to this work after doing it for so long. I feel uneasy when I have nothing to do. That's why I thought I'd do an after-action report on Chocolat Fes5 from the other day, butвҖҰ it seems I just got absorbed in it. Rather, Kanzaki. Why did you also come here to help me as you always do in the first place?
Me? ErmвҖҰ Now that you mention itвҖҰ IвҖҷm also the type to get uneasy when I have nothing to do, so I rushed in to help you as I usually do, Hasumi-dono!
I have issues with moderation, but youвҖҷre just as bad, huh? WeвҖҷve reached a stopping point, so maybe itвҖҷs time for some tea or something.
If thatвҖҷs the case, I will brew it! I would like Hasumi-dono to take it easyвҖҰвҷӘ
Sorry to make you do this.
вҖҰвҖҰвҖ”npa~i!
Hm? It sounded like someone just called for me? The hallway is noisy, isnвҖҷt it?
Ah, now that you mention itвҖҰ ArenвҖҷt those footsteps? It seems theyвҖҷre coming towards this room at a tremendous pace!?
Hasumi-senpai! S-Something terrible is happening~!
Onigashima Chapter 2
(Gulping, gulping) вҖҰвҖҰ Whew~! My nerves finally settled down! Thanks for the tea, Kanzaki-senpai!
Mhm, it was my pleasure to serve it. IвҖҷm glad I was brewing tea at the right moment.
YouвҖҷre utterly hopeless! I donвҖҷt know what happened, but who in their right mind would just tear down the halls like that!? The student council routinely cracks down on such an offense, you know! If people heard that someone had run into the student council room, we would be utterly humiliated!
I-IвҖҷm so sorry! I was so panicked and got carried awayвҖҰ!
вҖҰ Well? What business do you have that warrants you coming here so breathless?
Ah! It's the terrible thing I was talking about! I came to ask Hasumi-senpai for adviceвҖ” and the fact that Kanzaki-senpaiвҖҷs here too is just my luck! See, when I went for my club activities, I noticed that Taishou had gotten to the dojo earlier than me. Then I happened to overhear him talkinвҖҷ to himself about some real disturbing thingsвҖҰ Stuff like вҖңThereвҖҷs nothing left to do but dispose of вҖҳemвҖқ and вҖңItвҖҷs time for them to pay upвҖқ...... That's why I thought maybe Taishou was planning on having them pay a вҖңlittle visitвҖқ to the maker6... What the heck do you think I should do?
Kiryu said that? ThatвҖҷs ridiculous. There's no way that's the case with him.
Really? I donвҖҷt think it's out of the question that Kiryu-dono would do something like that, though. I wonder what kind of wish came true for Kiryu-dono? As expected of a warrior, he never forgets to be grateful to the gods and Buddha!
HuhвҖҰ? Gods and BuddhaвҖҰ?
вҖҰ Kanzaki. The вҖңmakerвҖқ NagumoвҖҷs talking about isnвҖҷt what youвҖҷre thinking of. That saying is used to mean that someone intends to вҖңretaliateвҖқ.
What!? RetaliateвҖҰ? Kiryu-dono would never do something like that! Are you trying to make light of Kiryu-donoвҖҷs nature, Nagumo!?
N-No, thatвҖҷs not it! I don't think Taishou would do something like that either! But I heard what I heardвҖҰ At first I thought I heard it wrong, but when I checked again, I heard him say something disturbing againвҖҰ
Calm down, both of you. I donвҖҷt think Kiryu would do that eitherвҖҰ but I hardly think Nagumo is one to lie either.
ThatвҖҷsвҖҰ ThatвҖҷs true, butвҖҰвҖҰ
I swear I'm not lying! A man among men would never do that. Hasumi-senpai, Kanzaki-senpai, please believe me! Point is, after I heard allвҖҷa that, I freaked out and didnвҖҷt know what to doвҖҰ ThatвҖҷs when it came to me to ask Hasumi-senpai, so thatвҖҷs why I hurried to the student council room.
HmвҖҰ (I certainly don't think Kiryu would do something like that...) (But Nagumo's acting like this. I donвҖҷt think itвҖҷs a misunderstanding, it's probably true that he heard itвҖҰ..) (What on earth could this mean...? Is Kiryu really going toвҖҰ?)
We will not be able to come to an agreement with our thoughts in distress! This situation calls for an emergency strategy meeting to be held!
вҖҰ Hah? An emergency strategy meetingвҖҰ?
This feels like something RYUSEITAI would usually do, but I agree! I want some kinda strategy to get to the bottom of this!
Yes. Well said, Nagumo! With that settled, letвҖҷs write the topic of discussion on this вҖңwaito-boodoвҖқ!7 вҖңRegarding Kiryu-donoвҖҷs mysterious behaviorвҖҰ What should we do?вҖқ
O-Oi. Don't proceed with the conversation as you pleaseвҖҰ
I'm not really good at usinвҖҷ my head, but IвҖҷll think a whole bunch for TaishouвҖҷs sake~
Come now, Hasumi-dono, you too! We want you to guide us as our consultant! I want all of us to come up with a plan together!
вҖҰвҖҰвҖҰ
At any rate, I think we should start by sorting out the situation!
U~myu. What I said earlier was almost all of what happened, butвҖҰ Umm. When I went to club activities, Taishou was there practicing first. I wanted to spook him a little, so I quietly scoped it out. Then Taishou said, вҖңGuess itвҖҷs like I thought. ThereвҖҷs nothing left to do but dispose of вҖҳem.вҖқ... At first I thought I musta heard it wrong, so I peeked in again and he said, вҖңNext time I meet up with those guys, itвҖҷs time for them to pay up.вҖқ That's when I came here in such a hurry... Wait, ahhhвҖ”!? I was in such a hurry that I left my bag outside the dojo. Well, it only has my textbooks in itвҖҰ
Textbooks are the most important thing you could have, for goodnessвҖҷ sakeвҖҰ. Just what do you think your duty is as a student? In any case, hmmвҖҰ No matter how many times I hear it, I still can't connect it to Kiryu. Many things may have happened in the past, but I canвҖҷt imagine him doing anything like that in the current day. ButвҖҰ that's right. At times like this, it's a matter of reversing logic.
Reversing logicвҖҰ In other words, under what scenario would Kiryu-dono need to take such action?
Under what scenarioвҖҰ? Ah! Now that you mention it! That's what Taishou said! вҖңIf things keep goinвҖҷ this way, the people I cherish are gonna get hurt.вҖқ Maybe TaishouвҖҷs trying to get the jump on them to protect someone...!
Why didn't you lead with that!?
Heheh, sorry. The horror was so strong from all the horrible things Taishou was saying, I totally forgot about it.
Well, then that's the reason. If that's the case, it makes sense that Kiryu would try to make a move. I suppose this is him trying to protect us or someone else at the academy. But I'm sure he thinks itвҖҷll cause us trouble, so heвҖҷs worrying about this all by himselfвҖҰ Will he ever do something about that side of his? How completely hopeless.
Onigashima Chapter 3
However, trouble is out of the question at a time like this, even if he has a good reason for it, like protecting someone. I can't let that guy's efforts go to waste in the end. IвҖҷll keep that from happening no matter the cost.
Ossu! Of course!
IвҖҷm in agreement too. However, while our aim is to stop it, we wonвҖҷt be able to do much if we donвҖҷt know who heвҖҷs trying to attack, no?
To start with, since it seems like TaishouвҖҷs friends might get affected too, the enemy has to have a real deep grudge against him, right? If thatвҖҷs true, they should just pick a fight with Taishou and nobody else..
ItвҖҷs possible that the opponent can't beat Kiryu with a direct attack, so theyвҖҷre trying to use underhanded methods instead. Well, given the situation and how Kiryu was acting, it certainly seems like they have a strong grudge against him.
Taishou is strong, after all. But theyвҖҷve gotta be someone holding a constant resentment for Taishou, right? Is there anyone like that around?
A grudgeвҖҰ Kiryu is a reputable person, though, so I don't think there's anyone who would hold a grudge against him. A lot happened in this academy in the old days, but most of the people from that time have already left this school. Now, of the remaining students, there are probably more people who are grateful to Kiryu than not.
Yeah, I bet. ThatвҖҷs how I felt at the time of the Dragon King Competition!8 It made me think like, wow, everybody cherishes Taishou~
Hmph. At the time, I was extremely busy participating in another event, and the academy was empty too. I simply just didn't realize it was going on at the time. Had I known in advance, I would have definitely put a stop to it.
Mhm. There was suddenly a job to do at the time. But, hmmm... If that's the case, could it perhaps be an old familiar face? Someone he knew before entering this academyвҖҰвҖҰ
Hmm... IвҖҷm not saying it isnвҖҷt possible, but I've never seen him with someone like that.
I donвҖҷt think so either. I see Taishou all the time, but I donвҖҷt think IвҖҷve ever seen him meet up with anyone like that before.
As I figured. I have no recollection of Kiryu-dono ever being with such a person as well. No. If we keep speculating like this, we will never reach the truth! Why donвҖҷt we ask Kiryu-dono about all of this directly?
Denied. If we do that and make Kiryu suspicious of us, itвҖҷs likely heвҖҷll just lie to cover up the truth. And if Kiryu sneaks around about it, itвҖҷll be even harder to pin down the other party.
Which means... Maybe watching over Taishou would be the best way of goinвҖҷ about it? KeepinвҖҷ an eye on him if he acts weird and stopping him if it seems like heвҖҷs gonna head to the other person?
вҖҰ I feel ashamed that IвҖҷd be monitoring my friend, but I suppose itвҖҷs the only way. You canвҖҷt solve a problem without making a sacrifice. LetвҖҷs go with that plan.
Location: Hallway
(I've been thinking about it since I heard Nagumo's story yesterday, but there really are still too many things that donвҖҷt make sense to meвҖҰ...) (I don't think KiryuвҖҷs that good at hiding things in the first place.) (If he was planning to do something like that, IвҖҷd think one of us would have noticed something was off.) (But, well, it's not like weвҖҷre always paying attention to things like that. It's possible that we missed it.) But, how incorrigible. CouldnвҖҷt something have been done a bit more with the casting?
Hm? You mean about how Tetsu was the dog, Kanzaki was the ogre, and Danna was the monkey? I thought it fit you guys pretty well, though.
If it were just the monkey, IвҖҷd understand, but why did I have to play the pheasant as well?
We didnвҖҷt have enough hands, so it couldnвҖҷt be helped. Besides, for that role, your job was to do ventriloquism while holdinвҖҷ the pheasant doll. And you did a pretty fine job at that, Danna. DidnвҖҷt all the kids hound you for an encore afterwards?
KhвҖҰ itвҖҷs because I usually see that eccentric oddballвҖҷs tricks. ItвҖҷs aggravating I got the hang of something as pointless as ventriloquism.
Tetsu and Kanzaki couldnвҖҷt do ventriloquism to that degree. They were just movinвҖҷ their lips like normal. Hm? Come to think of it, what happened to Tetsu вҖҳn Kanzaki?
If youвҖҷre looking for the two of them, they were romping around with all the kids and making a racket. When the kids got put to bed, they fell asleep with them.
ZzzвҖҰвҖҰ zzzвҖҰвҖҰ
вҖҰвҖҰвҖҰвҖҰ
Ahh, youвҖҷre right. TheyвҖҷre mixed in with all the kids thatвҖҷre sleepinвҖҷ, huh? I thought it was lilвҖҷ lonely that they were gettinвҖҷ all reliable on us, but seeinвҖҷ вҖҳem like this, theyвҖҷve still got a bit of a kiddy part to them, huh?
DonвҖҷt say that. You made the two of them worry about you so much that they said that they were too nervous to sleep properly. They probably felt relieved enough to relax now.
Well, that was pretty bad on my part.
Absolutely. Reflect on yourself. Well, it was my fault too for not seeing through itвҖҰ. Even if I believed it was true, I wouldnвҖҷt have guessed that you were practicing lines for a kindergarten event.
Yeah, true. Hey, if I really did go after someone like that вҖҳn beat them as payback, what would you have done, Hasumi-no-danna?
Hah? WhereвҖҷd that come from so suddenly? You wouldnвҖҷt do something like that in the first place.
I said what if. What if I did? I donвҖҷt plan to, but we donвҖҷt know the future, right? I was wonderinвҖҷ what youвҖҷd do about it if I really went to go вҖҳn beat someone down?
вҖҰвҖҰ I see. If that were the case, IвҖҷd give you a good wallop to stop you, even if it cost me my life.
вҖҰвҖҰвҖҰвҖҰ Hasumi-no-danna, doing that...? Like, to win a square-on fight with me?
DidnвҖҷt I just say IвҖҷd do it even if it cost me my life?
Hahahaha. What, so youвҖҷre planninвҖҷ on losinвҖҷ? Come with a winninвҖҷ attitude. You donвҖҷt sound sure of yourself at all.
Shut it. ItвҖҷs a hypothetical, so it doesnвҖҷt matter if I win or lose. I know you wouldnвҖҷt do anything like that anyway.
Haha. Hey, Hasumi-no-danna. IвҖҷm a lucky guy, arenвҖҷt I? IвҖҷm surrounded by all these good guys who care about me. I'd love to show all'a that to the old me. HeвҖҷd be surprised for sure.
Translation Notes вҶ‘ "гҒЁгӮҠгӮғпјҒгҒӣгҒ„гӮ„!" are more exclamations from martial arts like judo. They can be used when throwing something/someone heavy, or intimidating the opponent.вҶ‘ Tetora refers to Kuro as еӨ§е°Ҷ (taishou, lit. large general ), or boss.вҶ‘ More about uchikomi and kumite here.вҶ‘ -ж®ҝ (-dono) is an honorific that roughly means "lord" or "master". It's archaic, which gives Souma an old-timey feel.вҶ‘ AKATSUKI's Chocolat Fes story is Decorate. If you're curious about RYUSEITAI's it's Hot and Elegant Chocolat Fes.вҶ‘ Onigashima hinges around the phraseгҖҺгҒҠзӨјеҸӮгӮҠгҖҸгҒҷгӮӢ (lit. pay one's respects at a shrine). Colliqually, this refers to someone who's going to retaliate against someone else (i.e., someone who hasn't paid a loan). Souma thinks Tetora is using its original meaning.вҶ‘ In Japanese, words from other languages (such as English) are typically rendered in katakana. However, when Souma uses katakana words, they are all written in hiragana instead, likely to emphasize how he struggles with foreign words. These words are kept as written in hiragana, and put in "quotes".вҶ‘ From the story Four Beasts of Fist Fighting. Keito's playing coy here because he was actually the one to divert attention away from the Dragon King Competition.вҶ‘ Kuro often refers to Keito as ж—ҰйӮЈ (danna, lit. master ), or "boss". He'll also use Hasumi-no-danna.вҶ‘ Statues of the Bodhisattva Jizo often dot along trails and sit innocuously, looking over wandering travelers.вҶ‘ Tetora is saying жӯўгӮҒгҒҰ stay with me (stop, don't go) but Kuro thinks he's saying жіҠгӮҒгҒҰ stay (at my place) because they're both pronounced гҒЁгҒҫгӮӢ.вҶ‘ Based on folklore, giving someone one thousand origami cranes is meant to wish them well or wish them long health.вҶ‘ This happened in The Wolf and Red Riding Hood with Kuro, Souma, Nazuna and Shinobu.вҶ‘ The story of Momotaro follows a boy who goes to Onigashima (lit. Ogre Island) to fight the ogres that live there. On the way, he befriends a talking dog, monkey and pheasant, who agree to help him in his quest.вҶ‘ If you wanna see Kuro's acting chops, read Tough Guy where he practices with Chiaki, Tetora and Midori.

entry.title: 2024 Idol Hospitality Campaign | AKATSUKI & RYUSEITAI Oshi Room
entry.content:
$(document).ready(function() { var $container = $(".grid"); // the container with all the elements to filter inside var filters = {}; //should be outside the scope of the filtering function /* --- read the documentation on isotope.metafizzy.co for more options --- */ var $grid = $container.isotope({ oshiitemSelector: ".oshiitem", // the elements to filter percentPosition: true // put true if you use percentage widths, otherwise put false }); $(".option-set a").click(function(e) { var $this = $(this); // cache the clicked link var filterAttr = "data-filter-value"; var filterValue = $this.attr(filterAttr); // cache the filter var $optionSet = $this.parents(".option-set"); // cache the parent element var group = $optionSet.attr("data-filter-group"); // cache the parent filter group var filterGroup = filters[group]; if (!filterGroup) { filterGroup = filters[group] = []; } var $selectAll = $optionSet.find('a['+filterAttr+'=""]'); // the 'select all' button in the current group var activeClass = "selected", // the class for active links exclClass = "exclusive"; // the class for exclusive groups comboFiltering($this,filters,filterAttr,filterValue,$optionSet,group,$selectAll,activeClass,exclClass); var comboFilter = getComboFilter(filters); $grid.isotope({ filter: comboFilter }); $this.toggleClass(activeClass); e.preventDefault(); }); });
Characters
Writer
Akira
Translation
citrinesea, 310mc
Proofreading
310mc, ryuseipuka
In this campaign, you get to narrow down your favorite idols to a singular "oshi": your favorite. The following translation has: the keywords and filters used for the idol selection screen, Q&A responses and charts, and the phone calls you receive after choosing your 3 top idols. Additionally, the "Surging Wave Invitation Campaign" classfications are added to the filter (watch the videos here). AKATSUKI translated by citrinesea, RYUSEITAI translated by 310mc Profile Filters
Charm All Cute Cool Intellectual Lively Muscular Neat and Tidy A Little Messy Tsundere Moodmaker Struggles to Talk to Strangers Klutz Reliable, Reassuring
Details All Younger Brother Older Brother Only Child Certified Driver Athletic Club Member Culture Club Member Likes Cooking
"My Kind of Guy" Ads All Cute and Healing Cheerful Reliable Intelligent Musclebro My Pace Cool
Interviews Where would you go on a first date? A manga museum. I'd like to show you my favorite works, but if we can't read them all in one day, we can come back another time.
How about window-shoppinвҖҷ? We won't run outta things to talk about when weвҖҷre lookinвҖҷ at all the different shops and goods. We can find out each otherвҖҷs taste in fashion and what sorta trends are hot, too.
What about a вҖңcat ka-fayвҖқ? Cats look so adorable, just seeing them is sure to make the two of us smile...~вҷӘ
IвҖҷd like to go to a theme park! вҖҳCuz thereвҖҷs all sortsa things we could do there together, like going on a buncha rides, buying souvenirs, and so much more~вҷӘ
I think itвҖҷd be fun anywhere, as long as IвҖҷm with the person I love, butвҖҰ For me, itвҖҷd be even more fun if weвҖҷre at a place that has yuruchara.
I would love an opportunity to lead the way around a ninja village! I want to show you all there is to know about my favorite thing! Be it by witnessing ninjutsu, having a first-hand experience with it, or anything else of the like~вҷӘ
A date means going to the amusement park! ThereвҖҷs roller coasters, the ferris wheel, and most importantly, hero shows! The day would pass by in a flash! вҳҶ
on warm days, i would like to have fun at the [ocean]~ and in the colder seasons, we can visit the [aquarium]...вҷӘ What was the last message exchange you had with someone in your unit? I contacted Kiryu and Kanzaki about our work schedules, but neither of them responded. Well, that isnвҖҷt unusual, though.
I wanted to hear what their plans were for our new song, so I hit вҖҳem up. After that, we ended up meetin' up and talkin' face-to-face.
I hadn't realized I'd sent an incomprehensible string of characters, so I contacted my seniors to apologize. Handling a "sumaho" is difficultвҖҰ
I messaged everyone вҖҳbout when weвҖҷll have our next practice session together! Midori-kunвҖҷs the only one who hasnвҖҷt responded yet, so IвҖҷm just gonna go and ask him directly!
My parents gave me lots of vegetables, so I asked everyone in my unit if theyвҖҷd like some before I offered them to anyone else. IвҖҷll carry some with me later.
Tetora-kun sent me our schedule for the practice session, so I replied to that! IвҖҷm in charge of booking us a practice room~вҷӘ
I got my hands on some ninja-themed sentai merchandise, so I couldnвҖҷt help but message Sengoku about it. It made me happy to get a text praising how cool it looks! вҳҶ
i messaged chiaki that i am at the [ocean]. he gets [worried] when i do not tell him [where] i am. Why are you so cool? It's because of the support and encouragement around me. My friends and allies are the reason I can stand on stage and strive for greater heights.
I guess it's вҖҳcuz AKATSUKI is where I can be with Hasumi вҖҳn Kanzaki. When I see those two honest guys, itвҖҷs like my spine just straightens up on its own.
There's something about that comment that makes me feel bashful. However, I'm pleased if my daily training has led to that kind of impression.
Maybe itвҖҷs вҖҳcuz everyoneвҖҷs always supporting me? Also, if you think my constant hard work towards my goal is somethinвҖҷ вҖңcoolвҖқ, then IвҖҷm real happy вҖҳbout that!
I donвҖҷt really know how to answer thatвҖҰ But I think that itвҖҷs thanks to my parents that I was born with this face, so IвҖҷll express my gratitude to them laterвҖҰ
I-IвҖҷm cool? It surprises me to hear that, but IвҖҷd certainly be glad if you consider ninjas to be something cool!
It might be because I dream of becoming a hero. And not just any hero, but a вҖңcoolвҖқ oneвҖҰвҳҶ
it is because there are so many [cool] people around me~ so maybe i am also more likely to be seen as cool along with themвҖҰ? What are your best subjects? You could say that liberal arts as a whole are my strongpoint. I believe I've not only excelled in Japanese language and history, but also in civics.
I'm good at sewinвҖҷ and cookinвҖҷ, so home economics is my forte. I usually suck at studying the classic way... especially math; it hurts my head.
I enjoy classical literature and Japanese history. On the contrary, I am not as good at English and world history. While I improve on my current abilities, I want to overcome my weaknesses too.
IвҖҷm confident with my practical classes, like P.E. and home economics~вҷӘ I wanna get better at theory-based subjects too, but itвҖҷs pretty difficult for meвҖҰ
MathвҖҷs my best subject, or more like, itвҖҷs the only thing I can doвҖҰ? IвҖҷm not at all good with other subjects, so I think IвҖҷm pretty compatible with it.
IвҖҷve got a bit of confidence when it comes to Japanese history! I studied a whole lot to make myself well-versed with the era of ninjas~вҷӘ
My best subjects are the liberal arts, like Japanese literature and language! And my weakest subject is math. I would always study until late at night before a test for that class.
[history] and [biology] might be my best subjects? well, i say [biology], but i actually mean [fish]...вҷӘ WhatвҖҷs the first thing you do when you wake up in the morning? I try to set aside the time for meditation. Not only does it improve my ability to concentrate and relax, but it seems to have a positive effect on creativity too.
A while ago, I fell asleep with the light on in my room. Guess thatвҖҷs why the first thing I do when I get up is to check if theyвҖҷre still on.
I prepare breakfast. Now that I have a new kitchen knife, I look forward to cooking with it every day~вҷӘ
I heard it was good for your health if you drink a glass of water in the morning, so I do that. After that, I go out for my morning training routine.
I play a yuruchara game on my phone. ThatвҖҷs the best way to spend time whenever you wanna lie in bed for a little longer, yeah?
I try to do exercises that help you grow taller. I hope it works out, even if I only grow a tiny bit more~
I begin my day with a fresh start by doing radio exercises!1 I get to move every muscle in my body in an efficient manner, and it also feels really good to refresh my mind and body first thing in the morning!
i have new [fishies] in my roomвҖҷs [water tanks], so i [check] how they are doing when i [greet] them~вҷӘ SUMMER: What do you want to do at summer festivals? Just hearing the festival music drifting in the air lifts my spirits. It would be nice to listen to it while refreshing myself in the cool breeze of the evening.
When it comes tвҖҷfestivals, I wanna chow down on some shaved ice, butвҖҰ I always get a brain freeze. Is it вҖҳcuz I take too bigвҖҷa bites out of вҖҳemвҖҰ?
I would like to eat yakisoba coated entirely with вҖңsaw-suвҖқ~вҷӘ IвҖҷll never forget that sensation it brought when I tasted them for the first timeвҖҰ! It was something IвҖҷd never felt beforeвҖҰ!
I wanna check out all sortsa festival stalls~ Like goinвҖҷ to the one for scooping up goldfish! I bet itвҖҷd also be fun to go against someone and see who can scoop up the most!
Yuruchara masks are being sold lately, so if thereвҖҷs a stall selling them, IвҖҷd like to check it out. I might buy one if I find anything I like.
Festivals can only mean one thing, and thatвҖҷs street food! IвҖҷd like to be deliberate about what I choose to eat. IвҖҷve been curious to know what sort of texture the tornado potatoes have~вҷӘ
Before calling it a day at the festival, how does buying sparklers sound? IвҖҷd love to talk with my friends and comrades about our time at the festival all the while. That would definitely make it the best summer everвҖҰвҳҶ
i would probably [sweat] from the humidity, so i would like to [hydrate] myself by eating [chilled pineapple]~3
SUMMER: What are your memories of summer vacation homework? Mornings at the temple start early, so IвҖҷd do my homework after morning services were done. By the time I finished it all, itвҖҷd be right in time for lunch.
I'm damn awful at studyinвҖҷ, and my eyes just canвҖҷt stay open when IвҖҷm readinвҖҷ paragraphs вҖҳn stuff... So I always put it all off вҖҳtil the last second.
Because English assignments take me a considerable amount of time, I would make a schedule and face it head-on. I sought out help from my friends for the portions I didn't understand.
IвҖҷm real bad at studying, so I canвҖҷt help but procrastinate on my homeworkвҖҰ But I never do anythinвҖҷ like copying off answers from a classmate!
Helping out at my familyвҖҷs store makes the days go by so fast that it becomes August in no time, soвҖҰ Oh, actually, I remember making a yuruchara with the cardboard boxes we have at the shopвҖҰ
Why, I made my research project about ninjas, of course! My teacher praised me for it, saying it was thoroughly organized~вҷӘ
I would always work on my homework a little at a time each day after my morning radio exercises. I always felt refreshed thanks to the exercise, and it helped me progress through the homework by a lot!
ahh, mikejima would sometimes bring over [homework], yesвҖҰ i simply just watched, you know? AUTUMN: What would you do if you encountered a ghost? You might expect exorcism via use of paper slips from me, but I donвҖҷt have that ability. Well, I can chant sutras at least, though.
ItвҖҷd be best if we didnвҖҷt have to use our fists, but вҖ” if somethinвҖҷs about to attack, itвҖҷs up to us seniors to fight back, right?
If something were to attempt to harm anyone, IвҖҷd hack them down with my sword in an instant. Whatever happens, rest assured! I will win without fail.
IвҖҷll fight back with my karate to protect everyone! Ah, but are physical attacks even effective on ghosts in the first placeвҖҰ?
I feel like IвҖҷd panic and end up showing a really pathetic side of myselfвҖҰ Ahh, then again, if someone even more afraid than me was around, I think itвҖҷd actually make me feel calm instead?
Choosing not to fight against an unwinnable opponent is a praiseworthy strategy of its own. I would use a smoke screen with my ninpou, so as to make an escape away from the ghost!
Eeeek!? Ghost!? S-S-S-Sorry. This is the one topic I canвҖҷt for the life of me talk about, so let me pass on this one, pleaseвҖҰ!
like an [umibouzu]?4 i cannot swim, so i would be in trouble if i got pulled into the [water], wouldnвҖҷt i~ AUTUMN: WhatвҖҷs your favorite kind of ramen? If I had to choose, misoвҖ”вҖҰ Ah no, I like tan tan ramen5 as well. ItвҖҷs the perfect choice whenever you feel like eating something spicy.
I like abura soba6, itвҖҷs somethinвҖҷ thatвҖҷs nice and hearty, and it really hits the spot. Add a lilвҖҷ rice and toppings by the end of it and ya got a new flavor you can enjoy again.
I have a fondness for shoyu ramen. I found a good establishment in town, so I took AKATSUKI to eat there. It suited both of their tastes as well~вҷӘ
Instant noodles at night are the best! Heh, and I just recently mastered using the kettle, so IвҖҷm pretty good at making cup noodles!7
I guess I like ramen with lots of vegetables in it. Like cabbage, bean sproutsвҖҰ It gives the ramen a lot of substance, so it keeps me full.
The abura soba I ate with Tetora-kun and Midori-kun was delicious.6 And when I was almost done, I added rice onto the bowl and ate up the whole meal!
I was recently introduced to a ramen restaurant that uses seafood soup, soвҖҰ I always eat at that restaurant whenever IвҖҷm in the mood for ramen!
i am [not good] with hot things, so when there is [chilled chinese noodles] in the [cafeteriaвҖҷs menu], i go with that~
Oshi Calls Keito Hasumi
вҖңThis is Hasumi Keito from AKATSUKI. To put it bluntly, IвҖҷm wondering if youвҖҷll choose me as your вҖңoshiвҖқ.вҖқ вҖңEr, IвҖҷm sorry if I caught you off guard. If I hope to be chosen, I should probably talk more about my charm in my own words. Well thenвҖҰвҖқ вҖңAs AKATSUKIвҖҷs leader, I build up experience as an idol day by day. I work hard to make sure AKATSUKI evolves until everyone knows who we are as a unit.вҖқ вҖңAlsoвҖҰвҖҰ Well, itвҖҷd be a long story if I were to go on. IвҖҷll strive to give it my all, and let my work speak for itself. Keep your eyes on me, and see for yourself if IвҖҷm worthy of being your вҖңoshiвҖқ.вҖқ
Kuro Kiryu
вҖңYo, IвҖҷm Kiryu Kuro. I work as part of AKATSUKI.вҖқ вҖңI'm not really used to sellinвҖҷ myself, but this is a great opportunity. I gotta make sure you get to know a liвҖҷl bit about me.вҖқ вҖңThe thing I'm good at is sewinвҖҷ. I make costumes for AKATSUKI, but I also stitch up outfits for other people if they request it. So, well, guess you could say I'm good with my hands.вҖқ вҖңI dunno if if I did a good job showinвҖҷ off my good pointsвҖҰвҖҰ but if you choose to support me, I'll repay it in full. If itвҖҷs fine with you, come along with me.вҖқ
Souma Kanzaki
вҖңOhhh, it connected~вҷӘ I presume that you must be the вҖңaidoru fanвҖқ. I am Kanzaki Souma, ItвҖҷs a pleasure to meet you!вҖқ вҖңI am an вҖңaidoruвҖқ who is a member of the вҖңyunittoвҖқ AKATSUKI. As the descendant of a samurai clan, IвҖҷve a sword on one side and a mindfulness of вҖңtii-pii-oohвҖқ2 on the other!вҖқ вҖң...... To tell you the truth, IвҖҷm not sure I understand what being someoneвҖҷs вҖңoshiвҖқ really entails yet. However, I imagine itвҖҷs similar to a samuraiвҖҷs pledge of devotion to their lord.вҖқ вҖңIвҖҷll show you that IвҖҷm a splendid вҖңaidoruвҖқ worthy of your support. I hope that you will cheer for meвҖҰ.~вҷӘвҖқ
Tetora Nagumo
вҖңOssu, IвҖҷm Nagumo Tetora! IвҖҷm in STARMAKER PRODUCTIONвҖҷs RYUSEITAI!вҖқ "My hobby is doing workouts like weight-training, and my specialty is cooking the manliest food over an open flame. IвҖҷm always in the thick of it, working hard and growing in order to become a man among men~вҷӘ" вҖңNo matter what hardship knocks me down, IвҖҷll show you that I can stand right back up and overcome it all. ThatвҖҷs how I wanna move forward as an idol too, step by step!вҖқ вҖңIвҖҷll definitely become an idol so great, youвҖҷll be glad that you chose me, soвҖҰ I hope that you can support meвҖҰ!вҖқ
Midori Takamine
вҖңIвҖҷm Takamine Midori from RYUSEITAI. Umm, IвҖҷm not too sure what to talk about here, but IвҖҷll tryвҖҰвҖқ вҖңMy family runs a greengrocer business, and I help them out often. Because of that, I like vegetables quite a bitвҖҰ Ah, but the thing I love most is yuruchara~вҷӘвҖқ вҖңOn the other hand, I have a lot of things IвҖҷm not a fan ofвҖҰ Ah, but maybe I shouldnвҖҷt mention those right now. IвҖҷm sorry, I always get negative so easilyвҖҰвҖқ вҖңI havenвҖҷt shown much appeal at all, but IвҖҷll do as best as I can in my own way, soвҖҰ If itвҖҷs alright, IвҖҷd be happy to have your supportвҖҰвҷӘвҖқ
Shinobu Sengoku
вҖңIвҖҷm Sengoku Shinobu, a member of RYUSEITAI! IвҖҷm a вҖҳninjaвҖҷ, so I devote myself to training and discipline day after day.вҖқ вҖңItвҖҷs difficult to explain in a few words why I chose to be a ninja, butвҖҰ From a young age, I have always admired the ninjaвҖҷs way of life, and so I aspired to become one myself~вҷӘвҖқ вҖңNinjas may be ones who conceal themselves, but IвҖҷm not simply a ninja вҖ” IвҖҷm an idol as well! So I always put everything I have acquired in my ninja training to good use, even on stage!вҖқ вҖңIt would make me happy if you watched my acrobatic performances, and chose me as your вҖҳoshiвҖҷ~вҷӘвҖқ
Chiaki Morisawa
вҖңThe hero of justice, Morisawa ChiakiвҖ”! Has just made his arrival! вҖҰMhm, I got that pose down perfectly! вҳҶвҖқ вҖңAlongside my comrades in RYUSEITAI, I work hard in my activities every day, both as a hero and as an idol!вҖқ вҖңI want to make everyone smile, and that feeling is stronger and more passionate than anyone elseвҖҷs. I strive to always keep it that way. And the source of that burning passion is none other than the encouraging cheers of our fans!вҖқ вҖңThatвҖҷs why IвҖҷd like you to send me your support by calling for my name as loud as you can! IвҖҷm counting on you!вҖқ
Kanata Shinkai
вҖңhello~вҷӘ i am shinkai kanata from ryuseitai.вҖқ вҖңi love the ocean, so i often take walks on the [beach] and [bathe] in [water]. i also love [fishies]~вҷӘвҖқ
вҖқto give your life a plentiful amount of [replenishment] as well, i will deliver many [songs] to you.вҖқ
вҖңso i would love it if you would cheer for me. puka, pukaвҖҰвҷӘвҖқ
Thank You for Choosing Me Call Keito Hasumi
IвҖҷm grateful you chose me as your вҖңoshiвҖқ. Thank you. To repay that kindness, IвҖҷll aim for the top with more fervor than I have before. And I assure you that both I and Akatsuki will advance relentlessly. IвҖҷd like to become someone indispensable to you, too. From here on out as well, please lend me your support.
Kuro Kiryu
Outta all the idols out there, ya chose me, huh? Thanks. Well now, since youвҖҷve chosen me, I guess IвҖҷm gonna have to fire myself up even more for yer sake too~вҷӘ I might end up lookinвҖҷ tactless, вҖҳn completely put ya off... but if IвҖҷm gonna do this, IвҖҷll do it to the end, so IвҖҷll show ya I can live up to yer expectations. Watch over me, okay?
Souma Kanzaki
Me, having become your вҖңoshiвҖқ...! I feel quite proud of myselfвҖҰвҷӘ It is an вҖңaidoruвҖқвҖҷs honor to receive the support of their вҖңfansвҖқ. This Kanzaki Souma will strive to work harder and harder. From now on for years to come, I will show you the fruits of my labor!
Tetora Nagumo
Thank you so much for choosinвҖҷ to support me! IвҖҷm pumped to get this opportunity to receive your feelings! IвҖҷm still a novice, and a clumsy one at that, so itвҖҷs tough for me to grow all at onceвҖҰ But IвҖҷll keep moving forward step by step, and get closer to my dreams and ideals, even if itвҖҷs only liвҖҷl by liвҖҷl. IвҖҷll definitely show you that impressively grown version of me, you can count on that! So please keep watchinвҖҷ over me from now on, tooвҖҰ!
Midori Takamine
There are so many idols around here, but you still chose meвҖҰ Thank you so muchвҖҰвҷӘ I donвҖҷt know how much I can actually accomplish, butвҖҰ IвҖҷll try to do as much as IвҖҷm able to. So please support meвҖҰвҷӘ If someone told me to choose a single favorite yuruchara, I think I wouldвҖҷve struggled a lot, soвҖҰ Now that youвҖҷve chosen me, I want to make sure I answer those feelings of yours.
Shinobu Sengoku
Thank you for choosing me! Nihihi, it makes me blush a little~ I mostly talked about ninjas, so I am curious as to which you actually grew interested in: me, or ninjasвҖҰ But this simply means I must work harder and harder to ensure that you love both! I will continue to convey all those charms, so please do watch me from here on out, as wellвҖҰвҷӘ
Chiaki Morisawa
Thank you for choosing me as your вҖңoshiвҖқ! I can say with certainty that I received your passionate feelingsвҖҰвҳҶ I want to work even harder as both a hero and an idol, and be someone who can cheer anyone up. Being chosen as your вҖңoshiвҖқ reaffirmed that resolve of mine. IвҖҷll keep my heart burning and continue moving forward towards the future! Keep watching over my efforts from now on, too!
Kanata Shinkai
you chose me as your [oshi]? ufufu, that makes me very happy~вҷӘ i hope to [replenish] every day of your life with not only [smiles], but [song] and [dance] tooвҖ” those are my feelings, and soвҖҰ letвҖҷs continue to spend a wonderful time together from here on out, tooвҖҰ you and me~вҷӘ
вҶ‘ Radio calisthenics (гғ©гӮёгӮӘдҪ“ж“Қ lit., "radio exercises") are warm-up exercises performed to music and guidance from radio broadcasts.вҶ‘ This is TPO (time, place, and occasion): there is a time and place for everything. For Souma, that's about being mindful of social expectations before he pulls out his sword. Adonis explains it to him in Resurrection SundayвҶ‘ Chilled pineapple on a stick. It can look like this or this.вҶ‘ Umibouzu (жө·еқҠдё») is a mythical sea youkai that breaks ships or drowns sailors.вҶ‘ Tan tan ramen is a spicy ramen dish, based off of Chinese Dan Dan Noodles (Tan tan uses soup broth, while Dan Dan uses sauce).вҶ‘ Abura soba is a soupless ramen dish, made of oil and soba (buckwheat noodles).вҶ‘ Referencing Tetora's FS1 4* story Midnight Encounter. You can find it on the masterlist here

Opera жӯҢеҠҮ
Start Reading
AKATSUKI is putting on an opera. Little do they know, several other idols are eager to jump in and participate too! It's made Keito start to feel anxious already...
Season
Winter
Chapters
8
Writer

Characters

Translator's Comments
It's the way Chiaki volunteered to help and only gets a few lines during the actual opera. Kengeki no Mai is associated with this story.

Chapters Prologue
Opera 1 2 3 4 5 6
Epilogue
$(document).ready(function() { $('.preview-wrapper').remove();
Prologue
Season: Winter
Location: Garden Terrace
WhewвҖҰ To have a good cup of tea while looking at beautiful flowers in full bloom... It truly is the highest luxury. It's so rare to have such sunny, good weather on a winter day like this. I feel like I'm in good shape. Hehe, I can't help but want to singвҖҰвҖҰ (Cough, cough)
Eichi.... Why not enjoy the tea in moderation and go inside? Yumenosaki Academy is built on a hill facing the ocean. Being exposed to the sea breeze must be harsh on your body. Can you stand? If you can't, I'll give you a ride on my shoulders! Come now, please don't hesitate~вҳҶ
I wish youвҖҷd stop treating me like a child. I mean, I'm the same height as you. If you carry me on your shoulders, won't you collapse?
That might be so. If this were Himegimi, I could easily cuddle him in my arms, but carrying Eichi would likely be too difficult! Well, clowns make the impossible possible. There's nothing I can't do...вҳҶ
I think вҖңclownsвҖқ are meant to entertain people. Although in your case, Wataru, I think youвҖҷre more of a "magician" than a clown.
My selling point is my versatility! Please refer to me as both "clown" and "magicianвҖқ...вҷӘ
Good grief, I never get bored when I talk to you, Wataru. ItвҖҷs like having the fun of an amusement park in the palm of your hand~вҷӘ
Oh? Have you ever been to an amusement park, Eichi? Fufufu, theyвҖҷre like a wonderland...вҳҶ No matter how old they are, adults can forget time and have fun like the children they used to be. That is what makes them a wonderland.
Oh? I think you and amusement parks are a perfect match, actually. Isn't it easy to entertain children with your jack-of-all-trades talent?
Fufufu. You say delightful things, donвҖҷt you...вҳҶ Sometimes strict, sometimes sweet. I can only sing my praises of your ability to juggle the carrot and stick so adeptly! Perhaps thatвҖҷs why I can't leave His Majesty the EmperorвҖҷs side. Could it be that you even had the skills of a beast-tamer on hand in order to keep me in one place, Eichi?
Were you a beast? A clown, a magician, and a beast on top of that. IвҖҷm impressed. вҖҰ (Cough, cough)
Oops, forgive me. I had so much fun chatting with you that your health slipped my mind. Come, Eichi. Please put an end to your happy dream and come back to reality...вҳҶ
IвҖҷd rather you donвҖҷt treat me like IвҖҷm sick, butвҖҰ (cough, cough)... I really haven't been able to stop coughing for a while now. I'm going to go inside and warm up. вҖҰвҖҰвҖҰвҖҰ
WhatвҖҷs wrong, Eichi?
Mm, that person over there is Anzu-chan. She doesnвҖҷt seem to be feeling well. Maybe something happened?
Fufufu. Even though youвҖҷre the Emperor, you're still human. Or are you sweet on Anzu-san because sheвҖҷs close to you?
She did break down this school and rebuild it, after all. Well, I can't say it's a complete job, but sheвҖҷs still coming along well. Is it that strange that such a presence weighs on my mind?
No. Anzu-san is also the person who made love bloom in the unfeeling, dull Hokuto-kun. Even if itвҖҷs not to the extent as His Majesty the Emperor, Anzu-san intrigues me tooвҖҰвҷӘ
Anzu-chanвҖҷs also liked by an unexpected person now, hm? Is that another one of her talents? In any case, we don't have the option of just leaving it be. Anzu-chan, would you like to come over here and have some tea with us? вҖҰHmm, I guess she didn't hear me. At this rate, sheвҖҷll just keep on her path.
In that case, I'll stop her in her tracks! Just watch! Un, deux, trois...вҳҶ
My, what a clever idea to put roses out on the path to stop her. ItвҖҷs because you can produce that many roses in an instant that I canвҖҷt help but think you can even use magic~вҷӘ
ItвҖҷs the highest honor to receive such praise! Come, Anzu-san. Can you see me? You do now, good! Would you like some nice, warm tea? It's a hot drink that will fill you up and stave away the cold. вҖҰ You bought tea from a vending machine? But the weather is so cold, it sinks into your bones. There'd be nothing worse to have than cold tea. We have hot tea and scones laid out here~вҷӘ Oh? The scones got a reaction out of you. Anzu-san, do you like clotted cream? If so, let's add cream! Do you like jam? Then letвҖҷs add some jam, too! Fufufu. It'll be a little tea party in no time! Come now, eat up~вҳҶ
Oh dear, my job was taken away from me. Well, the tea that Wataru brews is quite delicious, so it's okay. Whew... It's so tasty it envelops all your senses. IвҖҷd like him to join the вҖңTea ClubвҖқ with talent like that.
Though IвҖҷm known to be versatile, I can't split myself to be in many places at once. Although, I suppose it's not impossible if you master it. If it came down to it, IвҖҷd just have to set up a body double...вҳҶ
I can never tell how serious you are. Oh, I'm sorry, Anzu-chan. Even though I forced you to stop, itвҖҷs just me and Wataru speaking. That must be dull. It looked like you were troubled about something, so I stopped you to speak with you. Heheh, are you holding back, by any chance? I heard that you asked Kiryu-kun from AKATSUKI to give you pointers on how to make costumes. IвҖҷm not saying to treat me like IвҖҷm Kiryu-kun, but I'd be happy if you could open your heart to me a little, as well. Thank you, Anzu-chan. Well then, could you tell me right away...?
Opera Chapter 1
Season: Winter
Location: Garden Terrace
Hmm. Keito approved of your skills at Quarrel Festival1, and entrusted you with the planning and management of an upcoming S2 event. Even so, that KeitoвҖҰ Heheh, why are you shrinking away? Are you feeling self-conscious about Keito since he was so hard on you during Quarrel Festival? Am I wrong? If so, you should take it in stride. It means Keito recognizes your talent as a producer. Otherwise, he wouldnвҖҷt give you another project, even if it was an S2.
As expected of my fated rivalвҖҰвҳҶ The fact that he has his eyes on you speaks to his discerning eye! Quarrel Festival was so exciting, I couldn't believe it was B1. If youвҖҷre the one producing the event this time too, students from all over school will come to see it...вҳҶ
If it were an S1, we could invite guests from outside the school. However, S2s вҖ“ held once a month вҖ“ canвҖҷt be expected to be as large as S1s. Still, since it's an official Dream Festival, it will be reflected in your grades, and it will also affect your activity funds. Oops, I didn't mean to put pressure on you, Anzu-chan. I suppose I was being careless with my words. At any rate, it's not bad to have Keito rely on you. It's actually a good trend. You've been planning and managing S1s up to now, so I think you'll do well this time, too. DonвҖҷt worry, you have talent. IвҖҷd like you to believe in yourself.
Fufufu, what a heartwarming sight...вҳҶ But itвҖҷs time for me to ignore the atmosphere and cut in! Even if IвҖҷm left alone, I'll do whatever it takes to wiggle my way back in...вҳҶ
ItвҖҷs just like you to go out of your way to state your intentions, Wataru. In any case, I have something to discuss with you.
Oh? About what? If His Majesty the Emperor asks for it, I would even go to the other side of the world~вҳҶ
It's not as big of a request as that. ItвҖҷs about Anzu-chan. It seems she still has such a long face. I'm wondering if there's something else that's troubling her.
If so, you simply need to ask her directly! Anzu-san, are you perhapsвҖҰ troubled with something? Oh, you're restless. It seems itвҖҷs something to do with what's in your bag. Perhaps thereвҖҷs materials concerning AKATSUKI in it? Fufufu, your eyes keep darting around. Anzu-sanвҖҷs trouble is that she was asked to produce AKATSUKI, butвҖҰ YouвҖҷre thinking, вҖңI donвҖҷt know what kind of performance I should do!вҖқ вҖ” is that what it is? Oops, are you alright? I didnвҖҷt expect you to be surprised enough to nearly fall out of your chair...вҳҶ
WhatвҖҷs with these leading questions? IвҖҷm impressed you were able to figure out her troubles through those hints alone.
If you have love, you can understand most things...вҳҶ Nevertheless, a performance, is it? If you're looking for a program thatвҖҷs typical of AKATSUKI, how about an opera? Maybe taking place around the latter half of the Meiji Era?2
Hehehe. She's clapping her hands with joy. Hm? If possible, youвҖҷd like to receive some acting guidance, too? It's none other than Anzu-chan's request. Of course, IвҖҷll listen... (Cough, cough)
Don't push yourself too hard, Eichi. Although drinking tea warmed us up, itвҖҷs still this cold. We had so much fun chatting that we ended up prolonging this peculiar tea party, but it's about time we wake up from our dream. Neither Eichi nor I can be acting instructors, but let's support Anzu-san as much as we can...вҳҶ For example, maybe we could do something likeвҖҰ participate in the program Anzu-san comes up with? Fufufu, the role you want us to play has already been decided, hm? Truly splendid!
The role of a houseboy?3 Mm. If that's the plan, even if I'm not in good shape, I'll be able to perform until the endвҖҰ~вҷӘ
Am I the role of a Tsujigiri?4 ItвҖҷs typically hard for me to get an opportunity to play the role of a villain like this. More than anything, it seems fun, so of course I'll accept...вҳҶ
Keito and I fought with all that we had at Quarrel Festival, but this time it'll be different. I'm really looking forward to seeing what kind of drama it will be...вҷӘ
Location: Dojo
Ossu!5 Nagumo Tetora, coming in!
вҖҰвҖҰвҖҰвҖҰ
Taishou!6 Nagumo Tetora, IвҖҷve come in!!
вҖҰвҖҰвҖҰвҖҰ
Uwaaa, please donвҖҷt ignore me! ItвҖҷs Nagumo Tetora, Taishou~?!
HuhвҖҰ? Ahh, Tetsu. Stop your stompinвҖҷ and cвҖҷmere. I need to check this costume size.
Ossu! IвҖҷll do whatever you ask, Taichou! Er, like this?
вҖҰ ThereвҖҷs a little extra sleeve here. Tetsu, have you gotten shorter?
Ehh, are you serious!? But, when I took my measurements the other day, my height didnвҖҷt changeвҖҰ?
Tch. This is Kanzaki's costume. I mixed it up by accident since the colors were similar. This is your costume.
Oooh, it's TaishouвҖҷs new work! The costumes are super cool too!!
Thanks, Tetsu. HearinвҖҷ that makes me wanna make more. Well, allвҖҷs left to do is finish this thingвҖҰвҖ”
U-... Ummm~ Taishou?
What? I'm tryinвҖҷ to figure this out, so couldja leave it for later?
No, but itвҖҷll be a problem if you drown in your passion for sewing forever! This is a dojo, a place to practice, Taishou~?
It's so noisy in the classroom that I can't really concentrate on sewing. Here, it's quiet. You should mind your manners at the dojo, too. YouвҖҷre restless when I take my eyes off you, so it's a pain to put together your costume.
But I don't think you should sew at the dojo in the first place!? Taishou~, youвҖҷre the captain of the karate club, not the handicraft club. It's great that you like sewing, but when youвҖҷre in the dojo, IвҖҷd like you to do karate instead!
Tetsu... That's right. You're right.
TaishouвҖҰ!
I can hang out with you as soon as I put the finishing touches on this costume, so just wait a little longer.
A-... Alright~? It's true that it sucks to leave things unfinished. Ossu, Nagumo Tetora: I'll wait as long as you need! ...Oh, Anzu-anego? Hee~eey! Are you here to watch us practice? Ah, youвҖҷve got business with Taishou, huh? But right now he can't take his hands off sewing, so please wait вҖҳtil heвҖҷs done~
Opera Chapter 2
Location: Dojo
Oh yeah, do you have something to talk about with Taishou, Anzu-anego? Hmhm. The leader of AKATSUKI asked you to plan and manage an S2, huh? As expected of Anego! The fact that Hasumi-senpai gives you the time of day, itвҖҷs so respectable~вҷӘ So, what kinda performance is it gonna be? Er, is it a bad idea for a RYUSEITAI member to ask this...? You decided on the theme of the program after asking your seniors at fine, so you don't mind...? IвҖҷm happy to hear it! Hmhm. An opera taking place around the latter half of the Meiji era. That's such a typical act for AKATSUKI, IвҖҷm pumped~вҷӘ Huh, why do you look troubled? Did I say something weird...? It was good that you decided on a performance, but then you realized there weren't enough people and panicked. Anzu-anegoвҖҷs so scatterbrained~ Ah, I didn't mean to make fun of you. TaishouвҖҷs been absentminded like that too, so I felt a sense of familiarity!
вҖҰ Did you call for me, Tetsu?
Ah, Taishou. You finished sewing. Thanks for your hard work~вҷӘ
Sorry for making you wait. Well then, let's practiceвҖ”... LilвҖҷ Miss?
Seems like she had something for you to do, Taishou. Since you were concentrating on sewing, I told Anego to wait вҖҳtil you finished.
Looks like IвҖҷve caused trouble to both Tetsu and lilвҖҷ miss. So, Miss. What am I takinвҖҷ care of for you? Ah. You decided on the program for the S2 Hasumi asked you for, so you came to let me know. Then, have you told Hasumi yet? Is that right? I guess you thought youвҖҷd tell me and then let him know, but maybe youвҖҷre telling the wrong person first...? Hmm. Since IвҖҷve been helpinвҖҷ you out with costume-making and physical training, my face was the first thing that popped into your head? Haha. YouвҖҷre really good at flattery, huh. Good grief, IвҖҷm no match for her at all...вҷӘ
Oh, Taishou is smiling like he would at his little sister! This is super valuable~! Click click~вҳҶ Hey, Tetsu. Using smartphones in the dojo is prohibited. Do you want me to confiscate it?
O-Ossu! I'll be mindful next time! So please donвҖҷt take it from me~!!
You donвҖҷt need to apologize with a dogeza on top of that... CвҖҷmon, Tetsu. I'm not angry anymore, so lift your head.
Uuu, Taishou is kind. I think I might fall in love with that kindness~вҷӘ
ErrrвҖҰ what were we talking about?
So fast! You forgot so fast, Taishou!?7
Uhhhh... Ah, I remembered. It was about the S2. An opera is a performance typical for AKATSUKI, and I think Hasumi would approve of it. I was just trying to make military uniforms. Since AKATSUKI is a Japanese-style unit, I didnвҖҷt think weвҖҷd get to wear something that isnвҖҷt a kimono. Looks like weвҖҷll get to use вҖҳem now.
вҖҰвҖҰвҖҰвҖҰ
Why do you keep glancing around, Tetsu? Do you needta piss?
No! Taishou, have you no sense of delicacy!?
Haha, sorry. Yeah, LilвҖҷ Miss is here, too. There's no way you can mention needing the toilet in front of the girl you admire.
Th-That's not what I meant! I mean, yeah, Anzu-anego is my aspirationвҖҰ? But, but! That's not what I wanna say right nowвҖҰ?
ItвҖҷs not manly to be so restless like that. If you got somethinвҖҷ to say, just say it.
O-Ossu!! (Breathe in, breathe out)... Anzu-anego, I wanna be in the opera, too...!! вҖҰ You see, just before Anego transferred hereвҖҰ I wanted to join AKATSUKI, but I failed the exam. Even now, I get frustrated when I think back on that time. But then, I was invited by Taichou to join RYUSEITAI... And at first, I was reluctant to participate properly, but... IвҖҷm really grateful to be a member of RYUSEITAI now, from the very bottom of my heart. So, IвҖҷve got no complaints there. But somewhere in my heart is the longing to work with Taishou, again. I still haven't become as manly as Taishou, but I'd like to study him up close on stage. That's why when I heard what Anego was saying, I figured this was my only chance. If I miss this, there might not be another one. Please, Anego. Please let me be in the opera...!!
Can I ask you for that favor, too?
T-TaishouвҖҰ?
Tetsu may be rough around the edges, but he has the qualities of an idol. More than anything, he and I are compatible. It might be an irregular case, but if the members aren't decided yet, I'd be glad if you could get Tetsu in the mix. Ahh, thanks. But man, you accepted that favor so easily. I thought you'd have more to say...? YouвҖҷre grateful for Tetsu's offer since you didn't have enough people to begin with? His roleвҖҰ ... that's right. With Tetsu's personality, itвҖҷd be tough for him to play the role of Tsujigiri. Wouldn't a night watchman be more suitable for him? The role of Tsujigiri is... Hibiki? I'm sure he can deal with multiple people without issue, but itвҖҷd be good to have at least one more person if we can. I'll try to find a few people, but could you give it some thought, too, lilвҖҷ Miss?
Pardon me...!!
Challenging the dojo is a feat of courageвҖҰвҖ“8 er, isn't that Morisawa? Don't enter in a misleading way.
Ha ha ha, sorry~вҳҶ Anyway, is Nagumo here?
TaichouвҖҷs always causing trouble, isn't he?
Ohh, Nagumo, have you been well? Today, I'm shining with the brilliance of the sun in the sky again, fwahahahaha...вҳҶ
Mnn, I don't want people to think we're acquaintances... So, Taichou. Please tell me what you want without laughing so loud.
Mm. NagumoвҖҰвҖ“ no, Ryusei Black! Do you know what day it is? That's right, it's the day for RYUSEITAIвҖҷs activities...вҳҶ
Huh? Isn't that tomorrow?
Oops, I shouldвҖҷve realized that, huh? That was careless of me. But, itвҖҷs too late now, IвҖҷve already come to pick you up!
Ehh~? I wanna do karate practice with Taishou. Plus, I wanna talk to Anego about the opera, too.
Anego...? Ohh, AnzuвҖҷs with you, huh? Well arenвҖҷt you a smooth guy, you~вҷӘ
Uuu. TaishouвҖҷs attitude didnвҖҷt annoy me before, but itвҖҷs kinda irritating when itвҖҷs Taichou...
Hmm, is this also a matter of difference in core nature?9 Well, alright. What was this about an opera? Could you fill me in on it, too? Depending on the details, I might as well join in too, fwahahaha~вҳҶ
