TheyвҖҷre trying to catch him off guard for an attack, but heвҖҷs parrying successfully.) (Morisawa also has capabilities, but his hands seem to be full backing up Nagumo and Kanzaki.) (As for Kiryu, heвҖҷs facing off against Tsukinaga on his own, so this is a four-man operation all to pin down Hibiki on his ownвҖҰ)
(Just as I thought, IвҖҷve got no choice but to rework my strategy.) Nagumo, on my sign, flank Hibiki from behind. Kanzaki, you too. Join Nagumo. Morisawa, watch the scene, play it by ear, and move in when the timeвҖҷs right. (Up until now, weвҖҷve been scattered in trying to take on Hibiki, so we managed to make an opening.) (If it were just some random person, IвҖҷd have been able to defeat him just like that, but itвҖҷs Hibiki Wataru of the Three Eccentrics.) (Given the circumstances, even with Morisawa, we canвҖҷt defeat Hibiki.)
"You look like you're planning something! Splendid! Just what IвҖҷd expect from my lifetime rival......вҳҶвҖқ
"I feel like IвҖҷve said this many times before, but I donвҖҷt remember ever becoming your rival.вҖқ
"Fufufu, so humble! If you would, please donвҖҷt fail my expectations. Night watchmen......вҳҶ"
(He really prattles on a lot. Nevertheless, IвҖҷll make sure he regrets that behavior backfiring on him.) (Nagumo, nowвҖҰ!)
вҖңNagumo Tetora, on the move! UUOOOOHHHвҖҰ!!вҖқ
вҖңDivine punishmentвҖҰ!вҖқ
вҖңOops, a surprise attack from behind is very clever. ButвҖ”вҖқ
вҖңHA-HA-HA, IвҖҷve blocked your way out! Prepare yourself for the confines of justiceвҖҰвҖҰвҳҶвҖқ
вҖңYou heard him. I wonвҖҷt let you get away, Hibiki.вҖқ
вҖңWell, itвҖҷs four against one. If you coordinate like that, thereвҖҷs nothing I can do to escape.вҖқ вҖңVery well then. IвҖҷll come quietlyвҖҰвҷӘвҖқ
Looks like it's all settled over there. As long as those guys join forces, even someone like you wonвҖҷt be able to handle it. WeвҖҷre wrapping up the swordplay. After the break, the main event is the live performance. Let's hurry up and get ready.
I see, I see. ThatвҖҷs too bad, I wanted to play a little longer~
I feel the same as Tsukinaga-kun. ItвҖҷs so much fun that I canвҖҷt help but laugh. (Cough, cough)
That's not laughter, that's a cough. Maybe your health got worse after Tsukinaga swung you around so much?
That might be it, huh? It was fun, like a roller coaster, but I think I reached my physical limit first. Thanks for entertaining me, Tsukinaga-kun......вҷӘ
I didn't mean to entertain the Emperor, though. Oh well, itвҖҷs fine. I had fun, too! The audience and Anzu were all happy! I could write a masterpiece based on that fact alone! This is what makes life so interesting~вҳҶ Even when the curtain falls, IвҖҷll keep singing and dancing, because IвҖҷm the Naked King, wahahahaha~вҳҶ15 Epilogue
Location: Opera Stage
Kuro, Keito, Anzu, thanks for your hard work~вҳҶ
Just what are you thanking us for? Even though the curtain went down, you made such a clamor that we had to take the stage for an encore. And at the end of it, you invited Anzu to come and stand on stage too. It was unprecedented!
вҖҳCause AnzuвҖҷs one of us. It's not good to be left out, right~?
вҖҰ YouвҖҷre hopeless. YouвҖҷre the same now as you were in the past. Oh, yeah. I remember what I was going to tell you ...... Hey, why are you shrinking back?
ItвҖҷs вҖҳcuz KeitoвҖҷs sermons are long. And even Anzu looks traumatized from a lecture you gave her, yeah?
M-Mm. Is this aboutвҖҰ Quarrel Festival? But that initial proposal was really awful. It was so terrible it made me dizzy.
Hasumi, leave it at that. Lil MissвҖҷs so shocked that she's dissociating.
S-Sorry. I didn't mean to harp on about something thatвҖҷs done and gone. At any rate, it's true that that one incident gave me an appreciation for Anzu. There are only a few people who can get back on their feet from one of my lectures. I was nervous about what would happen with Tsukinaga participating in the opera, but the audience was very receptive to it. I look forward to working with you from now on as well, "Producer".
Oh, even Keito can make a gentle face, a new discovery. ......вҳҶ While I was away, the "Emperor" was defeated, and a revolution happened. Yumenosaki Academy is too interesting...вҳҶ. Aaaaaah, I think I can write a magnificent song now! I have to write down my inspiration before I forget!
Don't scribble magic pen on the floor and walls. You tried to doodle on the floors of the archery grounds beforeвҖ” вҖҰвҖҰвҖҰвҖҰ
Hmmm, is something on my face? Did I accidentally get magic marker on it?
Ohh, I remember, I remember very clearly. That damned memoryвҖҰ
That was a complete about-face from gentle to demonic!?16 You're so interesting, I love you вҳҶ
I hate you. HehвҖҰ Heheh, hehehвҖҰ Thanks to all your scribbling on the floor and walls of the archery hall, I spent the whole night trying to erase it. I was going to tell you to turn up to club activities, but I take it back. Tsukinaga Leo, you are to never step over the threshold of the archery hall again.
OK, got it~вҷӘ
WhвҖ“...... you agreed just like that? ShouldnвҖҷt you be more worried or regretful or something!?
Mm~ Well, I'm a ghost member17. I'd rather teach Anzu how to write songs, anyways. It won't be long before I graduate, so I have to get Anzu to full operation by then, yeah~? WouldnвҖҷt it be sad to see all that effort I put into teaching her go to waste? I mean, it's a world-wide loss to have my valuable spare time squandered on something that's pointless! That's why I don't have time to show up for club activities. Sorry, Keito.
Hmph. I'm the one who kicked you out, so itвҖҷs not like you have to apologize.
KeitoвҖҷs such a tsundere! Ahh, I just casually used slang~!? So stupid of me! IвҖҷm a genius but an idiot, too!! Well, itвҖҷs fine. ThatвҖҷs what I plan to do, so you'd better work harder with what little time we have left, okay~? Knights are invincible with the weapons I provide, but you should at least be able to offer a piece of advice to the others when theyвҖҷre in a tight spot. Don't forget that the line and staff are a key balance in war. Now I know that they took great care of the Knights while I was gone.
Lil MissвҖҷs a hardworking girl, yвҖҷknow. ThereвҖҷs no complaints to make about her costume-making skills, and I can't wait to see how good of a tailor sheвҖҷll be by the time I graduate. Whoa, don't look so sad. IвҖҷm bad with gloomy moodsвҖҰ Well, it's not like we're graduating anytime soon. There are still a lotta things I wanna teach Tetsu, anyway.
ThereвҖҷs a reason Kiryu praises him; Nagumo has a lot of room for growth. His impulsiveness is a weak point, but I think heвҖҷs a good and honest junior.
Yeah. HeвҖҷs a junior thatвҖҷs way too good for me...вҷӘ But itвҖҷs only at times like these that Tetsu's not around, huh... If Tetsu heard that line, I think heвҖҷd have cried with joy. вҖҳCause he looked real depressed when he failed HasumiвҖҷs exam.
But as a result of that, Nagumo is where he is today. His place of belonging wasnвҖҷt with AKATSUKI, but with RYUSEITAI. That's how it is, isn't it?
How hopeless, Hasumi-no-danna really just isn't an honest guy, huh. вҖңTsundereвҖқ, was it? Maybe thatвҖҷs not so wrong after allвҖҰвҷӘ
Translation Notes вҶ‘ From the story Quarrel Festival. This will come up a lot.вҶ‘ The Meiji Era (жҳҺжІ»жҷӮд»Ј) (1868-1912) is the backdrop for Opera, marked by major political, economic and social change, rapid modernization, industrialization and Westernization in Japan.вҶ‘ During the Meiji Era, houseboys were aspiring-students who lived in hosts' homes as they traveled to cities to study.вҶ‘ Tsujigiri (иҫ»ж–¬гӮҠ or иҫ»ж–¬, lit. "crossroads killing") was a samurai-practice where samurai test a new sword's effectiveness by attacking (usually defenseless) passersby. In this story, they use Tsujigiri as a noun.вҶ‘ Among other things, an affirmative and greeting Tetora usesвҶ‘ Tetora refers to Kuro as еӨ§е°Ҷ (taishou, lit. high-ranking general ), or boss. Not to be confused with Chiaki's йҡҠй•· (taichou).вҶ‘ There's a similar line in Tough Guy about Kuro's forgetfulness. Cute!вҶ‘ йҒ“е ҙз ҙгӮҠ (dojoyaburi, lit. dojo storming ). In martial arts, this is when someone visits rival martial arts schools and challenges its members to assert dominance over whose technique is better. If the dojo lost, its apprentices would abandon it for the winner's school. Read more here.вҶ‘ We tried our best. He used дәәеҫі (lit. natural virtue) here. He's trying to get at the fact there's something fundamentally different about him and Kuro that's ultimately out of his control.вҶ‘ Souma says the same thing in Scroll of the Elements. We love callbacks!вҶ‘ Souma's running gag is regularly resorting to performing seppuku to make up for trouble. еҲҮи…№ (seppuku or harakiri, lit. belly-cutting ) was a form of ritualistic suicide samurai used for a variety of reasons. For Souma, that tends to be shame.вҶ‘ This is actually an Ensemble Girls reference.вҶ‘ "Hasumin fairies" on Google found this manga about a boy named Ian Hasumi who can see fairies. Do with that as you will.вҶ‘ Kuro often refers to Keito as ж—ҰйӮЈ (danna, lit. master), or "boss". Hasumi-no-danna is a variation of this.вҶ‘ A reference to the Emperor's New Clothes.вҶ‘ He references a Hannya (иҲ¬иӢҘ) mask, specifically. It's from Noh theatre.вҶ‘ е№ҪйңҠйғЁе“Ў (yuurei buin, lit. ghost members). It's someone who's a member of a club on paper, but otherwise just doesn't show up or participate in club activities.

entry.title: Samurais & Ninjas
entry.content:
Characters
Writer
Akira
Translation
citrinesea
Proofreading
310mc
Season: Spring
Location: Garden Terrace
Hello, Transfer Student-dono1. WeвҖҷve been seeing a lot of each other at вҖңGaaden TerasuвҖқ as of late, huh? Are you also having lunch? Mm, food and health are inextricably linked. I want you to eat a lot, get healthy, and produce us idols relentlesslyвҖҰвҷӘ As usual, IвҖҷm putting on the act as a chef. If youвҖҷd like, let me serve you some homemade food. Also, I had so much fun chopping up the ingredients that I ended up preparing a lot of them...вҷӘ Hm, that's what you intended? Because you want to save food costs? Hm, then thereвҖҷs no need for my concern. Transfer Student-dono is such a strong woman!
Splendid, bravo~вҷӘ If you're happy with my cooking, IвҖҷd like you to eat it to your heart's content. May it become a source of energy for you! Do you mind if I join you? ItвҖҷs more pleasant to eat with a group~вҷӘ Mm. Excuse meвҖҰ Hold on a moment. This is too much for one person to eat, but not enough for two people. LetвҖҷs finish cooking a little bit more. Do you have any вҖңreku-estsвҖқ? IвҖҷm getting tired of always eating seafood. I have some premium meat that Adonis-dono gave me, so maybe IвҖҷll have that for tвҖ”вҖҰ Huh? вҖ” A scoundrel!
Eyaaa?! Wh-WhвҖ“ Why did a table get cut to pieces in front of me?!
I-IвҖ“ I'm definitely not a suspicious person! If you could just spare me my lifeвҖҰ?!
Hm, who are you? What do you intend to do by sneaking around on the floor, you dodgy fellow? Are you a thief? You lawless cad! For the sake of "Gaaden Terasu", this Kanzaki Souma will inflict punishment upon you!
W-Wait a second! Why is this person wielding a Japanese sword as if itвҖҷs normal? This is a violation of the Firearms and Swords Act2!
Hmm, you are... I believe you are Sengoku from the Ninja Association. You. Are you acting suspicious again? Good grief, itвҖҷs a complete nuisance. For some reason, people seem to think youвҖҷre close friends with me.
Huh, why? I'm the type of ninja who doesn't have many close friends, thoughвҖҰ But itвҖҷs not that I can't make friends because IвҖҷm shy! Ninjas are like shadows, destined to live by erasing all traces of their very presence...!
Hmm. IвҖҷm samurai-like. YouвҖҷre ninja-like. The public seems to think that samurai and ninja are birds of a feather.
Ehh!? Ninjas and samurai are completely different! But there were some ninjas who became feudal lords, so I guess it depends on the character of the region? And um, Kanzaki-dono is more of a вҖңswordsmanвҖқ than a вҖңsamuraiвҖқ, right?
Well, I'm not interested in the distinction. However, the problem is that you and I are considered to be compatriots. Whenever you do something strange, I get frowned upon, too. ItвҖҷs better to live a more straightforward life, more pure and honest. If you live right, instead of crawling around on the floor like that, you'll be able to face the sun with pride.
F-For some reason, I'm being scolded... Uu~? But I canвҖҷt relax in bright places, yвҖҷknow~вҖҰ? вҖҰ What on earth have you been doing since a while ago? You can eat while sitting on a chair. Ninjas seem like theyвҖҷre completely unfamiliar with etiquette. If you're hungry, I'll share some of my food with you.
Yaaay, I've graduated from eating by myself~! Ah, Transfer Student-dono was here too! I wonder if I've interrupted your date...?
WeвҖҷre simply вҖңkurasumeitoвҖқ. We just so happened to share a table today. Now thatвҖҷs enough, it's time to eat. It's said that nausea dwells in an empty stomach.
Thank you, thank you...! I was running out of food allowance this month. Honestly, I was in trouble. Also, here in Garden Terrace... I was doing a little fly-catching.
Well, now that I see it closely, itвҖҷs flypaper! YouвҖ” Don't show those things while weвҖҷre eating! ItвҖҷs unsanitary, I'll lose my appetite! Are you going to eat it? Do you eat flies? As I thought, I can't understand ninjas...!
Hey, please don't draw your sword?! IвҖҷm not going to eat them~! These flies are meant to be frog food.
Fr-Frogs? Are you raising them as pets?
TheyвҖҷre more like friends than pets to raise~ Ninjas use dogs, birds, frogs, and the like. But dogs bite, and birds nip with their beaks, so frogs are the best ones to get along with. However, they're bigger eaters than they look. The cost of food is ridiculous, so thatвҖҷs why I catch flies myself, if that makes sense...?
I-I see. ThatвҖҷs why you set foot for вҖңGaaden TerasuвҖқ. Certainly, those types of insects tend to gather in the dining hall.
ThatвҖҷs right~ Oops, found another fly! I'll capture it~вҳҶ
Don't mess around while youвҖҷre eating! Have you no manners!
Forgive me a million times over, but I'm seriously in trouble. I can't let my frogs go hungry... I'm starving because I'm cutting back on my own food expenses. Ninjas and samurai alike cannot fight if they are hungry. So please give me your patienceвҖ” hm hm! There are flies again~вҳҶ
Hey, that's annoying! Besides, flies have compound eyes. They have excellent dynamic vision, so you can't catch them with movements like that! Watch! En gardeвҖ“!3
Ooh, you caught a fly with chopsticks! ThatвҖҷs amazing...вҳҶ
Hehe. I don't try to pretend IвҖҷm as skilled as the ancient swordsman Miyamoto Musashi, but... for a well-trained martial artist, a target such as this is a breeze before breakfast. Ha! Take that! And that4!
Wow, thatвҖҷs amazing! I want you to catch more, and I want you to teach me how to do it, too~вҷӘ
Heh, I don't hate being praised. But my training will be severe, you know.
Bring it on! Enduring all hardships is what makes a ninjaвҖ”... Ow?!
Ogh?! Wh-Why are you hitting us, Transfer Student-dono! Huh, вҖңDon't fool around while eatingвҖқ...? That's right, this ninja managed to get me carried away!
Is it my fault?! But well, I certainly don't think it would be a good idea to play with flies while we eat! Forgive me, Transfer Student-dono!
Hehe. Sengoku, you also call Transfer Student-dono "Transfer Student-dono", huh? It gives off the impression that we are samurai and ninja who serve the same master, so what say you and I get along better from now on?
I'm so happy! Yaaay, I've made a new friend... вҷӘ Transfer Student-dono brought us together! IвҖҷm so thankful, I should call you вҖңLord"5 instead of вҖңTransfer Student-donoвҖқ! You are our master, Lord!
Lord, why have you stopped eating? Come come, eat as much as you likeпҪһвҷӘ
LordпҪһвҷӘ
LordпҪһвҳҶ
...Ow?! You hit me again! I suppose youвҖҷd rather be called вҖңPrincessвҖқ instead of вҖңLordвҖқ?
Hmm, a girl's heart is complicated... Sengoku, if you're having trouble finding food for your frogs, come to the Marine Life Club room later. We may have some food stocked up, so I'll lend you a little.
Uwaa, that'd save me trouble! But it's cool to catch flies with chopsticks too. I'd be happy if you could teach me how to do it later~вҷӘ Ehehe, I had a really fun lunchtime today! I am terribly grateful~вҷӘ
Translation Notes вҶ‘ -ж®ҝ (-dono) is an honorific that roughly means "lord" or "master". It's archaic, which gives Souma and Shinobu an old-timey feel.вҶ‘ Very strict regulations on the possession and use of firearms and swords in Japan.вҶ‘ гҒЎгҒҮгҒҷгҒЁ is an exclamation. Souma says it a lot when he lunges with his sword.вҶ‘ "гҒЁгӮҠгӮғпјҒгҒӣгҒ„гӮ„!" are more exclamations from martial arts like judo. They can be used when throwing something/someone heavy, or intimidating the opponent.вҶ‘ They're using ж®ҝ (dono) by itself here.

entry.title: 9th Anniversary Log-In | Keito and Kanata
TV Anime Broadcast Countdown
entry.content:
Characters
Special Thanks to
Enstars Wiki Team
Translation
citrinesea, 310mc
Proofreading
310mc, citrinesea
Originally translated for the TV Anime Broadcast Countdown page on the ES Wiki Kanata Shinkai
the blue flame is the mark of mystery! i have come from the blue sea~вҷӘ ryusei blue! kanata shinkaiвҖҰвҳҶ (sparkle) ehehe, i tried introducing [myself]. i perform as part of the [unit] ryuseitai, alongside chiaki and the other members~вҷӘ
the [weather] is very nice today, which makes it the ideal weather for a [soak]вҖҰвҷӘ i really love [water] and [fishies]. eating [fishies] is delicious, too. i also love [soy sauce]. having it on a platter of [sashimi] is simply the best~вҷӘ itвҖҷs about time to feed the [fishies] in the [clubroom]. puka, pukaвҖҰвҷӘ
Keito Hasumi
IвҖҷm Keito Hasumi. Alongside Kiryu and Kanzaki, I perform as part of AKATSUKI, a Japanese-style unit that honors traditional performance. I juggle that with my responsibilities as vice president of the student council as well. Apart from having lunch, I usually patrol the school during lunch break too, but today I was able to take my time eating. IвҖҷm very fond of spicy food, but the mapo eggplant at the cafeteria isn't spicy enough, so IвҖҷm always left feeling unsatisfied. Well, I have student council work to attend to soon, so youвҖҷll have to excuse me. I think Eichi just abandoned his duties and is loafing around elsewhereвҖҰ Having a troublesome childhood friend just exhausts me with worryвҖҰ Honestly, how incorrigible.
Chiaki Morisawa
I'm the burning heart Chiaki Morisawa! IвҖҷm Yumenosaki AcademyвҖҷs ally of justice, RYUSEITAIвҖҷs leader, and captain of the basketball club all rolled into one! Today, during lunch break, I got to invite Sagami-sensei to RYUSEITAIвҖҷs lessons, and it was even more fruitful than usual! Since Basketball Club activities happen after classes, I was thinking of inviting the other members out after practice! I thought Akehoshi, Isara, Takamine and I could get my favorite: french fries. ThereвҖҷs no one out there that hates something as yummy as fries! Deepening our bonds while eating tasty food... That's what youth's all about! Fuhahahaha! вҳҶ
Shinobu Sengoku
Shinobu Sengoku has arrived! I'm a part of RYUSEITAI as RYUSEI Yellow~вҷӘ On top of that, IвҖҷm also the chief head of the Ninja AssociationвҖҰ And for the sake of becoming a splendid ninja, I strive to train hard every day! The ninja fortune I got this morning said that if I completely master making ninja meals, IвҖҷll have good luck coming my way! IвҖҷm a sucker for sour foods, so IвҖҷll make a new ninja dish with my prized umeboshi! Right then, IвҖҷve got to carry out a mission Isara-dono requested of me, so I shall take my leave! ShutatatataвҖҰ!
Midori Takamine
Ah, helloвҖҰ I'm Midori Takamine from RYUSEITAI. I, well... I accidentally took the idol course exam and passed it for some reasonвҖҰ Then Morisawa-senpai invited me to RYUSEITAI, and he insisted that I join the Basketball Club too, since I had the "height" apparentlyвҖҰ Like, for some reason, he's always getting involved with me to a suffocating degreeвҖҰ Sigh, this is so depressing. I wanna dieвҖҰ But I have the day off from both unit and club activities today, so I'm thinking of going to my favorite yuruchara cafe. They've got pizza on the menu... Here's hoping it's got basil on top...вҷӘ UghвҖ” I think I hear Morisawa-senpai's voice from over that side. I have to escape before he catches meвҖҰ
Kuro Kiryu
Yo. IвҖҷm Kuro Kiryu, captain of the karate club. IвҖҷm also the second in command of AKATSUKI, a Japanese-themed unit. Though, sayinвҖҷ вҖңIвҖҷm an idolвҖқ with this sorta face isnвҖҷt all that believable, is it? My favorite bite ta eat? Gotta be steak. I always hafta eat meat before every match вҖҳn live performance to fire myself up. But the other day, my lilвҖҷ sister just about threw a fit вҖҳcuz I ended up eatinвҖҷ too much of itвҖҰ I want my lilвҖҷ sis to get her nutrition, so I try to keep that balance, but I accidentally end up beinвҖҷ careless about it when it comes to my own meals. Well, time I get back to makinвҖҷ the outfits for our next live soon. This was a nice change of pace. Thanks.
Souma Kanzaki
Souma Kanzaki has arrived! I am affiliated with AKATSUKI, the distinguished powerhouse unit of Yumenosaki Academy. Additionally, I am a member of the Marine Life Club. Tomorrow, we are holding a вҖңsushi paateeвҖқ to express our constant appreciation for Buchou-dono. вҷӘ There are many preparations to put together tonight, but that frivolous manвҖҰ There is the issue that Hakaze-dono will not help at all. Mm, itвҖҷs nearly time for my trainingвҖҰ Well, please excuse me, I must be off! H-Hasumi-dono!? ThatвҖҷs right, today was unit practice. I am deeply sorry! I will apologize for this mistake with seppukuвҖҰ!
Tetora Nagumo
Ossu! IвҖҷm a first-year student in the Karate Club. The nameвҖҷs Tetora Nagumo, and IвҖҷm Ryusei Black in RYUSEITAI! My hobbyвҖҷs workinвҖҷ out, and I respect Taishou tons! AhвҖ“ By Taishou, IвҖҷm talkinвҖҷ about Kiryu-senpai. HeвҖҷs a third-year, and heвҖҷs like, a totally amazing person! I aim to be a man among men just like Taishou! I gotta get strong and cool like him as soon as I possibly can, so todayвҖҷs another day I give everything my all. IвҖҷm gonna give my studies, my idol activities and my club activities everything I got! ThatвҖҷs why IвҖҷll eat tonsвҖҷa meat too, my favorite! Men grow stronger by eating meat! That reminds meвҖ” Yesterday, Taishou told me that the kalbi meal set came back. I'm gonna rush to the cafeteria now~!

entry.title: Scroll of the Elements Epilogue
entry.content:
Epilogue 1
Location: Tourist Village
Gentlemen, excellent work! Ah, thatвҖҷs too insolent of me to say, when I am still only a noviceвҖҰ IвҖҷll say вҖңthank you for your hard workвҖқ insteadпҪһвҷӘ Come now, enjoy the food to your heart's content. The food used in the banquet scene is authentic. It would be a waste to let it rot and get thrown away, so I was told theyвҖҷd like us to finish it up. I hurried to get some additional food and drinks, so let's have a quick kick-off and enjoy ourselves~вҷӘ Oh, by the way, we have permission to have a wrap-up party here. The sponsors were very happy that Scroll of the Elements was a great success~вҷӘ
How are you so energetic, Kanzaki...? I'm completely exhausted. It was a slapstick comedy this time around, so my face hurts from overusing facial muscles that donвҖҷt typically get practice.
Yeah, what he said. My face got so stiff that it isnвҖҷt goinвҖҷ back to normal... Plus, the focus was on sword-fighting and action scenes for this performance. Kanzaki and I are fine for the most part, but Hasumi-no-danna, are you feelinвҖҷ groggy from it all?
DonвҖҷt look down on me. I don't want to hold you guys back, so I go on runs to train. It feels good to run early in the morning. I can feel the change of seasons, too.
That makes you sound like a grandpaвҖҰ Well done to everyone in RYUSEITAI, too. We were in sync way more than I expected, and it was pretty fun. Let's perform together again~вҷӘ
I should be the one to say that to you guys. We got to experience something extremely valuable, and thanks to you all, Scroll of the Elements was made possible. Thank you for making my comradeвҖҷs dreams come true.
Hmph. It's still autumn, it would be bad if you burnt out here. The organizers said that if things keep going like this, they would like to consider holding additional performances or releasing a second round... There may also be an opportunity to do a similar live in the future.
iвҖҷm looking forward to it~ next time, i want to play the role of [samurai-san], too~ the other day, souma taught me how to use a [katana]~вҷӘ1
ItвҖҷs risky to let Buchou-dono handle blades, so IвҖҷd rather he doesnвҖҷt, butвҖҰ I've grown a little interested in ninjas, too. Why don't you teach me the basics next time, Sengoku?
ZzzвҖҰ zzzвҖҰ~вҷӘ
Oh, Sengoku fell asleep. He must be exhausted, he sleeps like a baby... He worked hard today, after all~вҷӘ
Ahaha. Yet on stage, or rather, in the final scene, he looked so powerful and cool. He actually genuinely managed to pass through the ring of fire. It was a real surprise to see.
He really is light on his feet, huh... Tetora:-kun is pretty athletic, too вҖ” I feel like IвҖҷm the only one who looks like a dunce... Maybe I'm lanky because I only eat vegetablesвҖҰ I need to take in more protein...
Oh, you got so inspired by your comrades that it made you wish to grow stronger!? Takamine is a boy too, huh~ That feeling is important! ThatвҖҷs wonderful! Keep encouraging each other to improve yourselves, you guys...вҳҶ
WaitвҖ” please don't cling to me... Right after performances, Morisawa-senpaiвҖҷs body-temperature is about three times higher than normal, and itвҖҷs so stuffy...
ItвҖҷs fine, isnвҖҷt it? LetвҖҷs get along! Let's share our happiness! Now that Sengoku has done what he wants to do, it might be Takamine's turn next, yвҖҷknow? Is there anything you want to do?
Uu~... Right now, I just want to go home and sleep in bed...
What a silly comedy this is, like Manjuu Kowai.2 Alright, thatвҖҷs all from me. IвҖҷll take my leave now, so onto the next speaker.
Epilogue 2
вҖҰ Anzu-dono, youвҖҷre standing a little far away for some reason, butвҖҰ You should come closer. Here, the chestnut yokan is delicious~вҷӘ вҖҰYou have such a sad look on your face. WhatвҖҷs the matter? If youвҖҷd like, you can talk to me. WeвҖҷre вҖңkurasumeitoвҖқ, I want you to rely on me anytime~вҷӘ Hmm. You feel disappointed in yourself because you misjudged what distance to take with us вҖңaidoruвҖқ? Sengoku told you that he was neither a stuffed animal nor a younger brother... And you feel bad about that? I think Sengoku said that simply because he wanted to be treated as a man, though. Just doting on someone isn't enough to satisfy that. ItвҖҷs a difficult problem, isnвҖҷt it? We have our respective positions, but weвҖҷre human beings with flesh and blood. We arenвҖҷt mature enough to be capable of completely separating work and private life. A novice like me shouldnвҖҷt say something haughty, but... We are humans, Anzu-dono. You will inevitably make mistakes, over and over again. However, in this modern age, it isnвҖҷt such a suffocating era that even a single mistake cannot be forgiven until after oneвҖҷs death... ItвҖҷs alright to make mistakes many times over, and to regret them just as much. After all, the most important thing is not to repeat them again, correct? In hopes that next time nobody will get hurt вҖ” That hopefully, you can come closer to crafting a better futureвҖҰ You have no choice but to put in the effort, reflect on yourself, and fumble your way forward. Fortunately, in this modern age... For kids like us, there is a вҖңnext timeвҖқ waiting for us. We were born in a happy era, not in the harsh Sengoku period вҖ” a period where, even if you stole nothing but a handful of rice, your hands would be cut off, or you would be killed... As long as weвҖҷre allowed to make mistakes, and until the moment we use up all of my "next times"... there is nothing we can do but to make every effort we can until we become adults. Carrying sins, mistakes, and scars, we have no choice but to grow so that we won't repeat them again. Mm? Ahh, IвҖҷm simply echoing Hasumi-dono's words. He told me something like that when we first met... There was something about it that really touched me, and that is why I'm still by his side to this day. That person has made mistakes and failed many times, but he still does all he can to keep moving forward. I'm sure it's the same for Kiryu-dono. ThatвҖҷs exactly why I want to serve and honor my seniors. вҖҰ Sorry, I wanted to listen to your worries, Anzu-dono, but I only ended up talking about myself. But, well, understanding us вҖңaidoruвҖқ to a deep level is never a waste for a вҖңprodyusaaвҖқ. Anzu-dono. I want you to smile. Everyone will worry if you look so gloomy. Plenty of our вҖңkurasumeitoвҖқ are nosey. LetвҖҷs go back to where everyone is. If you feel anxious, I will protect you. You have an attendant by your side. To be frankвҖҰ Out of AKATSUKI and RYUSEITAI, IвҖҷm the only second-year. If Anzu-dono werenвҖҷt here with me, IвҖҷd constantly have to grapple with being stuck between my juniors and seniors. Ha ha ha~вҷӘ
Translation Notes вҶ‘ A reference to Crash Course, where members from different units trained together by swapping out their aesthetics. Kanata and Souma paired together, and their cards have them wearing each other's outfits.вҶ‘ иҗҪиӘһ (rakugo, lit. a story with a fall ) is a comedic theatre act where one person tells a story and acts out multiple parts. Think of it like stand-up comedy, and read more here. Manjuu Kowai is a famous rakugo routine, which you can read about here. "гҒҠеҫҢгҒҢгӮҲгӮҚгҒ—гҒ„гӮҲгҒҶгҒ§" is a segue during rakugo performances, where one introduces the next act before leaving the stage.

entry.title: Scroll of the Clouds
entry.content:
Chapter 1
Location: Tourist Village
Oi~ Anzu-dono! Anzu-dono~вҳҶ It's finally the day of Scroll of the Elements! I got too excited again and woke up too early! You arrived early too, huh? IвҖҷm always really impressed with how early you come to work вҷӘ
H-Huh? No reply! I guess she can't hear me, but I don't want to be ignoredвҖҰ Anzu-dono~! вҖңLordвҖқ~ I am over here~!
Ah, you finally noticed me. Ehehe, good morningпҪһвҷӘ Yes! Look, look here at this sculpture of Frog-san! The sign said you could climb on and take photos, so I decided to go for a rideпҪһвҷӘ Please spare me from any scolding about how itвҖҷs embarrassing that IвҖҷm doing this as a high schooler, okay? This was a dream of mine, so please take a photoвҷӘ Peace вҳҶ DonвҖҷt I look like Jiraiya?1 Ninpou, Toad no Jutsu~вҷӘ Anzu-dono, IвҖҷd like you to play Orochimaru or Tsunade! вҖ” Eh, don't you know about the three-way stalemate?2 Orochimaru has the snake and Tsunade has the slug~вҷӘ Huh? "Be careful not to lose your balance and fall into the pond?"
Don't look down on me, I'm a ninja! Our main selling point is our agility...вҷӘ
However, just in case... It would be bad if I got injured, or got wet and caught a cold before Scroll of the Elements. I will disembark from the statue. Farewell, Frog-san~вҷӘ HupвҖ“! Once again, good morning! Anzu-dono, thank you for your hard work~вҷӘ Hm? WhatвҖҷs wrong? Why are you moving so strangely? Ooh, wait, are you hand-signing a jutsu?3
What? вҖңLet me hug you...?вҖқ W-Why? Have you caught on to Taichou-donoвҖҷs hugging habit, Anzu-dono? G-GhвҖ“!? Hey, don't forcibly hug me! It hurts!
Hmm. Anzu-dono, your parents and younger brother will be away this weekend, so youвҖҷre feeling lonely, huh... YouвҖҷve been busy with work lately, so you donвҖҷt have much contact with your family...? IвҖҷm sorry to hear thatвҖҰ
Anzu-dono is a producer, so you must be much busier than me. And although spending time with family is important, you can't neglect your work... I can guess thatвҖҷs frustrating for you. I understand; for me, in the pastвҖҰ until I entered Yumenosaki Academy, I pretty much stayed home all the time. Lately, I've been going outdoors more often, which makes my family lonely.
So every time I go home, my parents come running towards me, saying вҖңShinobu~! Shinobu~!вҖқ вҷӘ
Since I was a child, IвҖҷve always been the odd-one-out who loved ninjas... IвҖҷd always act and talk like a ninja, too. It worried my parents, as I didn't have any friends for a long time either.
I know they can't help but be overprotective, but itвҖҷs frustrating being treated as a child who can't do anything. IвҖҷm already a teenager by now. Anzu-dono. I'm glad you're kind to me, but I'm not a stuffed animal. And IвҖҷm not your little brother either, you knowвҖҰ?
Ohh, thatвҖҷs SengokuвҖҷs voice! I see that AnzuвҖҷs here too! The two of you are here so early! Wonderful, I can tell youвҖҷre both motivatedвҳҶ I also arrived early, and have been making the rounds to greet people while checking the souvenir shops! I'm sure you know this, but this tourist spot is also the holy land for tokusatsu...вҳҶ4 You see, I spotted a Shocker Combatman over there just a minute ago! I got his autograph! Ahh, I'm so happy! My dream has come true~ This will become a family heirloom! FuhahahaвҖҰвҳҶ
вҖҰвҖҰвҖҰ
вҖҰвҖҰвҖҰ
вҖҰвҖ” Sorry! My timing is always, always awfulвҖ”!
Anzu and Sengoku, embracing each other like thatвҖҰ S- So itвҖҷs that kind of relationship, huh? IвҖҷm sorry, I donвҖҷt want to disturb you! IвҖҷll take my leave!
N-No? Taichou-dono, youвҖҷre misunderstanding the situationвҖ”!
ItвҖҷs alright. I understand. To me, I believe that an idol and a producer together is a thorny road, and as captain, I donвҖҷt think I should overlook this love affair, butвҖ”! No one can ever stop love!
I give you my blessings! ThatвҖҷs all I can say! IвҖҷm rooting for you! Goodbye!
I told you already, you have it wrong, Taichou-dono?! DonвҖҷt run off with the wrong idea in your headвҖ”! Every once in a while, IвҖҷd like you to listen to what people have to say!
Chapter 2
вҖҰвҖҰвҖҰ
вҖҰвҖҰвҖҰвҖҰ вҖҰвҖҰвҖҰ
(T-This is so awkwardвҖҰ! Why am I the first one from RYUSEITAI to get here? ArenвҖҷt Sengoku-kun and Morisawa-senpai always the ones to get here firstвҖҰ?) (I thought IвҖҷd get lost wandering around an unfamiliar place, so I got here early, butвҖҰ) (It's just the two of us here вҖ” Me, and the scary vice president from AKATSUKIвҖҰ)
(Ahh, I'm so depressed, I want to die... I feel like my own lack of communication skills are to blame...) (I canвҖҷt just run off somewhereвҖҰ But I don't know what to say to someone I don't know well, either...)
(S-Someone hurry up and get here...! ItвҖҷs getting hard to breathe...!)
You. Are you alright? Your complexion doesnвҖҷt look good. Are you feeling unwell?
FwehвҖҰ? Oh, meвҖҰ? IвҖҷm fine, er, probablyвҖҰ?
Probably? Good grief. If you get anxious now, you'll only wear yourself out. Although, it's not good to be too relaxed, either. ...I think the others will be arriving soon, so just wait a little longer.
Ah, sureвҖҰ IвҖҷm sorryвҖҰ?
Why are you apologizing? We may be upperclassmen and underclassmen, but weвҖҷre about the same age in the end, and weвҖҷre performing a joint live together, so... IвҖҷm not saying you should act overly familiar with me, but you donвҖҷt have to feel sorry like that..
Ah, okayвҖҰ IвҖҷm so sorryвҖҰ
I just said you donвҖҷt need to apologize, thoughвҖҰ You. Let me see that bag for a bit.
FwehвҖҰ? Eh? What do you meanвҖҰ? I-Is it a violation of the school rules in some way?
No. Show me the plush hanging off of it. This is Hanzoumon, isnвҖҷt it?
Ah, yeahвҖҰ While I was on the way to our meeting spot, I saw it was on sale, so I bought it without thinking. Our eyes kinda met, yвҖҷknowвҖҰвҷӘ
Is that so? Sorry, but let me have a good look. Right now, IвҖҷm putting together different key points that I couldnвҖҷt fit in the pamphlet. IвҖҷm thinking of making flyers of that information, and handing copies of it out for free, but... Rather than just listing it out, I figured it would be easier to read it in manga form where Hanzoumon explains the information.
Considering that a lot of families with children come to this tourist spot. But, I only have a faint recollection of its design, so IвҖҷd like to draw it while looking at the real thing.
Ahh, I was wondering what you were drawing a moment ago... Er, I'll put the Hanzomon plush here, if thatвҖҷs fine...?
ThatвҖҷs helpful. Thank you.
вҖҰвҖҰвҖҰ
What? Why are you staring? I assure you, IвҖҷve been given permission to use HanzoumonвҖҷs design. Once I finish the flyer, IвҖҷll check again.
No, itвҖҷs justвҖҰ YouвҖҷre really good at drawing, arenвҖҷt youвҖҰ?
ItвҖҷs the work of an amateur5. I donвҖҷt have any art supplies right now, so I have no choice but to draw in an app on my tablet. IвҖҷm not accustomed to it, so the lines are shakyвҖҰ GhhвҖҰ if only IвҖҷd practiced a little more on digitalвҖҰ
ItвҖҷs kinda unexpected. I always thought Vice President-san was a serious honor studentвҖҰ
There is no law that says honor students canвҖҷt draw. You. It seems like you like yuru-characters, hm? How about I draw something for you? IвҖҷd like a good warm-up to get my fingers used to digital art.
Ah, thenвҖҰ HikonyanвҖҰвҷӘ
That Akazonae character?6 I only have a faint memory of that one tooвҖҰ IsnвҖҷt it the one that looks like mochi?
AhвҖ” I have a key strapвҖҰ My parents travel all around the country to buy vegetables, so I always ask them to buy me a yuru-character souvenir from wherever they go~вҷӘ
Midori-ku~n! MorninвҖҷ! вҳҶ
WoahвҖ”! Y-You startled me. Morning, Tetora-kunвҖҰ?
Yo! You looked like you were having fun talking about somethinвҖҷ. Did I interrupt you guys?
No, noвҖҰ ItвҖҷs a relief you came, Tetora-kun. I donвҖҷt know how to talk to someone older than meвҖҰ
Really? ArenвҖҷt you always bantering with Taichou? You arenвҖҷt together today? At times like this, I feel like Taichou always goes to pick you up or somethinвҖҷ, Midori-kun вҷӘ
NoвҖҰ Morisawa-senpai has been somehow getting closer and closer with my parentsвҖҰ I felt like itвҖҷll get out of hand if it continues any further, so IвҖҷve been telling him lately, вҖңDonвҖҷt come to my houseвҖқ... I donвҖҷt want that guy to disturb even the peace of my own homeвҖҰ
Chapter 3
Ahaha, it's a luxury to get to worry about that kind of thing, Midori-kun. Personally, even if I ask Taishou, he doesnвҖҷt come to my house, so IвҖҳm the one who goes to his, even if he never asked. We came together today, too~вҷӘ
DonвҖҷt come to my place too much, Tetsu... My neighborhood isnвҖҷt that safe. We do wanna move, thoughвҖҰ I worry about my sister too, so I drop her off every morning and pick her up later.
Good morning, Kiryu. It feels like it's been a while. Are you in top shape?
Who do you think youвҖҷre talking to? CвҖҷmon, thatвҖҷs my lineвҖҰ I'm sure it'll be fine since itвҖҷs you, but if you end up lookinвҖҷ pathetic, I'll knock you off stage.
Heh. Rest assured, today IвҖҷmвҖ”... no. AKATSUKI is in top shape as always. However, that KanzakiвҖҰ even though I went to the trouble of appointing him as the representative of AKATSUKI... In the end, Kiryu and I got paired to play the lead roles for the AKATSUKI side of the performance, so I did encounter some difficulties. In fact, the two of us had a lot more stage blocking than usual, so I had trouble learning the routine. At this rate, it seems like there was no point in leaving everything to Kanzaki. I was hoping that he would take on becoming the center of AKATSUKI, but... Kanzaki is pretty subservient, it seems. If anything, he tries to bolster us up so much that it puts himself down in the process. ItвҖҷs troubling. Even though he's a kid who can do it if he triesвҖҰ
Haha. That just means he holds us in high regard and treats us with respect. IsnвҖҷt that a blessing? Well, that also means we canвҖҷt ever perform poorly.
ThatвҖҷs trueвҖҰ Anyhow, so Kanzaki still hasnвҖҷt shown his face yet? He's very precise with his time, and always arrives at the scene before anyone else, butвҖҰ I donвҖҷt see him anywhere. IвҖҷm worriedвҖҰ Did any of you see him on your way here?
No, I havenвҖҷt. I did pass by Taichou, Sengoku-kun and Anzu-anego, though. When I called out to them, they said theyвҖҷd meet up with us later, so I'm sure theyвҖҷll show up soon.
What about Shinkai-senpaiвҖҰ? That guyвҖҷs pretty loose with time, so I'm worried that he might be late...? If anything, I think heвҖҷs the one that needs escorting from Morisawa-senpaiвҖҰ Those two seem to be close friends, butвҖҰ thereвҖҷs something about that that theyвҖҷre distant about. Like, doesnвҖҷt it feel like theyвҖҷve drawn a certain line between each otherвҖҰ?
Maybe itвҖҷs вҖҳcause thereвҖҷs a different sense of distance when it comes to someone your age, and someone whoвҖҷs your junior? Same for you Midori-kun, wouldn't it be uncomfortable if I picked you up every morning? Like, вҖңweвҖҷre peers, so don't act like a guardian~вҖқ, or something?
Not really, I wouldnвҖҷt mind if it were you, Tetora-kun... Unlike Morisawa-senpai, you don't push my personal boundaries or anything...
Yeah, thatвҖҷs my point exactly; thatвҖҷs the different sense of distance you get from someone of the same age, yeah?
That's an interesting conversation, but it's time for all of us to start heading to the stage. Otherwise, our progress will be hindered. WeвҖҷll try to contact Kanzaki, so you all, check on the status of the other RYUSEITAI members.
Ahh, roger that! Midori-kun, do you know Shinkai-senpaiвҖҷs phone number?
Yeah, I know itвҖҰ I picked out a cute smartphone for Shinkai-senpai's birthday... I was the only one who forgot about his birthday and didnвҖҷt prepare a present for him in time, so I got it for him to make up for my mistake...7 Just a sec, IвҖҷll give him a callвҖҰ вҖҰ Ah. HelloвҖҰ? Shinkai-senpaiвҖҰ?
ye~s, hellooo~вҷӘ вҖ” Huh? That voice is surprisingly close?!
Oi. In that river over thereвҖҰ isnвҖҷt that Shinkai?
puka, pukaвҖҰ~вҷӘ
UwaaвҖ” What are you doing, Shinkai-senpai?! WeвҖҷre not at school right now, so please donвҖҷt do anything so weird~! TheyвҖҷll call the police on you!
ahaha. my, my, [tetora]... you say the kinds of things [chiaki] does, don't you?
I think that's a completely proper comment to make. Shinkai, if you misbehave, youвҖҷll only give trouble to your unit, even your juniors. Get a hold of yourself, youвҖҷre incorrigible.
arenвҖҷt you bossy~ When my skin gets [dry], it gets suffocating for me. also, [frog-san] was here, so I thought IвҖҷd give Shinobu a [present]~вҷӘ that kid loves [froggies], soвҖҰ hop, hopвҖҰ~вҷӘ when it was my birthday, everyone [celebrated] with me, yes? I want to [return the favor]. and so, iвҖҷm [fully motivated] for scroll of the elements, as well...пҪһвҷӘ
Hmph. Good to know, then. вҖ” Wait, no, itвҖҷs not. Get out of the river at once. It may still be early in the morning, but more tourists are arrrivingвҖҰ Don't expose the school's shame to the public too much, вҖңThree EccentricsвҖқ.
i wonвҖҷt listen to the [things you say]. never againвҖҰ8 but i [didnвҖҷt mean] to cause [trouble] for the [children] of [ryuseitai]. so, well... just this time, iвҖҷll do [as you say] вҷӘ
ThatвҖҷll save us trouble. Does anyone have a towel or something to wipe Shinkai off?
Ah, IвҖҷll do it! It's already autumn, Shinkai-senpai! You're gonna catch a cold~!
hehe, iвҖҷm not that [fragile], you know~вҷӘ But, well, itвҖҷs a [good thing] to have someone be [worried] for you, yes? i feel kind of [warm], so i'm sure i won't catch a [cold]...вҷӘ
Translation Notes вҶ‘ Ogata Shuma Hiroyuki, or Jiraiya (lit. "Young Thunder") is the protagonist of the Japanese folk tale The Tale of Gallant Jiraiya. He's heavily associated with toads, and is often depicted riding a giant toad. Read more here.вҶ‘ In the same folktale, Tsunade is a young maiden who learns slug magic. Orochimaru is a robber who posesses snake magic. The relationship between Jiraiya (toad), Tsunade (slug) and Orochimaru (snake) is like rock-paper-scissors. Snake fears slug, slug fears toad, toad fears snake. Read more hereвҶ‘ иЎ“ (jutsu, lit. technique ). By hand-signing a jutsu, you're manipulating your chakra to perform the ninja technique (in Naruto, anyways).вҶ‘ From зү№ж®Ҡж’®еҪұжҠҖиЎ“ (lit. special effects technology), зү№ж’® (tokusatsu) refers to live-action films or TV-shows that use heavy special effects (SFX). One well known SFX tactic is the use of miniature sets or scale models. Subgenres of tokusatsu include kaiju (i.e., Godzilla), superheroes (i.e., Kamen Rider or Power Rangers), and mecha. It's kind of Chiaki's whole life. Read more hereвҶ‘ Read more about Keito's secret life as the mangaka Mizuhanome-sensei here.вҶ‘ иөӨеӮҷгҒҲ (Akazonae lit. red arms ) is a military organization from the Sengoku period to the Edo period. As their name suggests, they were known for their use of bright red in all of their arms, which highly stood out in the battlefield. Read more here. Also, look up Hikonyan, it is very precious.вҶ‘ From Kanata's birthday story with Midori (!-Era). In general, everyone's mentioning his birthday because it's in late August, and Scroll of the Elements takes place in autumn.вҶ‘ Hm, I'm sure this won't come back in three years, when Meteor Impact is written. During Keito's villain monologue, it's revealed what Kanata means by this.

entry.title: Scroll of the Elements
entry.content:
.preview-wrapper { /* in case jquery doesn't work */ display: none; } @media (max-width: 567px) { /* for NexT Mashiro: makes padding smaller on mobile */ .post-block { padding: 5px 10px 8px !important; } }
Scroll of the Elements йўЁйӣІзөөе·»
Start Reading
When RYUSEITAI and AKATSUKI receive a request from a local tourist spot, Shinobu is pumped! After all, the theme of the performance is about ninjas. Souma, friendly with Shinobu, is also given a major part, and the two give it their all to play the leading roles...

[Ninja's Way of Life] Shinobu Sengoku [еҝҚиҖ…гҒ®з”ҹгҒҚгҒӢгҒҹ] д»ҷзҹі еҝҚ
[Samurai's Big Moment] Souma Kanzaki пј»жӯҰеЈ«гҒ®жҷҙгӮҢиҲһеҸ°пјҪзҘһеҙҺ йўҜйҰ¬
[Burning Ninja] Chiaki Morisawa [зҮғгӮҶгӮӢеҝҚиҖ…] е®ҲжІў еҚғз§Ӣ
