entry.title: Scroll of the Elements Prologue
entry.content:
Scroll of the Elements Prologue
Season: Autumn
Location: Hallways
O~i, Kanzaki-dono! Kanzaki-dono~вҳҶ1 Mm? Oh, Sengoku. You're full of energy as always. However, though itвҖҷs said that children will run even on a windy day, you shouldnвҖҷt run in the hallway.2
Hm? I'm not a child, am I? IвҖҷm already a high school student~
Fufu, in the eyes of the world, high school students are still considered children. And whether you are an adult or a child, you must refrain from actions that cause trouble to others. Hasumi-dono always scolds me for that, too.
Look. The papers I was carrying were swept away by the wind, thanks to you rushing in.
Ah, pardon me! Here, I'll pick them up~вҷӘ
Mm. IвҖҷm gratefulвҖҰ That aside, did you need something from me?
Huh? Ah, no, I didnвҖҷt have anything in particular! ItвҖҷs just that when I saw you, Kanzaki-dono, I got so happy that I ran up to you~
What, are you a puppy? However, I'm happy that youвҖҷve become attached to me, as I donвҖҷt have much of a relationship with the underclassmen.
Kanzaki-dono, itвҖҷs hard to approach you because you always walk around with a sword hanging at your side. YouвҖҷre also a member of AKATSUKI, the student councilвҖҷs headlining unitвҖҰ ItвҖҷs absolutely because of things like that that everyone perceives you as an intimidating person.
Are you also scared of me, SengokuвҖҰ?
Not at all! I used to think you were a menacing person, but when I talked to you, I realized you were really kind!3
Ah, but is it going to be too annoying if I get too friendly?!
That wonвҖҷt happen. LetвҖҷs continue to get alongвҖҰ Sengoku вҷӘ At any rate, Sengoku, are you free right now? Hasumi-dono asked me to put up these вҖңposutaaвҖқ on the bulletin board. However, IвҖҷm having a difficult time with the amount. IвҖҷd appreciate your help.
ThatвҖҷs an easy task~! RYUSEITAI has just finished a big job4 and is currently on a break, so I have plenty of free time! Surprisingly, our unitвҖҷs Taichou-dono5 gives us plenty of good rest~вҷӘ
It is the same for me. We are both blessed with good masters, arenвҖҷt we? AKATSUKI is also on break.
The вҖңHarouin PaatiiвҖқ S1 will be held soon, you see. Hasumi-dono, or rather the student council, has been extremely busy preparing for it. It's not to the point where heвҖҷs immobile, but it would be troubling if he were to push himself and deteriorate his health. Therefore, I'm helping out with student council errands in hopes of getting Hasumi-dono the freedom to move a little.
The current bustling of the student council is Hasumi-donoвҖҷs own personal matters, soвҖҰ Kiryu-dono and I have been told that we can take on individual work in the meantime, or unit work as only the two of us. However, I feel that in doing so, weвҖҷd march on ahead without him. It makes me feel shameful. Could it be because I lack independence?
Ah, I also have a lot of free time when RYUSEITAI isnвҖҷt active. WeвҖҷre similar after all~вҷӘ
Is that right? Well, ninjas and warriors might be similar in the eyes of the public, I suppose, but....
вҖҰHm? Forgive me, Anzu-dono. I was about to kick you. Why are you kneeling here? Are you feeling unwell? Are you okay? Should I take you to the infirmary?
You don't look like you've slept much, Producer-dono. I'm worried that you might be overworked! If you give us your order, we who serve our вҖңlordвҖқ6 will take care of all your troublesвҳҶ
Hya!? Eh!? вҖңDon't refer to me as "lord" too muchвҖқ...? IвҖҷd have understood it if you just said it~ I don't like you pinching my cheeks!
Now, now, Anzu-dono. Don't bully Sengoku too much, Buddha is watching. Hm. Anzu-dono has been asked to do various projects, but has hit a wall... You came to see the вҖңposutaa'' on the bulletin board in case they had anything useful to reference?
Certainly, there are often вҖңB1вҖқ notices, announcements and recruitment listings posted on this particular bulletin board. There are so many that it would be futile to try peeling them all off, and they would just be put back up again. Even Hasumi-dono is overlooking it at this point.
Actually, the other day, we AKATSUKI participated in the вҖңB1вҖқ Quarrel Festival... WeвҖҷre not in a position where we can openly regulate вҖңB1вҖқs anymore. If we were to criticize someone for participating, and they were to criticize us for having done the same, we wouldnвҖҷt be able to refute it. But a lively atmosphere is a good thing, so I suppose it's a mixed blessing.
вҖҰHuh? What's wrong, Anzu-dono? Do I have something on my face? Hmm, вҖңAre you interested in period dramasвҖқ...? Does it seem like I am?
It does, Kanzaki-dono. Moreso, you come off as the kind of cringey guy who likes period dramas and samurai so much that he wears a sword just for the sake of it.
Is that rightвҖҰ? Then let me explain just in case, but I have government authorization to wear a sword!7 Look, look, my licenseвҷӘ
The government? Who exactly are you, Kanzaki-donoвҖҰ?
Anyway, what were you saying about period dramas, Producer-dono? I like them and watch them often~! In period dramas, ninjas are usually minor roles or one-off fighters, so I end up a little dissatisfied with their portrayal.
Eh? If there was a period drama that featured ninjas in the spotlight, would I want to appear in it?
I-Is there a proposal out there that looks like it was prepared just for me!? If that's the case, I definitely want to appear! I won't let anyone else have it because it's my dream! Fwoohh, my time has come at last~! вҳҶ
Translation Notes вҶ‘ -ж®ҝ (-dono) is an honorific that roughly means "lord" or "master". It's archaic, which gives Souma and Shinobu an old-timey feel.вҶ‘ A proverb from the Edo period. The full proverb is "Children are children of the wind (children will play, even when it's cold) and adults are children of fire (they will get cold, so they stay near fire)".вҶ‘ Can he be blamed? Souma broke a table with his sword the day he met Shinobu in Samurai and Ninjas.вҶ‘ It's uncertain which job Shinobu is referring to here, as RYUSEITAI had done various big jobs across the summer prior to this event.вҶ‘ Both Shinobu and Tetora refer to Chiaki as йҡҠй•· (taichou), or captain.вҶ‘ He's using ж®ҝ (dono) by itself here.вҶ‘ Japan has very strict regulations on the possession and use of firearms and swords, via the Swords and Firearms Possession Control Law.

entry.title: Signs of the Coming Storm
entry.content:
Chapter 1
Location: Tourist Village
Content Warning: Mentions of self-harm
вҖҰ Alright. We cut it close, but the flyer is completed. All we have to do is send the data, check with the person in charge, and leave printing and distribution to staff.
I donвҖҷt really get it, but thanks for your hard work. Now we just have to wait for Kanzaki to arrive. I wonder what heвҖҷs doingвҖҰ
I donвҖҷt know. It is extremely troubling being unable to contact him, so IвҖҷd wish heвҖҷd get into the habit of using his cellphone already... He always has needlessly long items hanging off of him, and yet he doesnвҖҷt carry any digital devices. Well, when I contacted his parents, it seems that heвҖҷd already left home a while ago, soвҖҰ I think heвҖҷll be able to make it in time for rehearsal. Still, it feels like itвҖҷs getting a little too late. IвҖҷm worried. I hope he hasnвҖҷt gotten into an accidentвҖҰ
Calm down, danna0 HeвҖҷs not a toddler taking his first steps or somethinвҖҷ. YouвҖҷd be lookinвҖҷ down on him, being so overprotective. If something happened, heвҖҷd probably call you from a public phone or something or the other. Leave that aside for now вҖ” LetвҖҷs do costume fitting, and go over the script again. How does the costume feel? Is it difficult to move in? IвҖҷll fix it up a bit if it is.
No problems at all. ItвҖҷs so comfortable, IвҖҷd want to wear it everyday. IвҖҷm impressed with how unique the script is without interfering too much with the content from the tie-in movie. ItвҖҷs littered with interesting elements.
Yeah, the costumes, script and stage were all prepared by the staff. Sure enough, you can learn a lot from professional work. Look at the beauty of these seams~вҷӘ
YouвҖҷre in unusually good spirits, Kiryu. вҖҰ I heard that while I was busy, youвҖҷve been charging into various вҖңB1вҖқ matches like you were storming dojos1. But, well, it seems like it was a nice break for you.
I wonвҖҷt do anything reckless, so donвҖҷt worry. IвҖҷm not gonna cause any trouble for AKATSUKI or the student council. IвҖҷm in a position of authority now, so I canвҖҷt be a naughty kid.
I know. No, I trust you. IвҖҷm sorry for putting you in such an inconvenient position, Kiryu.
IвҖҷm not a brat, yвҖҷknow, I agreed to it. I donвҖҷt think of myself as inconvenienced or tied down. Adult freedom is freedom as long as it doesnвҖҷt hurt the public. Instead of getting wasted and going on a tear at a coming-of-age ceremony... Having a glass of beer after a long bath at the end of a hard day's work is probably more precious.
вҖҰ You don't drink alcohol, do you?
IвҖҷm drunk almost every day, even without the use of alcohol, yвҖҷknow. ...Oh, it looks like that Kanzaki guy finally arrived after waiting forever, huh?
Eh, where? MmвҖҰ my eyesight might have gotten worse again.
Hasumi-donooooo! Kiryu-donooooo! I apologize for arriving lateвҖҰ! Kanzaki Souma has arrived, please forgive my rudeness! To atone for being late, I will disembowel myself on the cross!2
A HOOORSE?! K-... K-KвҖҰ Kanzaki?! YouвҖ”* *a-aahвҖ” even I canвҖҷt find the words for thisвҖ”!
WhatвҖҷs wrong, Hasumi-dono! Calm down, please; we are at oneвҖҷs palace! Are you nervous before the big stage? So Hasumi-dono also has a novice side to him~вҷӘ
O-Oi, Kanzaki? Stop for a sec, donвҖҷt just rush in without pause?!
AhвҖ”! Once more, please forgive me! This horse and I were in such harmony3, I had forgotten that I was still riding! Ha-ha-haвҳҶ
KanzakiвҖҰ For now, dismount that horse, and sit seiza4 there.
Huh? Hmm... I guess you're angry at me for being late, Hasumi-dono. Your anger is understandable. I will slit open my stomach promptly, then. I will leave the beheading to you~вҷӘ5
Don't commit seppuku so easily. IвҖҷve always wondered this about you, but from what era did you time-travel from?
Well, you see, hahaha... The hands on my familyвҖҷs clock have stopped since the Edo period.
Have your parents been pestering you or something? It seems your relatives aren't very fond of idol activities... And so, they didnвҖҷt pay for transportation, giving you no choice but to take a horse?
Ah, no. After a long period of convincing, my father and mother are finally showing some understanding. Hasumi-dono, Kiryu-dono, and Anzu-dono have all visited my home many times and spoke for me to them, after all. They can feel your sincerity. Besides, my parents aren't that antiquated6. Some relatives still wear bitterness on their faces, though. I was the one who knocked on the door of Yumenosaki Academy with the desire to become an вҖңaidoruвҖқ. No matter what anyone says, and no matter what hardships I may be given, my feelings will not change. But if it's a nuisance for AKATSUKI and everyone else... I have no choice but to apologize.
When have I ever said youвҖҷre a nuisance? Well, it is a bit of a bother, but... If youвҖҷre a proper man, follow through on your original intention. If you desire the world, then grasp it for yourself. Kiryu and I will always be on your side.
Ahaha, I don't want something so ambitious, but... As a samurai warrior who attends Hasumi-dono and Kiryu-dono, IвҖҷm committed to not being a disgrace at the very least. By the way, this horse is owned by our family. His name is Saigodon. As far as IвҖҷm concerned, weвҖҷre like brothers who grew up running around the mountains and fields together. Apparently they're going to use him for movie filming, so... my parents told me that if we were going to the same destination, I could ride him here. And since I thought it would be faster than walking, I mounted him. However, in the end, I wound up getting stuck in traffic and almost being late. Modern Japan is not very suitable for traveling by horse.
I've always been telling you to choose a more modern mode of transportation. Well, even if it can't be helped this time, from now on, you'll meet up with me or Kiryu first and then head to the site.
Mm, understood~вҷӘ
YouвҖҷre only ever good at responses, aren't you...?
Chapter 2
Look, Saigodon. ItвҖҷs my seniors, say hello~вҷӘ
Eeep, don't lick me! Can't you see, I'm already dressed and have my makeup done! You too, erвҖҰ Saigodon? After youвҖҷve safely delivered him, go get changed!
Hmm. There's no need to be so scared, Hasumi-dono. Saigodon is an excellent horse trained in acting. He can purposefully fall down in ways that donвҖҷt hurt his rider.
IвҖҷm not really scared, but big creatures have a sense of intimidation that threatens our survival instincts. I do also have trauma. When I was young, and I misbehaved, I would get locked in a room lined with giant Buddha statues.
Well, thatвҖҷs odd. ArenвҖҷt you on good terms with the huge Kiryu-dono?
I can talk, canвҖҷt I? DannaвҖҷs eloquent, but heвҖҷll have trouble speaking with things that donвҖҷt speak back. There, there, there... HeвҖҷs beinвҖҷ real obedient, huh? What a very clever horse~вҷӘ
Um, everyone~? ItвҖҷs gotten noisy for some reason, but has Kanzaki-dono arrived? If that's the case, I'd like to do a rehearsal of the performance shortly~? вҖ” Is that a horse?! Wow, it really feels like IвҖҷve traveled back in time to the Sengoku period~вҷӘ7
Hm, a scoundrel! I jestвҖҰ SengokuвҖҷs completely a ninja now~вҷӘ8
I've been a ninja from the beginning, haven't I~? Hehe, this is a real ninja costume made by a professional who works on period dramas! Well, it's a stage costume, so it's also flashy and colorful~вҷӘ
Are you not concerned about historical research or authenticity, Sengoku?
Well, if you wanted to be authentic, ninjas rarely wore вҖңninja outfitsвҖқ to begin with. Since they were intelligence operatives, it was normal for ninjas to blend in with the crowd by disguising themselves as townspeople or monks. In order to adapt to modern times, there is a certain degree of symbolization... characterization thatвҖҷs needed. I admired ninjas not because of the way they looked, but because of their way of life~вҷӘ
Is that right? Sengoku is remarkable, he really has an eye for discerning the true nature of things...вҷӘ
вҖҰ~вҷӘ
Huh? What is it, Hasumi-dono? Why are you looking at me so pleasantly?
Well, Kanzaki acting like a senior is rare, so it's just interesting... Alright, stop the chatter and go change your clothes. We, AKATSUKI, cannot neglect our role of being the perfect example.
Kanzaki, I'll help you get dressed. I wanna do the finishing touches to your hair and makeup myself.
Mm, IвҖҷm grateful. Only with Kiryu-donoвҖҷs consideration are we complete as AKATSUKI. But before that, I'm going to deliver the Saigodon to the movie set, so please excuse me for a moment~вҷӘ
Kanzaki-dono~, I want to ride the horse, too~вҷӘ Sengoku, sometimes you unexpectedly say things like a toddler. Alright, get on, get on. ItвҖҷll be light enough if itвҖҷs only you. DonвҖҷt shout, or youвҖҷll frighten Saigodon.
Understood! Wow, IвҖҷve always dreamed of riding a horse~вҷӘ
Oi, wait a minute. Sengoku, your stage clothes will get dirtyвҖҰ
Gallop, gallop вҷӘ Hi-ho, Saigodon!
Haha, now it's not a period drama, but a Western one...вҷӘ
Ah, theyвҖҷve gone off, how incorrigible. Our juniors are a little too free-spirited.
Haha. As long as it's the kind of freedom that doesnвҖҷt cause trouble to others, it's fine. Us seniors can save strictness for when itвҖҷs needed.
вҖҰвҖҰвҖҰ.
Whoa, you startled me. Morisawa, whatвҖҷs wrong? Your complexion doesnвҖҷt look good?
KiryuвҖҰ HasumiвҖҰ What do you think love is?
Hah? Don't touch the koi9 in that river, they cost millions of yen.
HasumiвҖҷs dumbassery aside, Morisawa, why are you sayinвҖҷ things straight out of a shoujo manga. Get it together, this is outta character for you.
Sorry, Taishou. TaichouвҖҷs been actinвҖҷ strange for a while now. There was some kinda weird misunderstanding when he saw Sengoku-kun and Anzu-anego hugging each other. As they said themselves, it's the same as when you hug Midori-kun and stuff, Taichou. ItвҖҷs just skinship.10 ItвҖҷs not love or anything, right?
MmnghвҖҰ I know, but it was so shocking, even IвҖҷm surprised by my reactionвҖҰ Right, AnzuвҖҷs a girlвҖҰ And weвҖҷre all healthy high school studentsвҖҰ Even if it were a millionth of a chance, thereвҖҷs still a possibility it could happen. I didn't take that into consideration, even though being an ally of justice means preparing for all kinds of situations. This time it was a misunderstanding, but someday it might not be a joke. I have to start thinking about what to do if that were to happenвҖҰ Ugh, but I'm not good at topics like this!
ryusei cho~p~вҷӘ Ryusei Ki~ckвҖҰвҷӘ
Ugya!? Wh-What are you two doing all of a sudden!? I'm against violence...!
Hey, you canвҖҷt slack off when youвҖҷre the one who always acts big and tells me to concentrateвҖҰ And besidesвҖҰ you always try to solve everything yourselfвҖҰ But nobody ever asked you to do thatвҖҰ How many times do I have to tell you not to carry the burden all by yourself...?
that's right~ [helping when nobody ever asked] may be the hero's [duty], but chiaki is no longer [alone], right? iвҖҷm here, and so is everyone else. the five of us together are [ryuseitai]. please don't be conceited and think you're [fighting] all by yourself~вҷӘ
Translation Notes вҶ‘ Kuro often refers to Keito as ж—ҰйӮЈ (danna, lit. master ), or "boss". He'll also use Hasumi-no-danna.вҶ‘ йҒ“е ҙз ҙгӮҠ (dojoyaburi, lit. dojo storming ). In martial arts, this is when someone visits rival martial arts schools and challenges its members to assert dominance over whose technique is better. If the dojo lost, its apprentices would abandon it for the winner's school. Read more here.вҶ‘ If you're new to AKATSUKI stories, Souma's running gag is regularly resorting to performing seppuku to make up for trouble. еҲҮи…№ (seppuku or harakiri, lit. belly-cutting ) was a form of ritualistic suicide samurai used for a variety of reasons. For Souma, that tends to be shame. Here, Souma got a little creative and threatened еҚҒеӯ—еүІи…№ (juuji kappuku).вҶ‘ дәәйҰ¬дёҖдҪ“ (jinba ittai, lit. person + horse + one body/unity ) is an idiom in four-character compound form.вҶ‘ жӯЈеә§ (seiza, lit. proper sitting ) is a formal, traditional way of sitting, commonly used in martial arts, tea-ceremony, etc. It was developed among samurai in the Edo period. Its difficult to maintain for long periods of time, so Keito's using it as both a punishment, and a manner of getting Souma to sit still so he can lecture him. It's also a way for Souma to convey his respect. Read more hereвҶ‘ д»ӢйҢҜ (kaishaku) is a secondary role to the act of seppuku. An appointed second person beheads the one who has committed seppuku to spare them from prolonged anguish. This is typically reserved for samurai who choose seppuku for the sake of honor, rather than shame.вҶ‘ Another four-character compound, жҷӮд»ЈйҢҜиӘӨ (jidai sakugo, lit. age, era + error, mistake ), meaning anachronism, or a person/thing that seems to belong to a different time periodвҶ‘ The Sengoku period (жҲҰеӣҪжҷӮд»Ј) is the backdrop for Scroll of the Elements, Shinobu and Souma's characters as a whole: for starters, it's a homonym for Shinobu's last name д»ҷзҹі (sengoku).вҶ‘ A callback to their first meeting, in the Samurai and Ninjas idol storyвҶ‘ Chiaki used the word жҒӢ (koi) for romantic love. Keito thought he said йҜү (koi), the fish.вҶ‘ гӮ№гӮӯгғігӮ·гғғгғ— (wordplay on skin and kinship) is the general idea that people socially bond through physical skin-to-skin contact, especially family and loved ones. It also applies to spending time together naked, like at bathhouses, where more general groups of people like coworkers or classmates platonically bond.

entry.title: Scroll of the Wind
entry.content:
Chapter 1
Location: AV Room
MhmhmвҖҰ I see! I understand perfectly! In shortвҖҰвҖ” you want to discuss Carranger, Sengoku! вҖ“ No! Is it Ninjar? Or Sekai Ninja Sen JiraiyaвҖ“ Wait, I got it! Maybe Henshin Ninja ArashiвҖҰ!? NoвҖ“ is it possibly Science Ninja Team GachamanвҖҰ? Which is it? Which one do you want to talk about Sengoku?!
Sengoku, what language has this person been speaking in?
ItвҖҷs probably Japanese, but you donвҖҷt need to pay attention to what Taichou-donoвҖҷs saying right now. Frankly speaking, heвҖҷs saying things that donвҖҷt make a lot of sense.
nn~ itвҖҷs noisy, isnвҖҷt itвҖҰ~?
OhвҖ“! Buchou-dono!1 I see that youвҖҷre in a good mood as always~вҷӘ
actually, iвҖҷm not~ today was supposed to be a [day off]2, but we were [called in] anyway~ iвҖҷm annoyed~
Now, now, donвҖҷt say that! Let us rejoice together, Kanata! That shy Sengoku raised his voice and said вҖңI want to participate in this project!вҖқ all by himself! Ahh, IвҖҷm so happyвҖҰ! Today will become a day to remember for RYUSEITAIвҖҰвҳҶ
No, umm, Taichou-donoвҖҰ WasnвҖҷt I a little too assertive by asking thatвҖҰ? Ninjas are my own personal interest, after all. I feel a little sorry to make everyone in RYUSEITAI go along with it.
youвҖҷre so reserved, shinobu ~ ItвҖҷs one for all~вҷӘ
And all for one! ThatвҖҷs RYUSEITAI! Fwahahaha!вҳҶ If anything, everyone usually goes along with my principles, so... IвҖҷve been wanting to prioritize what everyone else wants to do every once in a while.
itвҖҷs not as if weвҖҷre being forced to [go along with you], chiaki~ because for me, i am doing what [i want to do].
Ahaha. When you say it like that, it saves me some face, butвҖҰ Takamine, Nagumo вҖ” Follow SengokuвҖҷs example. If thereвҖҷs something you want to do, say it without any hesitation! I will always welcome it! вҷӘ
Something I want to doвҖҰ Okay then, can I go home alreadyвҖҰ? вҷӘ
I knew youвҖҷd say that! I just knew youвҖҷd say that! Midori-kun, werenвҖҷt you complaininвҖҷ that youвҖҷre bored вҖҳcause thereвҖҷs no RYUSEITAI activities? If youвҖҷre gonna sit at home with too much time on your hands, then you might as well face some difficulties!
Speaking of which, I wanna do something like Taishou did the other day in the Quarrel Festival! It was so manly and sparks were flyinвҖҷ everywhere from the clash! I was so jealous~вҷӘ
Yeah. We werenвҖҷt really able to participate in the Quarrel Festival beyond livening up the crowdвҖҰ It might be a good idea to do it properly. IвҖҷll take note of that opinion.
[quarrel festival] was violent. i [didnвҖҷt like] itвҖҰ~ fighting is [no good]. canвҖҷt we get along instead?
Heh. Sometimes exchanging fists is also part of friendship, Buchou-dono. A true blade is forged by striking it over and over again until sparks flyвҖҰвҷӘ
speaking as if you understandвҖҰ well, [what happens next] matters more than [what has already happened]~ shinobu, what sort of [dreamfes] do you want to [participate] in?
Errr, wellвҖҰ Anzu-dono has prepared copies of the proposal and announcement posters for everyone, so IвҖҷll hand them out вҷӘ
IвҖҷll help you, Sengoku-kun~ Anzu-Anego, thank you for your hard work вҷӘ
HmmвҖҰ Is this request coming from outside the school? An unveiling ceremony for a new attraction at a tourist spotвҖҰ вҖңIf possible, we would like multiple popular units to appear.вҖқ
So since itвҖҷs a unit-based job, Sengoku couldnвҖҷt do it on his own, and he came to consult me... Achieving this goal with this budget seems like a challenge, though.
AaahвҖҰ so it really is impossibleвҖҰ? Anzu-dono was also really worried about what to do, given that itвҖҷs such an unreasonable request on her~
Heh. Never fear, SengokuвҖ“ An ally of justice makes the impossible possible!
Um, AKATSUKIвҖҷsвҖҰ Kanzaki-kun, right? Could I have a moment with you?
Mm? Me? ThatвҖҷs fine, say whatever you want.
Yes. Would it be possible to wedge AKATSUKI into this project? If Hasumi were to have a hand in this, I know he could make even an impossible plan come to fruition. If the student council were to authorize it as an official DreamFes, weвҖҷd be able to get additional funding. ThatвҖҷs a feasible way we could make it happen. Your presence here is somewhat like fate. IвҖҷd be glad if we could have your cooperation.
I seeвҖҰ I too want to make SengokuвҖҷs dream come true. IвҖҷll try and put in a good word for him. Hasumi-dono is a little busy right now, so I donвҖҷt want to burden him too much. But Hasumi-dono is a person deeply filled with compassion and virtue. Even if he canвҖҷt fully get involved, I'm confident he will offer some insight. I will rush to the student council room to speak with him at onceвҖ“!
Wait. We might as well go together since Hasumi and I get along too. Anzu, please come with us as well. YouвҖҷre in charge of this project, arenвҖҷt you? And Sengoku, you too. YouвҖҷre the one with the most enthusiasm for this project. If youвҖҷre with us, itвҖҷll be easier to persuade Hasumi.
Indeed. After all, Hasumi-dono is an empathetic soul! I see you understand him very well вҷӘ
WeвҖҷre classmates, after all. As for everyone else, I know it was a lot of trouble to come in and IвҖҷm sorry for that, butвҖҰ it's okay to call it a day and disband for now. IвҖҷll keep you updated if thereвҖҷs any progress.
No way, IвҖҷm coming with you too! It might be a nuisance if too many people crowd the room, but since IвҖҷve got no club activities today, I have some free time. вҖ“ вҖҰCвҖҷmon, Midori-kun, donвҖҷt just go home, вҖҳkay~?
EhhвҖҰ? DidnвҖҷt he just say вҖңdisbandвҖқвҖҰ?
now nowвҖҰletвҖҷs all go [together], midoriвҖҰ~ the five of us together make [ryuseitai]. as long as everyone is there, any [miracle] can be performed вҷӘ
Chapter 2
Location: Student Council Room
HmвҖҰ I see. I get the gist of it.
Eh? You could understand the situation with such little explanation? As expected of Hasumi-dono~вҷӘ
DonвҖҷt be too liberal with flattery, Kanzaki. ItвҖҷll make you look cheap. At any rate, day after dayвҖҰ Like Prince Shotoku3, I work on multiple proposals at the same time, making adjustments while listening to a variety of opinions. This much I can do with ease. Morisawa had a clear grasp of the proposalвҖҷs outline and its main purpose. Even a monkey would understand it if it heard from this guy and filled in the gaps on its own.
Fwahaha! I donвҖҷt really follow, but I can tell youвҖҷre praising me! Thank you, HasumiвҖҰвҳҶ
IвҖҷm not praising you. ItвҖҷs just a simple fact. Nevertheless, donвҖҷt make too much noise in the student council room. ItвҖҷs partly my fault, but these days the student council seems to be looked down upon. Just thinking of people perceiving us as a group of idiots makes me angry, so we have to buckle down. We have to maintain order in a disciplined, serious fashion. WeвҖҷll just lose face if we take initiative and make a ridiculous scene.
The way you word things is a little tricky, HasumiвҖҰ To put it simply, what do you mean by that? This project is about ninjas rampaging through a castle. It could turn up looking something like foolish horseplay. Given AKATSUKIвҖҷs focus on strict, traditional performance, do you think itвҖҷll even be possible for the concept to fit in with AKATSUKIвҖҷs image?
If possible, IвҖҷd like to do something like a joint live performance between RYUSEITAI and AKATSUKI, but... I can't force you. If you guys say no, then that's that.
Did you forget that the other day, we were the protagonists of the raucous commotion of historic proportion called the Quarrel Festival? Tradition is not just about adhering to the formal and strict relics of ancient times. Ukiyo-e, now highly regarded around the world, was originally considered to have as much artistic value as tissue paper. It became an art from the changes of the period and the efforts of our predecessors.
In a former age, TV, games, and even idols were ridiculed and looked down upon as tacky. But now their statuses have risen, and theyвҖҷve all become major industries. Now, in our modern day, even the things that are looked down upon as vulgar or commonplace... With time and effort, they become art. For future generations, it may even be appreciated as part of traditional culture.
NinjasвҖҰ ArenвҖҷt they splendid? Since it has an air of Japanese style, we can incorporate it within the context of AKATSUKI. It will strengthen the approachability that we lack. Of course, it wonвҖҷt be easyвҖҰ but if done well, I think it would be a mutually beneficial proposal.
IвҖҷll formalize some official paperwork, approve it as a DreamFes, and formulate a budget. IвҖҷll have to adjust my schedule as wellвҖҰ and contact KiryuвҖҰ
He gets into some surprisingly bad behavior when he has free time on his hands.
U-UmвҖ”!
Hm? WhatвҖҷs the matterвҖҰ Sengoku, is it? Is there something you want to say?
No, umвҖҰ So, you like ninjas? ThatвҖҷs unexpected~вҷӘ
There is no boy out there who doesn't like ninjas or dinosaurs. I heard that you're hosting a Ninja Association of some kind. You are the lord of one country and one castle. Since you manage it without the help of anyone else, be more resolute. IsaraвҖҷs been worried, so even though club activities are just a hobby, you should give it all your might.
Ah, yes! This time at least, IвҖҷll do my best to move everything forward~вҷӘ
Yes, keep at it. The same goes for this project вҖ” If we say it was done with the full cooperation of the Ninja Association, itвҖҷll be a part of its records. Since IвҖҷll be drafting documents along those lines already, IвҖҷd like you to prepare necessary materials. WeвҖҷre already halfway into this school term, so I suppose you canвҖҷt expect any new members, but... You're a first-year student. If you create a track record now, youвҖҷll have that next year and circumstances will change.
It's an investment into the future. Depending on the results, it could serve as a good promotion for your club activities. So, well, make sure to work hard.
I understand! Uwaaa, I'm so happy! You're thinking about me properly~вҷӘ
Hmph... Since this is your own project, lead it, and consult with Morisawa throughout. Kanzaki, as AKATSUKIвҖҷs representative, you will cooperate with RYUSEITAI and ensure things go smoothly. As you know, I'm fairly busy. As we speak, my overall progress is slowing down. I want to leave things to you when I can. I'll practice properly and make sure it's perfect by the time of the actual performance, but I don't want any extra work in the meantime.
KanzakiвҖҰ You canвҖҷt rely upon me and Kiryu forever. Sometimes it's good to be the man in front. This time, the fate of AKATSUKI is entrusted to you.
Don't get too reckless, or itвҖҷll just cause trouble for everyone. Try your absolute best, you can do it.
MвҖ“ Mm! I will do my best! Oh, my blood is searing! Cheer for me, Sengoku! I have been entrusted with a role IвҖҷve never had before! Please tell me anything, I will fully cooperate as the leader of AKATSUKI! вҷӘ
Yeah! If itвҖҷs Kanzaki-dono, itвҖҷll be like I have the power of a hundred people helping me~вҷӘ
You two are good friends, huh... Well, that's all for now. Start moving quickly. Before you know it, time will pass and itвҖҷll be the day of the actual performance. I'll take care of my work as soon as possible and join you when itвҖҷs done.
Mm! It's time to conquer, and the journey of a thousand miles starts with a single step! Kanzaki Souma, pushing onward...вҳҶ
(Heheh. He's so excited, that Kanzaki). (Up to this point, Kiryu and I have done everything in AKATSUKI. ItвҖҷs not his fault, butвҖҰ unfortunately, in all that time, that guy never really had to bear the brunt of anything). (We won't be here next year, so Kanzaki must study hard so that he can stand on his own when the time comes).
(Ah, I can't help but tear up... I wonder if this is what it's like when your children become independent). (I feel lonely, but I'm proud. Do your best, Kanzaki, I'll always be on your side).
Chapter 3
Location: Garden Terrace
Alright. For the most part, itвҖҷs coming together. The name of the DreamFes is вҖңScroll of the ElementsвҖқ, and itвҖҷll be a joint live performance between RYUSEITAI and AKATSUKI. The theme is вҖңninjasвҖқ. It seems they want to do a tie-in with a movie if possible.
Due to copyright issues, we canвҖҷt really use movie lines verbatim, but... Well, design-wise, we should keep to the theme as best we can. The performance doesnвҖҷt need to be a musical-esque narrative either. Regardless, I'm sure fans of the movie will come to see it, so I'd like to take the initiative to incorporate its trademark lines.
The DreamFes venue is a tourist spot that recreates the world of period dramas. It gets used for movie shootings, too. Additionally, the sponsor will be the event organizers at the site. The organizers have the personnel and know-how to manage stage production, so we can just give our input and leave it to them. Hasumi and I will handle the negotiations.
The purpose of the live show is to attract tourists to the venue and promote newly opened attractions and facilities. Admission will be free. It seems that the profit will come from limited-edition merchandise. IвҖҷll leave the preparation of goods and the like to Anzu. ItвҖҷs her specialty, and she seems to have connections.
IвҖҷll also ask Anzu to handle discussions about the goods. If you have any trouble, Anzu, Hasumi and I are willing to help you. I want you all to tell her your opinions about the kinds of merchandise that would work.
When it comes to merchandise, how about yuru-charactersвҖҰ?4 вҷӘ Anzu-san, what kind of mascot characters does the tourist spot haveвҖҰ? Every tourist spot has one these daysвҖҰ
AhвҖҰ A cute ninja called вҖңHanzoumonвҖқ...? As in, Hanzou-mon? ItвҖҷs like a vague combination of the names of the famous ninja Hattori Hanzou5 and the famous yuru-chara Kumamon, huhвҖҰ? вҷӘ
Ah, Takamine, sorry. Your captain is talking right now, so please be quiet.
Ehh...? Even though you never listen whenever I tell you to shut up...?
Ahaha... Anyway, most guests at tourist destinations arenвҖҷt usually interested in idols. Of course, our fans will come to see us, but for the most part, the audience will be the general public. There will be a lot of older people who don't know about the unspoken etiquette of idol concerts, so... WeвҖҷll have to be careful about how we present ourselves. Be mindful of your words and actions and be considerate. Give thorough explanations.
If things go well, we'll be able to attract new fans out of the people who don't normally have anything to do with us. Good luck, everyone. Hip, hip, hooray! вҷӘ
Hip, hip, hooray! вҷӘ I'll check with Hasumi-dono, but I don't think there's any problem with AKATSUKI going in that direction. Now that the outline has been decided, I would like to work out the specific content of the вҖңraibuвҖқ6.
Sounds good. Sengoku is the one who knows a lot about ninjas, so I'll leave it to him from here on out. Ah~... I'm a little worn out after such a lively discussion. I'm parched.
I've made some tea, so please help yourself. There are also teacakes IвҖҷve made by hand.
souma, youвҖҷre getting [better and better] at cooking, arenвҖҷt youвҖҰ~?
Cooking aside, IвҖҷve practiced conducting tea ceremonies since I was a child. It's a samurai tradition... Though, I donвҖҷt feel that it matches the Western-style atmosphere of вҖңGaaden TerasuвҖқ.
Chapter 4
Anyway, everyone, help yourselves to some refreshments.
Wow! Thank you so much~ I used my brain a lot today, so itвҖҷs craving sugar~вҷӘ
I am the same way. I should try to think for myself without leaving things to my seniors more oftenвҖҰ However, they say that it's difficult to tell a poor thinker from a sleeping one.
ahaha. as a [senior], i would like you to try [thinking] for yourself a little more. [leaving everything up to us] entirely is a lot of [responsibility], which is [frightening].
Yeah. I think so too. But Kanzaki-kun is a second year student. He has solid opinions, a lot of experience, and heвҖҷs reliable. His input was pretty helpful. Thanks to him, Scroll of the Elements is coming together surprisingly smoothly.
Haha, I feel somewhat bashful. Kiryu-dono is delayed in joining us, and Hasumi-dono can't take his hands off student council duties, so... As the representative of AKATSUKI, I shouldnвҖҷt do anything embarrassing.
how admirable, souma. good boy, good boyвҖҰвҷӘ7
Huh? Buchou-dono is extremely kind todayвҖҰ! But he always treats me rather harshly, so it's actually kind of scaryвҖҰ? No, but I understand that the usual is a matter of tough love!
ufufu. if you always acted [seriously], i wouldnвҖҷt be so [unkind] to you, eitherвҖҰ~вҷӘ
Uuu... I always try to be serious, thoughвҖҰ
ThatвҖҷs not fair~! Shinkai-dono, youвҖҷre being really nice to your clubвҖҷs underclassman, huh~? i am always [kind]~. [clubs] and [units] are different. if i had the same [attitude] for both, itвҖҷd be [weird], wouldnвҖҷt it?
Nghhh, I want Taishou8 to pat my head and call me a good kid, too. Um, Kanzaki-senpai, Taishou seems like heвҖҷs busyвҖҰ I wonder where he is right now; whatвҖҷs he been doingвҖҰ?
Haven't you heard? Lately, Kiryu-donoвҖҷs been participating in a multitude of вҖңB1вҖқ' tournaments out of the blue. You see, one of his classmates has asked him to appear to help.9 Though this is our decompression period, he said that if he has nothing to do, he will inevitably get out of shapeвҖҰ After all, that man is a warrior at heart. Additionally, we, AKATSUKI, have always ruled as statesmen, and have only ever competed against weak opponents. Therefore, itвҖҷs likely he wanted to dress up as a footsoldier and crawl through the mud to gauge the atmosphere of the front lines. Otherwise, our perceptions will gradually deviate from reality.
If you settle for turning away from battle and hiding in basecamp, you will lose your survival instinct and miscalculate the real state of affairs. That sort of thing is what he seems to think, anyway. I agree with Kiryu-dono, and IвҖҷm proud of him. The two of us are lucky to have a great seniorвҷӘ
U~myuвҖҰ If that's how it is, I wish heвҖҷd invited me too. Is it unmanly to think that way?
But TaishouвҖҷs way of life really is cool after all~вҷӘ ItвҖҷs been a while since TaishouвҖҷs gone around operating solo... Ahh, IвҖҷd love to see that valiant figure. Can I go watch his match for a liвҖҷl while?
After we finish having this discussion. You and Sengoku are both first years, so support him. For having peers you can walk alongside with is something to be very thankful for.
Translation Notes вҶ‘ Souma refers to Kanata as йғЁй•· (buchou, lit. chief ), or club president (Kanata's position in their club).вҶ‘ Kanata's dialogue is completely in hiragana, likely to emphasize his slow, relaxed way of speaking. Some words are in brackets likely due to Japanese being difficult to read in full hiragana (it would be like reading English sentences without spaces between words).вҶ‘ An influential leader from the 6th-7th centuries, Prince Shotoku is credited with modernizing government administration. He is also considered foundational for the spread of Buddhism in Japan. Read more here.вҶ‘ From з·©гҒ„ (loose, laid-back) + гғһгӮ№гӮігғғгғҲгӮӯгғЈгғ©гӮҜгӮҝ (mascot character), гӮҶгӮӢгӮӯгғЈгғ© (yuruchara) are Japanese mascots. Yuru-chara are typically made to resemble and promote specific places, events or businesses. Their designs tend to be cute and sloppy. It's kind of Midori's whole life. Read more here.вҶ‘ A famous Sengoku-era ninja. Hanzou served Tokugawa Ieyasu, one of Japan's three Great Unifiers. Read more about Hanzou here.вҶ‘ In Japanese, words from other languages (such as English) are typically rendered in katakana. However, when Souma uses katakana words, they are all written in hiragana instead, likely to emphasize how he struggles with foreign words. These words are kept as written in hiragana, and put in "quotes".вҶ‘ гҒ„гҒ„еӯҗ гҒ„гҒ„еӯҗ ("good kid, good kid") often includes head patting. There will be a lot of this.вҶ‘ Tetora refers to Kuro as еӨ§е°Ҷ (taishou, lit. large general ), or boss. Not to be confused with Chiaki's йҡҠй•· (taichou).вҶ‘ This is likely about Kuro's work with Knights Killers, a temporary unit put together by Leo Tsukinaga. The story they appear in also happens during autumn.

entry.title: Warriors of Stormy Times
entry.content:
Chapter 1
Location: Scroll of the Elements Stage
Right, gentlemen. Are you all ready? Well then, let's go~вҷӘ An unprecedented gamble, where anything can happenвҖ” AKATSUKI and RYUSEITAI, a collaboration seen only in dreams! The curtain rises, and Scroll of the Elements is about to begin...!
вҖңIt's the Age of Warring States, the era of rival factionsвҖҰ A small, peaceful and quiet country lies nestled in the cool shade of a mountain pass. Here, seeing the world is beyond oneвҖҷs wildest dreams. Here, a strange incident has occurred.вҖқ вҖңAn impregnable mountain castle, protected by natural fortresses. Every day, the security guards sit cross-legged on its sturdy ground, careless with their duties. Taking advantage of those negligent security guardsвҖҰвҖқ вҖңA suspicious shadow is trying to sneak in.вҖқ
(Ohh... As expected of Sengoku, youвҖҷre living up to the name of a Broadcasting Committee member. You speak quite fluently, with confidence.) (Your tone is easy and clear to the earsвҖҰ What a pleasant voice to listen to.)
(Heheh, I practiced a lot for this~вҷӘ) (Excuse me, Kanzaki-dono... my turn is coming, so I'll hand over the narration to you.) (Please make our first appearance as exciting as possible~вҷӘ)
(Understood. I am also used to this kind of role.) вҖңCome now, the main characters have made their entrance! Take a close look at todayвҖҷs brave heroes!вҖқ
вҖңOne~! I want to be the one to stand out from the crowd!вҖқ
TwoвҖҰ~ To tell you the truth, I just wanna hideвҖҰвҖқ
вҖңThree! WeвҖҷre already going three different directions, huh~?вҖқ
вҖңFour! I donвҖҷt really follow, but not a problem, for we are close friends~вҷӘвҖқ
вҖңFive! The five of us together are RYUSEITAIвҖҰвҳҶвҖқ
вҖңOh, what could that be? Is it a bird? Is it an airplane? No, itвҖҷs a ninja!вҖқ (HmmmвҖҰ It's the Sengoku period, so is it really alright to say something like "airplane"?) (Although, there are also period dramas where they do peace signs, soвҖҰ?) (As long as the message gets across, then itвҖҷs fine. Noh and Kabuki use archaic words, so they arenвҖҷt able to convey even half of the fun for people without prior knowledge.) (The traditional performing arts may be like that, butвҖҰ) (We are вҖңaidoruвҖқ. AKATSUKI is a modern translation of a traditional art buried under the rubble of ancient timesвҖҰ) (Conveying that charm, making it shine as my weaponвҖҰ That's how I intend to spend this fleeting life.) (Without throwing out the antiques, we will give them flesh and blood, inherit them, channel them! It's the same for sumo, kendo, traditional Japanese dance, tea ceremonies, and that of course means ninjas, as well!) (Inheriting the culture from all kinds of traditional artsвҖҰ!) (We will become a bridge between the past and the future...!)
вҖңLanding, hup~вҷӘвҖқ (Hehe. I've grown used to stunts like this: like descending from a high place using rope work.) (In terms of setting, it is as if IвҖҷm flying in the sky with a kite and landing on the castle tower~вҷӘ) (Our mission is to invade the fortress and obtain the scroll that the lord of the castle is hiding in the tower.) (ItвҖҷs said that hidden there is evidence of the lordвҖҷs infidelity.) (We ninjas were deployed at the request of the lord's wife.) (A cheating investigation~? ItвҖҷs spy-like, so that means itвҖҷs also ninja-like. Plus, it makes it easier to understand for modern people, as well.) (After all, if they made the plot too serious, people would be turned off.) (The aim is to draw people in first with a bright and fun slapstick drama and then have them watch until the end.) (Scroll of the Elements can be viewed for free, so if you leave in the middle, your pockets won't be hurt...) (However, it would be a bit of a shame if people went home.) (The introduction, development, plot twist and conclusion. Slow, into an accelerando, and then the finale*.* Savor every bit of it! I would be happy if you could fall in love with ninjas, even just a little~вҷӘ) (I was accepted, and my вҖңloveвҖқ was affirmed!) (Even if itвҖҷs only by the kind members of Yumenosaki AcademyвҖҷs RYUSEITAI so far!) (One day, I will spread it to the whole world! Ninjas are a single miracle that shined in me вҖ” someone who had spent a gloomy youth all the way until high school started!) (вҖңThis is how it is as a ninja, for ninjas love solitude, love the dark, love frogsвҖқ...) (That was my excuse to get by at first, yet I was saved regardless.) (That is why I hope that someone who is living gloomy days like I once was will find the same salvation as I have!) (That is my wish, my dream! I will deliver it with all my heart and soul!) (After all, I love ninjas...вҳҶ Until everyone shares that "love" with me, I canвҖҷt keep hiding in darkness!) (Wearing colorful and flashy costumes, we will continue to sing and dance on stage~!)
Chapter 2
вҖңвҷӘпҪһвҷӘпҪһвҷӘвҖқ
(OhhвҖҰ Sengoku, you've completely let go. You're always reserved, or rather, you tend to retreat behind everyone elseвҖҰ) (Yet your eyes are sparkling right now. You really like ninjas, don't you? It's wonderful to have something you like.) (If you have that вҖңloveвҖқ, then your life вҖ” this whole world will be even brighter.) (That brilliance may make someone's dreams come true, like a shooting star.) (It could become a ray of hope for someone walking down an alley at night with their head downвҖҰ It could even become a miracle of its own.) (No. Let's form the trajectory for that miracle together.) вҖңвҷӘпҪһвҷӘпҪһвҷӘвҖқ
(SenpaiвҖҰ Uh, I know youвҖҷre getting emotional right now, but arenвҖҷt you forgetting what you have to doвҖҰ?)
(Ohh, sorry. It's a bad habit of mine. When I'm happy, I get so excited that my mind goes blank. Thank you for warning me, Takamine~вҷӘ)
(I didnвҖҷt say anything particularly specialвҖҰ I usually blank out on stage, too, and I end up standing like a deer in headlights...) (At times like that, everyone is always there to back me up, right...?) (Even if it's just that much, I'll repay the favor... I have to clear up those debts properly, or else I'll feel uneasy...)
(Yeah, you're a good kid, Takamine~вҷӘ That's wonderful, the good you do for others is good you do yourself...! All for one, and one for all!)
(Midori-kun, stand back for a sec. Taichou's gonna do some crazy stunt to blow a hole in the tower and break in.) (It uses gunpowder, so if you're too close, you'll get hit too.)
(Mm, I knowвҖҰ Then the castle will catch fire, and we panicвҖҰ Shinkai-senpai tries to extinguish the fire and creates a muddy stream...) (And then we all get swept away by it, rightвҖҰ) (The lyrics, production, and movements were all set so that the audience could understand whatвҖҷs happening without needing an explanation...) (It's pretty amazing, isn't it? It's slapstick and funny...вҷӘ) (If I could have, I would have loved to experience it as an audience member...вҷӘ)
(Ahaha, it's the customer's privilege to have fun. But there's no rule that says we can't have fun, right?) (GuuhhhвҖ“! Every single timeвҖҰ The stage gets me psyched! IвҖҷm fired up~! вҷӘ) вҖңвҷӘпҪһвҷӘпҪһвҷӘвҖқ
вҖңвҷӘпҪһвҷӘпҪһвҷӘвҖқ
(Mhm. Sengoku is obviously more lively this time, but Nagumo and Takamine have grown significantly since the first time weвҖҷve met, too.) (For Nagumo, he lost his bad habit of rushing ahead.) (And for Takamine, he is able to take in his surroundings well enough to give me a heads up. This is a great sign, it's absolutely wonderful.) (It would be pathetic if I dragged everyone down here, so I'll show you how cool I am as your captain.)
вҖңWe have no other choiceвҖ” let's blast it open! Ninpou: Blazing Escape Technique...вҳҶвҖқ (While making comical movements of panic to indicate that вҖңOh no! ItвҖҷs causing a fire!вҖқвҖҰ The song and melody continuesвҖ” is that rightвҖҰ?) (I was given some acting guidance, so I wonder if IвҖҷm managing to perform everything naturallyвҖҰ?) (ItвҖҷs a pretty busy performance, with so much to do. But, well, period dramas are the distant ancestors of tokusatsu...) (For the land that gave birth to the heroes I love, I hope I can help cultivate the soil again.) (Times change and people change, but the voices of people who love justice and desire peace should be respected! Let's fight for that together, everyone~вҷӘ) вҖңвҷӘпҪһвҷӘпҪһвҷӘвҖқ
вҖңвҷӘпҪһвҷӘпҪһвҷӘвҖқ (wawaвҖ”... i canвҖҷt handle the heat... it's real [gunpowder], thatвҖҷs for sure. it's dangerous.) (iвҖҷll become [grilled fish]~, i have to hurry and [extinguish] it.)
"ninpou: water escape techniqueпҪһвҷӘвҖқ
(ohhвҖҰ the [water] is flowing in, my skin feels [moisturized]~вҷӘ) (most of the [water] is for [show], but [fire extinguishing] foam is being [sprayed] everywhere at the same time...) (and in the blink of an eye, the [fire] goes out.) (i wonder what kind of [mechanism] theyвҖҷre usingвҖҰ they did explain it, but it was [beyond my comprehension].) (this is the [art] of [special effects], huh~ it's like [magic].) ([we] couldn't use [magic]. even though we were called something akin to [supernatural creatures]...) (we had no [means] to resist the bitter [reality].) (but, i am still alive. in this realityвҖҰ i have found a [means] to survive вҖ” a [place to belong].) (feeling happy for being acceptedвҖҰ itвҖҷs not just you, shinobu.) (i was ostracized, and then driven [far away] from the [stars] in the night sky.) (but, there was someone who went so far as to stretch his hand out to me.) (i donвҖҷt [regret] grasping that [hand] tightly. sometimes it is so hot that it can be [uncomfortable], butвҖҰ.) (i was in the cold, icy [sea] soвҖҰ fortunately, it feels warm.) (it fits just right, iвҖҷm [comfortable] like this.) (puka, pukaвҖҰвҷӘ)
Chapter 3
вҖңвҷӘпҪһвҷӘпҪһвҷӘвҖқ (Alright. So far so good. LetвҖҷs start putting the finishing touches on it.) (The samurai working in the castle who rush to engage the idiotic ninjas вҖ” That's our role as AKATSUKI.) (The lord of the castle is taking excessive defensive measures to prevent the scroll вҖ“ evidence of an affair вҖ“ from being stolen.) (Numerous traps and devices toss the RYUSEITAI ninjas about.) (We also get caught up in the commotion and end up falling into a trap together, going every which way.) вҖңYouвҖҷll pay for this, you morons! I'll catch you and behead you~!вҖқ (Laughter everywhere... In the meantime, a strange friendship begins to develop between the ninja and the samurai, and there are more scenes of them escaping from pitfalls together.) (Rather than a true period drama, it should be seen as a skit based on that theme.) (I'm sure Eichi and Hibiki would be in hysterics if they saw it. I'm glad this was a joint live with RYUSEITAI instead of fine.) (Kyogen, monkey mawashi... Manzai, mandan, and rakugo are all traditional arts. Just because it's a comedy sketch doesnвҖҷt mean weвҖҷll cut corners. We'll do our best to accomplish it.) (If everything goes well, peopleвҖҷs impression of AKATSUKI will change drastically.) (Since it's not a play, everything is expressed through song and dance... At minimum, itвҖҷs supplemented with narration and such.) (The script was written by a professional, and the audience is able to understand it without any confusion.) (Our actions leave them on the edge of their seats, they sympathize, and they support us at times.) (ItвҖҷs a pleasant feeling... Live performances aren't a gamble where people win or lose. I feel like IвҖҷve remembered that now.) вҖңвҷӘпҪһвҷӘпҪһвҷӘвҖқ
вҖңвҷӘпҪһвҷӘпҪһвҷӘвҖқ
(Kiryu, I know you're having fun, but... Please keep the fun to that level.) (You guys are the only ones whose actions are too showy. You're nearly eating up Kanzaki and Sengoku's stage presence.)
(Ah, that's right. The climax is gonna be a spotlight on those two, so we shouldn't get in the way.) (Let's retreat for now, Tetsu.)
(Ossu! IвҖҷm overwhelmed with emotion that I got to join forces with Taishou~! вҷӘ)
(Haha. Looks like you didn't neglect your training even while I was away.) (You seem to imitate me all the time, so I wanted you to step away вҖҳn look at yourself again, Tetsu.) (Do you really just wanna be me? No, right? Then find your own path as a man~вҷӘ)
(Ossu, I'll keep that in mind! So that's what Taishou had in mind all along...) (I was real anxious that you started hating me or kept your distance from me вҖҳcause I was annoying you!)
(Sorry. I felt like over-pampering you wouldnвҖҷt be a good idea.) (Don't become a copy of me... Absorb me and MorisawaвҖҷs good pointsвҖ” everyone's good points and become a great man.)
(I told you already, you canвҖҷt have your little tryst forever, wrap it up... It's your turn, Kanzaki, are you ready?) (Timing is essential, make sure you make me say вҖңsplendid!вҖқ вҷӘ)
(Mm, I'll do my best. But Hasumi-dono, is it okay for me to be in charge of the final scene?) (I'm confused because I was only informed about this last minute, and I'm worried I haven't practiced enough...?)
(Give it a shot. Anything can happen if you try, and nothing will happen if you don'tвҖҰ ThatвҖҷs how it goes.) (I don't mean to copy KiryuвҖҷs words, but it won't work if I just spoil you. Man up, Kanzaki.)
(Mm, alright. I can't face the sun with pride if I only hesitate after having been encouraged so much. Leave it to me, Hasumi-donoвҖ”) (I will never do anything that would betray your trust.) (I will repay your kindness with service. That is my pride, the Japanese valor that I have inherited from my ancestors.) (Even if some people laugh at my old-fashioned values, my seniors praise me.) (To repay that kindness... Kanzaki Souma will pass through.) (Sengoku, are you ready?)
(Yeah, Kanzaki-dono! ItвҖҷs all OK, IвҖҷm ready to go any time~вҷӘ)
(It's a dangerous role, so are you sure youвҖҷll be fine? It's better not to overdo it because life is at stake here, alright?)
(Don't worry, I've practiced a lot! Leave it to me, nin-nin~вҷӘ) (...Ninjutsu and ninpou training are of no use in this modern era.) (IвҖҷve spent half my life being constantly scolded by everyone, who told me to do something more constructiveвҖ” something more realistic.) (I had been told that, instead of spending all my pocket money on shuriken or something, I should invest in my futureвҖ”) (That itвҖҷs more meaningful to memorize math formulas, chemical symbols, and kanji than to memorize tons of ninja namesвҖ”) (And that's actually true. Everyone's opinions are proper and correct.) (ButвҖҰ just because everyone is right doesn't mean I'm wrong.) (Everyone is different, everyone is good. That is what my comrades RYUSEITAI told me вҖ” and alongside them, I will put together a performance for the sake of adding beauty to the stage.) (Thinking about it, IвҖҷve accumulated so much training thus far just for this moment.) (That thought makes me feel rather satisfied and proud of myself.) (No, in factвҖҰ To the me from when I hadnвҖҷt yet started speaking like a ninja would...) (I want to tell the вҖңmeвҖқ from back then that nothing was ever in vain.)
(Is that so? In that case, I have nothing else to say here. Samurai and ninja are the same; anything you could say to a man with an expression like that is only wasted breath.) (Let's at least treat each other with sincerity.) (Now, like usual... Let's fulfill our duty, ninja of RYUSEITAI.)
(ThatвҖҷs just what I was hoping to hear from you, samurai of AKATSUKI~вҷӘ) (We each hold our own forms of justice up high.) (Kamen Rider and Super Sentai, Showa Rider and Heisei Rider... heroes of American comic book movies, tooвҖ”) (When all of them meet, they have conflicting opinions and clash. However, in the end, they join forces to fight a common enemy. That is the staple of these shows.) (Even if the place of birth is different, even if the color of justice is differentвҖ”) (We are surely aiming for the same thing! I will believe in that, and continue to fight in the name of love and peace today and onwardsвҖҰвҳҶ) вҖңвҷӘпҪһвҷӘпҪһвҷӘвҖқ
Chapter 4
вҖңвҷӘпҪһвҷӘпҪһвҷӘвҖқ (Now, itвҖҷs the вҖңkuraimakusuвҖқ. The ninjas persistently try to steal the scroll. Even when they slip up and get caught, they manage to free themselvesвҖҰ) (The ninjas run about, evading traps as they escape.) (We samurai are exhausted, though. Why do we have to work so hard to hide the evidence of our master's affairвҖҰ?) (Those sorts of thoughts start to get us a little irritated.) (On the way to the scroll, there is a rampage at a sake brewery, and alcohol is spilled. Everyone becomes inebriated and starts feeling tipsy.) (So they hold a partyвҖҰ and while complaining about their masters, the ninjas and samurai somehow begin to get along well in their excitement.) (In such a cheerful atmosphere, the sound of conch shells resounds, calling for war.) (That's right... All of it was a scheme plotted by a neighboring country. They watched like tigers, waiting to attack the castle as soon as the opportunity presented itself.) (They filled the wifeвҖҷs head with words of the lordвҖҷs infidelity, cultivating her suspicion.) (They prompted internal strife by splitting the castle in half.) (They must have thought that if things went well, ninjas hired by his furious wife would simply assassinate the lord.) (Even if it didnвҖҷt go that far, internal disputes would cause turmoil in the castleвҖҰ) (And because the ninjas had dismantled all of the traps and defenses, the castle is easier to attack.) (Thus, due to the scheme, the national power was to be reduced, and the castleвҖҷs military strength to be further reduced with the infighting...) (The castle was to be overrun by the approaching army of the neighboring country before we knew it.) (However, wellвҖҰ the ninjas are so inept, that time has passed without any proper results...) (So the army of the neighboring country becomes fed up with waiting, and begins their attack.) (However, the castle had been thrown into disorder to some extent, causing confusion...) (And while normally, it might have been possible to push through with momentum and take control of the castleвҖҰ) (A miscalculation occurs at that moment. In fact, if the castle lord truly was having an affair...) (Then there wouldвҖҷve been the likelihood that the wife, who wouldnвҖҷt listen to any excuseвҖҰ would have had her entire force, which was half of the castle, defect against the lord.)
(Mm. The lord of the neighboring country seemed to be especially enamored with this castle lordвҖҷs wife...) (It seems like he was planning to make this lordвҖҷs wife his own if things went well. That's why he told her about her husband's infidelity.)
(However, our lord was not having an affair. The scroll that was sealed in the secret room of the castle towerвҖҰ The scroll that he had stubbornly tried to hideвҖҰ)
(It was filled with a plethora of love poems written about his wife. A massive amount...) (It seemed that he didn't want people to see them, so in his embarrassment, he tried to hide it.) (After he reported this, the wife regrets suspecting his affair. The love between the lord and his wife deepens, and their vassals, ninjas and samurai, celebrate it with great joy.) (The only hindrance left is the approach of the neighboring countryвҖҷs army. The marauders who meddle with the happy ending вҖ” the love of a close coupleвҖҰ)
(... are destined to pay, and go crashing down into hell!) вҖңвҷӘпҪһвҷӘпҪһвҷӘвҖқ (Both the ninjas and samurai, exhausted from the slapstick drama, do their best to protect their beloved masters...) (ItвҖҷs a spectacular, legitimate performance of battle that vastly overshadows everything up to this point, that it makes you wonder вҖңwhy were they acting so incompetent earlier, then?вҖқ) (It's turning out as one would expect, but that's just the staple of period dramas!) (Making good use of the traps that had harassed them up until this point, and having fought each other, the ninjas and samurai rampage perfectly in sync!) (But the enemy is strong, and we are exhausted. One by one... My comrades fall, but I wonвҖҷt back down!) (As long as I have loyalty in my chest, my heart wonвҖҷt break, even if my sword does!)
(As the last surviving young samurai, my arrows run out. My sword breaks. I fallвҖҰ Then I pick up the sword of my great superior and stand once again.) вҖңHeavenвҖҷs vengeance is slow but sure!вҖқ вҖңYou ruffians who can't read the room вҖ” if you don't fear my military might, come at me...!вҖқ
(Wow... As expected of Kanzaki-dono, heвҖҷs so dignified! ItвҖҷs magnificent! It's a super duper cool, prominent show!) (He truly is a sight to behold. However, the night sky is lonely when there is only the moon.) (I, too, will accompany you! Even though I am in the shadows, I will fight to protect the peace of the people I love!) вҖңвҷӘпҪһвҷӘпҪһвҷӘвҖқ (There are only a few survivors from both the ninjas and samurai. Kanzaki-dono is fighting tooth-and-nail, but he won't be able to defeat the vast army by himself.) (That's why we need to drive back the enemy in one move.) (IвҖҷll take on that task. I will sneak into the enemy camp unseen and cut off the head of the general.) (If we defeat the leader, the enemy's army will either collapse or, at the very least, retreat. It will be our victory.) (Everyone who has fallen beforeвҖҰ their lives will not be in vain.) (Up until now, I've been an inexperienced ninja who only ever meekly follows everyoneвҖҷs backs... That was my role, but now, I have a spotlight scene for myself right at the very end.) (No, in factвҖҰ I always complain that it's embarrassing to stand out so much...) (Yet I have a place to belong now, given to me by everyone in RYUSEITAI.) (They allowed me to openly shout that I like the things I like.) (And then welcomed me as a comrade. They let me spend my youth with them laughing, crying, and getting angry together.) (If I were to run away from even that place... then that would truly be an embarrassment.) (I'm shy and spinelessвҖҰ If something scary happens again, I might cower back.) (But for now, while a blade is put on my heart, IвҖҷll face this adversity instead of running away.) (Taichou-dono! Shinkai-dono! Tetora:-kun! Midori-kun! I was there the whole time, yet to others, it never seemed that way!) (It never mattered to anyone whether I was there or not!)
(But it's completely different now! The five of us are RYUSEITAI! I'm going to keep living on here, too!) вҖңвҷӘпҪһвҷӘпҪһвҷӘвҖқ (Watch me closely! This is my secret finishing move, Ninpou: Ring of Fire Passageway...!) (Ahh, it's so fun and exhilarating!) (I never thought something like this would ever come in handy in my whole life! Even Buddha never expected it, a-hahahahaвҖҰ! вҳҶ)
Translation Notes вҶ‘ A reference to Pirate Festival.вҶ‘ It was more of the word of legends that ninjas would use kites for espionage, but they were used in ancient China for military purposes, among others. Kites were introduced from China to Japan in the seventh century. Read more here.вҶ‘ иө·жүҝи»ўзөҗ (kishoutenketsu) describes the structure of a narrative. In order, иө·еҸҘ (kiku) is the introduction of characters and context, жүҝеҸҘ (sho) is the development of the story towards и»ўеҸҘ (ten) the twist, where the story takes an unexpected development, and finally иҗҪгҒЎ (ketsu) the conclusion. еәҸз ҙжҖҘ (johakyu) refers to the speed at which events happen. It's typically applied to tea ceremonies, marital arts, or theatre, but I thought the speed of music would better represent what he's talking about.вҶ‘ This resembles his 5* Scout quote from !-era.вҶ‘ RYUSEITAI (жөҒжҳҹйҡҠ) means "shooting star squadron", so the comet imagery has to do with that.вҶ‘ He's referring to himself, the Eccentrics, and the events of Meteor Impact. He uses the word гҒ°гҒ‘гӮӮгҒ® (bakemono), which were supernatural creatures that could shapeshift.вҶ‘ жӯҰеЈ«йҒ“ (Bushido), or the "way of the warrior", is the moral code of samurai which dictate the way they carry about their lives. Historically, there were several different codes and practices that samurai would follow, but Bushido can be used as a catch-all for the variety of them. Read more here.вҶ‘ Here, Shinobu uses еғ• (boku), a common masculine first-person pronoun, to refer to his old self. Shinobu's first-person pronoun is typically жӢҷиҖ… (sessha, lit. clumsy person ), an archaic pronoun ninjas used. This whole line comes back in !!-era for Shinobu's Feature Scout story.вҶ‘ Souma finishes Shinobu's line. The full saying is from an Edo-era dodoitsu poem: "People who meddle in other's love affairs will get kicked by a horse".вҶ‘ In the original Japanese text, Chiaki says this same line to AKATSUKI when they reunite in Submarine. Cute.вҶ‘ A shogi reference.вҶ‘ A ninja saying. The kanji for еҝҚ (ninja) is comprised of a еҲғ (blade) on a еҝғ (heart). Conceptually, the two together represents the act of perserverence: even if there's a blade over their heart, they will get through. Now that's commitment to the bit. Read more here

entry.title: VS Audience Prologue
entry.content:
Characters
Writer
Akira
Translation
citrinesea
Proofreading
310mc
VS Audience Prologue
Season: Spring, ES's second year of establishment
Spring of ESвҖҷs second year of establishment, in the middle of May, NEW DI offices
IвҖҷm sorry, it looks like next monthвҖҷs photoshoot for the magazine feature has been canceled.
вҖҰ Hah?
What? What happened? They insisted that they wanted me to do the cover shots just the other day, didnвҖҷt they? They were the ones who requested for me to take it on, so what the hell happened?
IвҖҷm sorry. I only heard about it through the director, but it seems like the project was halted immediately. I heard that a famous idol from overseas was suddenly arranged to come to Japan вҖ” And that itвҖҷs even been decided that while that idol is in Japan, theyвҖҷll hijack a few Japanese magazines and have photoshoots for them. And so, under the higher-upsвҖҷ orders, it seems that your photoshoot will happen another time.
No way! No way, no way, no way no wayвҖҰ! What idol could they have wanted more than me? Who the hell is it?
This isnвҖҷt from a direct source either, so I canвҖҷt really be certain of its credibility, but... Apparently, theyвҖҷre an idol produced by Nice Arneb Thunder, an accomplished producer from overseas.
MELLOW DEAR USвҖҷs 1 Madoka Nozomi-kunвҖҰ Do you know them?
Madoka NozomiвҖҰ?2
Several days later
Izumi-chan. Did you see the message Tsukasa-chan sent?
Yeah. The one about wanting us to take part in 4piece, right?
ItвҖҷs basically all hands on deck to demonstrate the prestige of KnightsвҖҰ I think he said. Kasa-kun seriously just decides things all on his own without asking us, doesnвҖҷt he?
Ufufu. ItвҖҷs juuust like himвҖҰ DonвҖҷt you think? Like, that kid has a strong fighting instinct.
But 4piece seems to be an individual competition, so whether I'll participate or not is a different matter. The reward and the judging of the audition havenвҖҷt been made public, so it's a liiittle too shady for me. That NiceP guy was dressed weird tooв”Җ Hard pass for me.
What about you, Izumi-chan? With the way youвҖҷre talking, it doesnвҖҷt seem like youвҖҷre going to participate.
I will be, naturally.
YouвҖҷre right. ThereвҖҷs no benefit for the modeling group to participate, soдёҖ
Wait. Izumi-chan? Did you just say you'd participate?
On the contrary, why were you so sure I wouldnвҖҷt?
Izumi-chan, donвҖҷt you hate it when Tsukasa-chan decides what we do on his own? And now, he's done it again: he contacted us about participating, even passing it off as something mandatory. I thought for sure you wouldn't join?
I do whatever I want to. While Kasa-kunвҖҷs decision annoys me, I wouldвҖҷve participated with or without it. MELLOW DEAR US, was it? Because of all of them coming to Japan, my magazine assignment got canceled. Since that happened, participating's just the thing I need to kill time, right?
MELLOW DEAR US... Oh, that's the overseas unit everyone's been talking about lately. I think it passes itself off as some kind of international unit, and itвҖҷs produced by NiceP.
YouвҖҷre not holding a grudge and doing something like going to challenge NiceP, are you, Izumi-chan?
Who said IвҖҷm holding a grudge? I'm just going to prove that I can be active in that space! All I intend to do is make them recognize me as an individual, not just a member of Knights!
If you're that angry, I guess I'm right on the money.
In any case. If even Izumi-chanвҖҷs participating, IвҖҷll be the only member of Knights who isnвҖҷt going to be applying for 4piece. Since everyone else is going to do it, IвҖҷd have at least considered it, butвҖҰ IвҖҷve got a job thatвҖҷs already lined up, so thereвҖҷs nothing I can do, I canвҖҷt act independently.
On the bright side, I think itвҖҷs something like fate that your job was canceled, Izumi-chan. IвҖҷm expecting great results. YouвҖҷll do your best, wonвҖҷt you? If all the members of Knights get disqualified, I won't accept it~вҷӘ
Hmph. ThereвҖҷs no way that not one of us can break through and get selected. We just have to overwhelm everyone around us from beginning to end, and perform well enough to get our efforts recognized for all to see.
It's a large-scale audition with both established and debut idols coming together to compete, so I know it's not going to be that easy. But you canвҖҷt grab victory unless you're mentally prepared for all of it, right?
If I actually stood face-to-face with him, even NiceP would undoubtedly have to recognize my true strength. I'll prove to him myself that Japan has the best idols.
Translation Notes вҶ‘ MELLOW DEAR US is written as гғЎгғӯгӮҰгғ»гғҮгӮЈгӮўгғјгӮ№вҶ‘ Madoka is written with еҶҶ (mado; "round, full") and жһң (ka; "fruit, accomplishment, result"), while Nozomi is written with жңӣиҰӢ (nozomi; "hope, wish, desire").

entry.title: Hundred (Chapter 1вҖ“7)
entry.content:
Characters
Writer
Akira
Translation
citrinesea
Proofreading
310mc
Chapter 1
The first day of 4piece. Just before the opening of the auditions
Location: Dome Pathway
Whooa~! This venueвҖҷs suuuper big! It's seriously too bad we can't go in and see it...! Even the evaluation seems super large-scale!
Fufu. Are you surprised by the scope of this event? Thunderbolt is certainly a large international corporation, but you and I have just as much financial power to be able to execute the same feats. If we don't think that weвҖҷre capable of doing what an overseas company can do, then IвҖҷd worry about our future, mm?
Besides, if I may say so as someone in the same line of business, I don't think itвҖҷs acceptable to prepare a facility of this scale just for the sake of 4piece. It's a gaudy, tasteless structure, built to show off the power of Thunderbolt.
Fufufu, itвҖҷs less like the words of someone in the same business, and more like slander at this point! The way you speak about it makes it seem as if you donвҖҷt take Thunderbolt seriously, but you mustnвҖҷt critique them. TheyвҖҷre the ones actually arranging and holding the event, after all. ItвҖҷs tacky to stick your nose into it too much, isnвҖҷt it?
HeвҖҷs not tacky! Eichi-samaвҖҷs always cool!
Hehe. Thanks for the tip. Perhaps IвҖҷd gotten jealous that Thunderbolt had caught Tori's interest. However, I'm also anticipating the proverbial ships moving in1. Their movements have purpose: it seems that theyвҖҷre trying to scoop up the talent that ES failed to pick up in my place. That's exactly why I didn't forbid the members of fine from participating, so I gave Tori my approval for him to participate.
I just didnвҖҷt think IвҖҷd have to pull out, since I got so busy with ATLANTISвҖҰ~2 It's only at a time like this that all sorts of construction issues came up... It really is unlucky.
Please don't be so discouraged. Even if you couldnвҖҷt pursue an audition like this one, there is still a place of belonging for you, Young Master. You only have one body, so it may be best for you to focus on your new business.
Yeah... If I don't get it together, the construction schedule for ATLANTIS might get stopped again3. I don't know if you truly do wanna do this, but you said you're doing it "for my sake", so I'll support you.
Thank you very much, Himegimi. This humble Hibiki Wataru will make the best of it and put on a show for HimegimiвҖҷs sake. And so. Please do your best too, Himegimi.
Yeah! Of course! вҖҳCuz I won't accept it if you fall behind right from the start!
I'll be rooting you on from the sidelines as well. I hope you'll show off the fullest extent of your true abilities, Hibiki-sama. вҖ” Young Master. ItвҖҷs about that time.
Eh, already?! Uuu, I wanted to soak in the ambiance of the venue at the very least~
Well, do your best, Hibiki-senpai! You gotta tell me all about your thoughts after!
вҖҰ Fufu. Himegimi and Butler-san seem quite busy themselves. I must give them my thanks for coming to see me off.
By the way, what are you going to do after this, Eichi? I'm sure I heard that you have a job you want to prioritize over the auditions.
