I see. So weвҖҷll be showing off a dance performance. I don't know where the audienceвҖҷs tastes are leaning towards yet. LetвҖҷs try anything to see.
Ultimately weвҖҷll need to outclass the Hibiki-Sena pair, which will be a little tricky. But, this is a pair competition as well: I want to believe that thereвҖҷs an opportunity to win there. To do that, I need your cooperation, Taki.
Nyahaha. Leave it to me~вҷӘ вҖҳCuz I came here to win! I got no intention of getting outshone by whoever ends up being my opponent, yвҖҷknow~? You gotta make sure to keep up with me so you don't get left behind, вҖҳkay, Hasumi-san~? Chapter 6
Now then, Hibiki and I will start with our 'Demonstration of a Speciality'. Hibiki, you too. DonвҖҷt just stand there, make sure you bring my performance out, okay?
Yes. Though from my perspective, itвҖҷs disappointing that the other pairs are so hesitant. We stole the show in the demonstration a moment ago, so I suppose they want to delay their turn as far back as they can.
I donвҖҷt think thereвҖҷs any point to what they choose in the end, though. вҖҳCause I'm destined to win~вҷӘ
Here we go. A rapid-fire of 100-model poses in a rowвҖҰвҷӘ вҖ” вҷӘ (Strikes a pose)
вҷӘ вҷӘ вҷӘ
!?
What the, whatвҖҷs thatвҖҰ?
ThereвҖҷs twoвҖҰ Izumi-chinsвҖҰ!?
Nyahaha! What the hellвҖҷs happening~? ThatвҖҷs so interesting!
It looks something like a complete double of Sena-senpaiвҖҰ Is this Sena-senpaiвҖҷs specialty?
(Hold it, Hibiki!? Why are you disguised as me!?)
Huh? ThereвҖҷs two of me?
These model poses are so beautiful, that it looks like IвҖҷve multiplied into two, huhвҖҰ? Ahaha. As expected from the supermodel Sena Izumi~вҷӘ The other me is beautiful too~вҷӘ (Even vocal imitation too?! вҖ” The hell, don't fool around with me!) Hold it, Hibiki! I may have told you to make me stand out with your magic tricks, but I didnвҖҷt ask you to go that far!
Fufufu. IsnвҖҷt it good~вҷӘ Thanks to that, everyone in the venue is paying attention to us~вҷӘ Urgh! Would you quit screwing around already!? You're just making a fool out of me, arenвҖҷt youвҖҰ! I'm being serious about this!
Oh, please don't be so upset. From what I can tell from the screen, it seems that weвҖҷve earned quite a lot of [hearts].
I fulfilled your request and acted in a way that would genuinely earn us [hearts]. Himegimi couldnвҖҷt participate in 4piece, so I also intend to pass, especially for his sake. Let's do our best together вҷӘ
вҖҰвҖҰ
I figured those two would be trouble. The favorable number they got is weighted lower a little after the conversion, but they're still attracting a lot of attention regardless.
Yeah. ItвҖҷs to be expected from the members of two powerhouse units. They definitely hold their own in individual matches too.
But we're the ones whoвҖҷre gonna win, right~? Next is mine and Hasumi's turn~вҷӘ Yes. We canвҖҷt fall behind either. Taki, you said youвҖҷll perform martial arts, right? IвҖҷll be painting those martial arts with the sound of the shinobue.13
Nyahaha. IвҖҷm counting on you~, Hasumi-san~вҷӘ But I donвҖҷt think I can get serious against Hasumi-san, soвҖҰ Amagi-san, lemme borrow your body for a sec~!
The sound of a whoosh
!
Taki! What are you doing!? It's inexcusable to behave so violently against our opposition. What if someone gets hurt!?
IвҖҷm alright. He gave notice ahead of time, so there was plenty of time to brace for it.
But if I respond to your act, it won't be just your pair's appeal alone. It would have been better if you displayed a dance performance to the accompaniment of Hasumi-senpai's flute, so why did you do that?
Hmm~? I never once said that dance performance was my specialty, did I~?
My one strong point is my combat skills! I've gotten in a bout with Amagi-san before, so I thought he'd be up for it~вҷӘ
Is that right, Hiiro-chin?
Yes. He came out of nowhere during our club activities before. He launched a surprise attack on me and Buchou.
A surprise attackвҖҰ? Yet another disturbing thing happening right under my nose, huh?
Oh me, oh my. What a ruthless atmosphere everyone is giving~ Shall I settle the mood back down? I'll take on any gaze, any criticism, whatever one likes.
Wataru-chin and Izumi-chinвҖҷs performance is already over by now. We'll handle it some way or another.
Settling down a rough situation is within the realm of the audition evaluation. I feel bad for Keito-chin, but we're going to take our turn.
Eh~?! Our turn isn't over yet, though~? YouвҖҷre overstepping authority, ending it however you want! I donвҖҷt accept it~! Stop it. It's a competition based around favorability, so what's the point of fighting to begin with? Even if you could demonstrate your martial arts skills, using savage techniques will only be a drawback. Look. We barely got any [hearts] for our appeal this time around.
I was happy to get a chance to fight Amagi-san, though? WeвҖҷve got stuff like bullfights and viper-mongoose cage matches in Okinawa, where IвҖҷm from~ ItвҖҷd be exciting if idols fought too, right?
Or what, I shouldnвҖҷt show off my specialty? Idols resorting to violence is a no-go... was it? 14
Yes. ItвҖҷs against the law in Japan and the United States, regardless of being an idol. There's no cultural difference there. You should be mindful of your surroundings and stay put for now, Taki.
But if you're showing off your specialties, thatвҖҷs literally the time to be assertive about it. I don't get mainland culture at all, huh~? Amagi-san is well-built, and idols are the same kinda spectacle as bullfighting, right~? IвҖҷm doing it while knowing that my opponent wonвҖҷt get hurtвҖ” yet itвҖҷs still no good?
вҖҰвҖҰ
(That TakiвҖҷs truly a loose cannonвҖҰ!) (Can I really win and advance through the rounds of 4piece being paired with such a selfish, restless, brash guy like thisвҖҰ?)
вҖҰ LetвҖҷs get a fresh start, Hiiro-chin. My specialty isвҖҰ jumping real high! Let's all try jumping together вҳҶ CвҖҷmere cвҖҷmere, Izumi-chin, you do it with us too! WeвҖҷre former tennis club buddies, right?
Even me? Why the hellвҖҰ HahвҖҰ Well, I'm not a demon either, soвҖҰ Fine, I guess I'll do it.
But first off, Nazunyan, are you even able to jump that high? This is the first time IвҖҷm hearing about it, though?
Well, just leave it to me and see. You'll get it when we all jump together.
Everyone! Let's jump with a "Ready~set"! I'll show you I can jump the highest! Ready, set~!
? Nazuna-senpai. It looked like I jumped higher, didnвҖҷt I?
It looked like Hibiki and I jumped higher than Nazunyan tooвҖҰ Is this really your specialty?
I-ItвҖҷs just a matter of height difference, thatвҖҷs all! I sprung up further, right?!
Fufufu. My, you're deliberately using your "specialty" to unite everyone around youвҖҰ! On top of that, it seems you were considerably well-received by the audience too. ThatвҖҷs to be expected from talent like yours, little bunny вҳҶ
Th-That's not it at aw~wll!
Chapter 7
A few hours later. After the first day of 4pieceвҖҷs evaluation ended.
"Did you enjoy the Twin Rooster PagodaвҖҷs audition, everyone?" вҖңIt mustвҖҷve been like feeling your way through a fog, appealing to an audience of a hundred.вҖқ "Amorphous and silent, with only [hearts] to go off of to measure their reaction вҖ” I think you all did a great job in such an environment."
"In particular, the pair who made it to the top today вҖ“ Hibiki-kun and Sena-kun вҖ“ were spectacular." "The audience was mesmerized by the classic, stately manner of Sena-kun's appeal, and amazed by the power of imagination that went into Hibiki-kun's appeal." "Congratulations on such an impressive first place. That was a Nice appeal!"
Thank you. But for us, it's only natural that we'd be ranked at the top.
Yes. It's an honor to receive such praise, but it's still only the first day. If we grow too big of heads now, weвҖҷll encounter trouble with the audition from the next day on.
"Mhmhm. A true professional attitude, alright. The audition has just begun, so whoвҖҷs to say what will happen." "Especially since the first dayвҖҷs audience of a hundred were all likely to think favorably of you."
Likely to think favorably of us...?
вҖңYes. The hundred people gathered for this round were idol enthusiasts.вҖқ вҖңBecause everyone was favorable to you on opening day, we carried on without revealing their identities. However, from the next day onward, weвҖҷll reveal the attributes of the hundred people gathered, and have them evaluate you.вҖқ вҖңThis will be announced when tomorrow's evaluation begins. Until then, return to the hotel and get some rest.вҖқ
Fufu. We got through the first match. Good work, Nazuna-senpai.
вҖҰвҖҰ
Hey, Hiiro-chin. You donвҖҷt have to call me вҖңNi~chanвҖқ...
? You donвҖҷt seem to be in very good spirits, whatвҖҷs wrong, Nazuna-senpai? I wasnвҖҷt calling you вҖңNi~chanвҖқ from the start, so IвҖҷm not sure how to respond when you say I donвҖҷt need toвҖҰ Could it be that youвҖҷre feeling hungry after the long day of the evaluation?
No, IвҖҷm not that fussy.
But today made me painfully aware how out of my depth I am. All my appeals today backfired, and it made me realize the extent of my incompetence. Going to college is a relatively вҖңnormieвҖқ choice from societyвҖҷs point of view, too. I don't have any specialties of my own that stand out either, soвҖҰ to be honest, IвҖҷve lost a lot of confidence. From tomorrow on, it's gonna get even tougher, right~? I donвҖҷt know if I can seriously become sufficient competition.
Please don't be so down, Nazuna-senpai. Even if you messed up with the theme, you still got a lot of [hearts]. Which means your existence alone is what makes you a desirable, highly-favored idol. Please have confidence in yourself.
Eh? "My existence aloneвҖқ is what makes me desirable...? How should I put thisвҖҰ isn't that a pretty big exaggeration?
No, it's not an exaggeration. I think Nazuna-senpai is amazing!
I-I see~ Thanks, Hiiro-chin. It's a little embarrassing to hear you say that to my face, thoughвҖҰвҷӘ Like you said, itвҖҷs not good to be too self-deprecating. The number of [hearts] we got on opening day was about half of the whole audience. I guess we can just be grateful we weren't eliminated. ItвҖҷd be pretty scary to get tossed into some weird pit-like trap like the ones you usually see on variety shows.
Yes, the pair in last place dropped to the floor below through the panel that opened under their feet. It seems amusing, I'd like to get a turn being dropped once too.
Why?
There are cushions spread out underneath, so I thought it looked like some kind of attraction depending on how you look at it.
O-OhвҖҰ I guess that might be true, depending on how you look at it.
But we're aiming to pass, so tomorrow, let's finish the day with a higher ranking.
Mhm. Naturally, I intend to do that. After all, Wataru-senpai, Sena-senpai, and Hasumi-senpai... For me, theyвҖҷre all formidable opponents.
With Keito-chin though, IвҖҷm not all too sure how far he can keep up with that Taki kid. Look over there. It looks like Keito-chin is trying to get a feel of how to close the gap with Taki. Even Keito-chin might be feeling a little overwhelmed in front of the new generation, huh?
вҖҰвҖҰ
вҖҰвҖҰ
Yeah. They were in more of a slump than we were, so I wouldnвҖҷt say they have the best chemistryвҖҰ?
ItвҖҷs likely that they just couldnвҖҷt communicate properly since it was their first time meeting. Wataru-chin and Izumi-chin dominated on opening day, but the affinity between their pair isnвҖҷt quite there, so it seems like the key to the audition is how each pairвҖҷs relationship changes over time.
Fufufu! It looks like you and I came out on top on opening day, Knight-san~вҷӘ I wonвҖҷt allow this result to let my guard down, but what a splendid performance all the same!
вҖҰ That so? IвҖҷm going back to the hotel, so... See you tomorrow at the site.
Oh? Are we not going to have a debrief, Knight-san?
ThereвҖҷs nothing to really debrief about what happened today. It should be fine as long as we keep the same energy tomorrow, right? If we make use of your techniques, we should be able to win [hearts] then too. Besides. With the way you act, it seems like you're here to make a fool out of the audition, and it's annoying.
Oh my! If that's what it seems to you, then I'm dreadfully sorry! вҖңLife is but a walking shadow, a pitiable actor... Told by an idiot, full of sound and fury, signifying nothing.вҖқ 15 вҖ”I can perform in a manner that seems serious, but it doesnвҖҷt suit the tastes of Knight-san, does it?
ThatвҖҷs exactly what I keepвҖ”!
IвҖҷm sorry. I made you angry. I think you, too, are well aware that I am not the kind of person to get attached to things.
We do have to form pairs for the Twin Rooster Pagoda, but 4piece is an individual competition. We hardly crossed paths, even in Yumenosaki, but happenstance has paired us up together. As thatвҖҷs the case, the best course of action is to play the role in a professional, businesslike mannerвҖ”
Let us both do the best we can. That's the ideal, the utmost ideal...вҳҶ
вҖҰвҖҰ
Translation Notes вҶ‘ й»’иҲ№гҒ®жқҘиҲӘ (kurofune no raikou, lit. the Arrival of the Black Ships), refers to when American gunboats came to Japan (1853) to force it to open its borders and end its isolationist policy. Here, it's used to symbol the end of isolation.вҶ‘ An amusement park project headed by Tori, as mentioned by ATLANTIS and Stella Maris. It is located on a (fictional) island called Hoshijima, in Okinawa.вҶ‘ It's mentioned in Stella Maris why these construction issues arise.вҶ‘ Referencing an exchange in the story EP:Link.вҶ‘ Referencing Heaven and Earth, AKATSUKI's climax story, where they revive a radio show called Rumbling Heaven and Earth into Rumbling Heaven and Earth R.вҶ‘ As they're about to explain, wood tokens, slips or bills are split in half. One half is used as a receipt connecting to the other half confirms a transaction was made.вҶ‘ Originally гҒЎгҒ„гҒ«гҒ„гҒ•гӮ“ (chii-niisan), a pun on "small" and "nii-san".вҶ‘ Ibuki speaks with a lot of tildes (~), and usually ends his sentences with sa~ (an Okinawan dialect), as well as ne~. His first-person pronoun is еҗҫ (wa~); itвҖҷs a slightly old-fashioned, formal pronoun.вҶ‘ In Ibuki Idol Story 2, Ibuki ambushes Hiiro and Tetora. This will get mentioned many times throughout the story.вҶ‘ Nazuna switches from his usual way of speaking to keigo (polite language) to NiceP here.вҶ‘ To learn more about Ibuki's background and his connection to "oni", read 310mc's Ibuki FAQ.вҶ‘ A phrase from judo, roughly meaning the agility of the weak can topple the strong.вҶ‘ The shinobue is a type of flute. It's usually played in kabuki and noh theatre.вҶ‘ A line from Ibuki Idol Story 2вҶ‘ From Macbeth (Act V, Scene 5), boiling down to "life is meaningless".

entry.title: Hundred (Chapter 8-10)
entry.content:
Characters
Writer
Akira
Translation
citrinesea
Proofreading
310mc
Chapter 8
That night. The hotel within the 4piece venue. Hiiro and IbukiвҖҷs room
Nyahaha~вҷӘ The hotelвҖҷs crazy huuuge!
ThatвҖҷs NassanвҖҷs arrangements alright~ This is some real American-style VIP treatment! IвҖҷm taking this bed, so you can go use that one~вҷӘ
Thank you very much. The view is nice from the bed by the window.
But itвҖҷll be harder for you to escape me over there~ And even if you make an escape out the window, youвҖҷll just hit the ground head first! Careful, вҖҳkay~?
вҖ”ThatвҖҷs a dangerous thing to say. Are you always like this?
What? Did I put you off with what I said?
No, IвҖҷm just interested. I thought perhaps youвҖҷre from a primal 1 community or something, one that doesnвҖҷt hesitate to engage in violence.
After all, you threw a blow on me during the Twin Rooster Pagoda audition, too. And the blows on Buchou and I вҖ” It felt as though they were completely indiscriminate. If you are the type to engage in violence no matter the time or place, then I need to correct that mistake of yours. You see, when I first came to the city, I myself had common sense relentlessly drilled into me by Aira.
Hm~? ArenвҖҷt you misunderstanding something? Neither America or Okinawa are rural places~?
If you had to get common sense hammered into you when you came here, then that means youвҖҷre the hillbilly2 here, right, Amagi-san~?
MmnвҖҰ I canвҖҷt let you talk to me like that. I donвҖҷt care if you insult meвҖҰ But my friends and hometown bear no sins. Compared to what you think, my hometown is far and away a more advanced society.
Ohh? Is it even more advanced than America? I canвҖҷt tell what the actual truth is, but with the way your eyes are all serious, IвҖҷll take your word for it~вҷӘ
вҖҰ Hm. I thought for sure that youвҖҷd refuse it, but you're actually being honest, huh?
Nyahaha. There are so many worlds for each and every social etiquette and culture out there~ The absolute truth that you see isnвҖҷt necessarily the truth that I see. IвҖҷm not someone who can read the room, so I'm glad Amagi-san told me his true feelings~вҷӘ
Could it be that you provoked meвҖҰ to get me to speak?
O~hh? Amagi-san, youвҖҷre unexpectedly clever, huh? That's right! Everyone seems to think I'm a violent, dangerous idol, but I wouldn't use violence on a helpless child, you know~? Hiding your true feelings, only ever putting up a good face... Those kinds of people who waste time doing all that are the ones I hate the most! That's why I take tough measures now and again~вҷӘ
A humanвҖҷs true colors come out when they're on the brink of danger. Dontcha think~?
вҖҰ I don't really agree with your views, but IвҖҷve come to understand your reasoning well enough. So that's why you didn't lay your hands on anyone other than me. There was no one else in the Twin Rooster Pagoda who was well-versed with martial arts. You made an example out of me to get a reaction from everyone around you.
Nyahaha~вҷӘ You get it reaaal well, dontcha~?
Thanks to that, I learned more about Hasumi-san, too~ Up вҖҳtil now, IвҖҷve only listened to AKATSUKIвҖҷs music, and I didnвҖҷt know anything about them as people at all! But he has an elegant feel that fits right in with a Japanese-style unit, huh~?
Mhm. He works as the dorm administrator for Seisoukan, so heвҖҷs the kind of person thatвҖҷs strict with rules and regulations.
But you can get that with just a glance and a little conversation with him, canвҖҷt you? I canвҖҷt help but question your methods of observing people after all.
Then, tell me! What kinda person is Amagi-san?
What?
I won't understand unless you teach me! You wanna correct all my mistakes, right? Then teach me~вҷӘ
It's hard to answer that so suddenly... On the contrary, what do you want to know about me?
Hmm, for example, that piece of cloth on your luggage! What the heck is that?
This is a good luck charm from Aira вҖ” My comrade. Whenever I worry during the audition, I bundle up the charm in one hand and make the sign of the cross with the otherвҖ“ Amen3
вҖҰ You know about a major American religion? ThatвҖҷs not really the time to say вҖңAmenвҖқ, yвҖҷknow~? Are you making fun of me? YouвҖҷre a mean kinda guy, arentcha, Amagi-san~?
IвҖҷm not lying. A person called Tatsumi-senpai taught it to me, his home is a church.
Ah. Maybe the religion Tatsumi-senpai practices has drastically changed here in Japan...!
Hm~m? Kinda sounds like a load of bull to me?
But IвҖҷve taken a liking to you~вҷӘ YouвҖҷve got something in common with me, so tell me what you found interesting about Japan~вҷӘ
O-Okay. The culture of the city always astounds me too. If you're okay with the extent of what I've become acquainted with, I'll tell you about it as much as you want. We don't even need to use something like violence, because we have a wonderful tool called words.
Chapter 9
At the same time. Nazuna and IzumiвҖҷs room
I never thought IвҖҷd end up rooming with Izumi-chinвҖҰ
What? You donвҖҷt want to room with me or something?
DonвҖҷt pounce on me over everything I say~ I just assumed weвҖҷd be sharing rooms with our partners from the Twin Rooster Pagoda, thatвҖҷs all.
Then again, if the pairs got to know each other better in the hotel, it'd confuse the viewers.
Yeah. It looks like they don't have cameras in the hotel, so maybe theyвҖҷre pretty orderly when it comes to these sorts of things. They protect the privacy of the participants, while making full use of a large production staff to film everything during the audition. ItвҖҷs an audition organized by that goody-looking NiceP, so they must be following global standards, yeah?
Ahaha. Meanwhile, Yumenosaki and ES always feel like the night before a school festival. Well, thatвҖҷs fun too thoughвҖҰвҷӘ
But, I donвҖҷt know if NicePвҖҷs a good guy.
? Is that distrust from the last SS?
Ah~... Yeah, all sorts of stuff happened, huh. I donвҖҷt feel any sorts of politics or schemes happening behind the scenes of 4piece, though. If I had to say it, itвҖҷs NiceP himself IвҖҷm talking about.
IвҖҷd prefer for you to keep this between us, butвҖҰ The truth is, NiceP is something of a Ra*bits fan. Look at the name written on this fan letter.
вҖңArnebвҖқ? This nameвҖҷsвҖҰ?
Yeah. Nice Arneb Thunder. NicePвҖҷs stage name. He came to a Ra*bits live performance and a handshake event, too.
At first I thought it might just be someone who looks like him вҖ” but when he was pretty well aware of my speech impediment during the audition, I became more convinced it really was him. It seems that "Arneb" means "hare" in a foreign language, so maybe that's how he found out about us...
The person in charge of the show is a fan of Ra*bits!? That's not fair!
Calm down, Izumi-chin. Even in the fan letter, he wrote, "Your recent live was Nice вҳҶ But IвҖҷll be strict with my judging in the audition", so I don't think he plans to show favoritism.
There's no guarantee that NiceP won't act on selfish desires during the audition, though.
Yeah. So IвҖҷll keep a careful eye out too. But. Regardless of the audition, if heвҖҷs genuinely evaluating us, I couldn't be happier.
If I end up passing, I want you to judge it for yourself вҖ” Whether or not the evaluation criteria was wrong. I want you to be a witness, Izumi-chin.
HmmвҖҰ? There's no benefit to Nazunyan telling me about NiceP. That alone just shows youвҖҷre putting trust in me; am I right to think that?
Yeah. I wanna be seen without bias too. Izumi-chin and NiceP both.
Hah~... Finally, what a weight off my shoulders...! It looked like I was the only one who knew about the other side of NiceP, so it was a bit of a burden~ I'm so glad I could tell Izumi-chin, yвҖҷknow?
Ah~ What a relief! I'm in the same room as Izumi-chin~вҷӘ ItвҖҷs a blessing to have friends~вҷӘ
WeвҖҷre former tennis club buddies, after all. Thank you~вҷӘ
I'm here to pass the audition, so don't complain if I end up needing to toss that camaraderie away for the sake of the evaluation, вҖҳkay? Well, I'm glad I'm rooming with you too, Nazunyan. If I was rooming with Hibiki, I doubt IвҖҷd be able to relax nearly as much. I wonder what Hibiki and Hasumi could possibly be talking about in their room.
Oh? So those two were sharing the same room... That's true, I do wonder what Keito-chin and Wataru-chin could be talking about~ Although, I feel like there were plenty of times they became opponents when we were at Yumenosaki.
But maybe having to room together this time will bring them together closer than they expected~вҷӘ
I dunno about that... If it was that easy to get along with people, I don't think thereвҖҷd be any wars in the world.
вҖҰ AвҖ“ Achoo!
Oh. Is that a cold I hear, Keito-kun?
How lamentable of my lifelong rivalвҖҰ! Where in the world is the Keito-kun who faced off against me!
YouвҖҷre overexaggerating. IвҖҷm sure someoneвҖҷs just talking about me behind my back.4
Hmm. Is that right? If so, IвҖҷm relieved. I thought IвҖҷd make you something to warm you up if you had a cold, but that was a needless fear, hm?
Yes. вҖҰ Actually, don't use your strands of hair to lift the pot. It's terrifying.
Eh~? Don't be so cold. OneвҖҷs life needs to have wonder in it, doesnвҖҷt it?
WeвҖҷre in the middle of an audition, but youвҖҷre as detached from the world as always. I heard the second day is even more difficult. If you want to pass, you should rest early too.
Yes. I too am aiming to pass! I take pride in being the best entertainer after all вҳҶ So tonight I'll go to bed a little earlier than usual. I'll heed your advice, mm?
вҖҰ I suppose it really is better to show that youвҖҷre taking it seriously when it comes to an audition~ I always intend to be serious, but it seems no one trusts that about me at all.
? What? That's odd. I wasnвҖҷt expecting you to be hesitant.
Attitudes arenвҖҷt something you should force, but for the showdown of Twin Rooster Pagoda, being seen as favorable means everything. Whatever you believe, that alone is a fact, at least. If you're worried about it, do as you see fit, whether it be performance or other. Make sure not to catch a cold, either. Hibiki.
Yes. I'll be sure to do that. After all, if poor health forces me to withdraw from a grand event such as 4piece, Himegimi will be sad to see it.
Chapter 10
At the same time. Seisoukan common room.
Tattsun-senpai! Hurry up, hurry uuup~! The 4piece broadcast! ItвҖҷs already startiiing!
ItвҖҷs dangerous to rush over like that, you know, Aira-san? The 4piece broadcast is available for recording and archived streaming, so letвҖҷs first set our things down and settle down.
Oh, the TV in the common roomвҖҰ It seems that people are already here, holding a watch party. Shall we join in?
ah. tatsumi~вҷӘ are you here to watch the [audition] as well?
Indeed. Hiiro-san and Mayoi-san of our ALKALOID are participating, so we were hoping to support them.
If thatвҖҷs the case, youвҖҷre a lilвҖҷ late. The second venue, the Gourmet District5, just ended. Right now, itвҖҷs in the middle of broadcastinвҖҷ the third venue that Hiiro-kunвҖҷs appearinвҖҷ in, the Twin Rooster Pagoda.
No waayy~... I wanted to see Mayo-sanвҖҷs gallant figure, too!
Mayoi-dono did his best, as well. He struggled and worked really hard within such a packed crowd~вҷӘ
Are we sure about thatвҖҰ? It looked like there was a huge problem going on for him, though - including for Morisawa-senpaiвҖҰ6
Eh? WhatвҖҷs that mean, IвҖҷm sooo curiousвҖҰ!
Shiratori, all of you. Could you be a little more quiet? Hasumi-dono is appearing on the Twin Rooster Pagoda as well. If it gets too noisy, I wonвҖҷt be able to concentrate. Besides, Amagi is participating in the Twin Rooster Pagoda too. IsnвҖҷt it the duty of comrades to lend their support?
You think so too, donвҖҷt you, Kiryu-dono?
Yup. We all took the time tвҖҷget in front of the TV, so I think weвҖҷd better watch it properly. But, watch parties are sвҖҷpposed tвҖҷget noisy. I came along вҖҳcuz ya said ya had to watch it at the screening, Kanzaki. Give вҖҳem a lilвҖҷ break for the noise, will ya?
HmnвҖҰ Kiryu-dono is right, I may have been a little too on edge.
You should all see how everything is set up in the Twin Rooster Pagoda. It seems that some sort of вҖңtagguвҖқ-team battle is taking place in it.
Tag-team battleвҖҰ! Wow, I heard that 4piece was an individual competition, but there are special rules like that too, huh~? вҷӘ
Indeed. Had I known it was a вҖңtagguвҖқ-team battle, I would have loved to participateвҖҰ! I didnвҖҷt want to compete against Hasumi-dono, so I firmly refused to participateвҖҰ but looking at how that so-called вҖңTakiвҖқ has been behaving, I'm concerned about Hasumi-dono...!
Haha, even if ya joined in, it doesnвҖҷt mean yвҖҷwoulda become DannaвҖҷs7 partner like Taki did.
TakiвҖҰ? IвҖҷm not familiar with that name.
Yeah, so. Apparently, heвҖҷs an idol that got scouted by NiceP, вҖҳn is temporarily part of ES. I think that kinda unconventional guy is interesting, but I wonder what Hasumi-no-danna thinks about it...вҷӘ
Kiryu-dono is such an incredibly open-minded man... I'm so worried about Hasumi-dono that I can't maintain my composure when I look at Taki!
Is he that dangerous of a participant? That Taki idol...?
Yeah, you could say that. Taki-kun showed up in front of me and Hiiro-kun outta nowhere and exchanged blows with us. He made good use of surprise attacks and assault tactics, so I couldn't gauge his exact strengthвҖҰ But if we took him on in a proper fight, heвҖҷd have been a pretty tough force who could wear us down just as much as we could to him.
Assault!? I make a point to try not to think about it, but the karate club really does way more than just club activities, doesnвҖҷt it!?
Ahaha. ItвҖҷs not that noteworthy, weвҖҷre more like an imitation of a karate master. Compared to people who are actually serious and focused around martial arts, we still have a long way to go.
Eh...? It doesn't sound like that to me, thoughвҖҰ?
Well, in the eyes of someone whoвҖҷs got no experience in it, there's no difference between a black belt and a master, I bet. Anyways, teaminвҖҷ up with a troublemaker ainвҖҷt always a bad thing. If anything, it looks to me that DannaвҖҷs charm really comes out when heвҖҷs beinвҖҷ put in front of Taki~вҷӘ Reminds me of when we were students. ItвҖҷs like IвҖҷm lookinвҖҷ at the Danna when the academy was in shambles, where he was actinвҖҷ all tough.
MmmвҖҰ ItвҖҷs certainly true that Hasumi-dono seems to be getting a considerable amount of вҖңsu-ku-reen-taimuвҖқ because of that scoundrel, butвҖҰ I havenвҖҷt recognized Taki quite yet.
I will see what kind of fate the upcoming audition has in store for Hasumi-dono and Taki from here on out, until the very end!8
Translation Notes вҶ‘ Hiiro says йҮҺжҖ§зҡ„гҒӘ (yasei-tekina) here, which essentially means "wild" in the sense of to rely on ones wild or bare instincts. I translated this as вҖңprimalвҖқ, referring to a community where rougher instincts like violence may be accepted, something that general societal norms would look down upon.вҶ‘ Ibuki uses з”°иҲҺиҖ… (inaka-mono) here, which roughly means "someone from the country" or a "countryperson". It's often used in a derogatory manner, (often to describe someone unruly or unsophisticated), hence why Hiiro reacts indignantly. I translated this as "hillbilly" to get across that it's an insult.вҶ‘ Said in English.вҶ‘ It's a common Japanese superstition that when you sneeze, someone is talking about you or gossiping behind your back.вҶ‘ The second part of 4piece, VS Gourmet, which Chiaki and Mayoi were a part of.вҶ‘ The difficulties Mayoi and Chiaki ran into are from Praise of Delicious Flavors, Chapter 7вҶ‘ Kuro often refers to Keito as ж—ҰйӮЈ (danna, lit. master ), or "boss". He'll also use Hasumi-no-danna.вҶ‘ To read the Keito & Ibuki cut of the rest of VS AUDIENCE, click here.

entry.title: VSвҳ…AUDIENCE (Keito & Ibuki Cut)
entry.content:
Characters
Writer
Akira
Translation
citrinesea
Proofreading
mika_enstars (Hundred 11, 14; Influence 6) 310mc (Hundred 14; Epilogue 1, 3) citrinesea (Hundred 13, Influence 9; Epilogue 1, 4)
The following chapters follow the events of Keito and Ibuki in VSвҳ…AUDIENCE, picking up off of Hundred Chapter 10. This abridged version has been posted early in light of Ibuki's debut. When the full story is complete, this page will be replaced.
Hundred 11 Second Day of the Twin Rooster Pagoda, Audience: 100 Music Enthusiasts; Theme: Freedom вҖңYesterday, the audience was composed of a hundred idol enthusiasts, so they were relatively favorable to you all. However, this might not be the case going forwardвҖ”вҖқ The audience for the second day will be composed ofвҖҰ вҖңmusic enthusiastsвҖқ !вҖқ вҖңYou must all gain the favor of one hundred music enthusiasts!вҖқ вҖңThe first theme you will attempt is вҖңfreedomвҖқ вҖ”вҖқ вҖңYou can use any means necessary, so I expect a great fight from you allвҖҰвҷӘвҖқ
Hmph. Seems weвҖҷve got a bit of a challenge up ahead for us...вҷӘ The tougher the opponent, the easier itвҖҷll be for us to get a lead. ItвҖҷs a good time to make bank on some competition points. Well, Hibiki?
Indeed. Leave it to me, Knight-san. Before anything else, let's take a look at the instruments Twin Rooster Pagoda has to offer. I can play all sorts of instruments, soвҖ” IвҖҷll make the best of it to accommodate Knight-sanвҖҷs performance вҷӘ
(Hm. Hibiki and Sena donвҖҷt seem to be going for the appeal right away.) (WeвҖҷre lucky they went to check the selection of instruments first. If Hibiki, a versatile performer, had taken the lead, the rest of us who follow would come off as inferior, left in the dust.)
(So the second dayвҖҷs audience is comprised of a hundred "music enthusiastsвҖқ, huhвҖ”) (In short, it means todayвҖҷs evaluation is reliant on satisfying the audience through sound.)
(Of course, the matter at hand when it comes to the evaluations of Twin Rooster Pagoda is receiving [hearts], so it doesnвҖҷt necessarily mean you need to be particular about the type of music.) (Just like you canвҖҷt let an audience who came to see your live performance go home without playing at least one song, you need to let the music enthusiasts gathered here to hear your music too.) (The question is how and what weвҖҷll performвҖ”) (Seeing that this is a competition for pairs, itвҖҷd be better to have two people perform one song together rather than each of us perform our own individually.)
Taki. ThereвҖҷs a few things IвҖҷd like to ask you, butвҖ”
Hasumi-san! IвҖҷm all set and ready to go~вҷӘ IвҖҷll be playing the guitar, so you follow my lead! WeвҖҷll do an AKATSUKI song of course...вҷӘ вҷӘ! вҷӘ! вҷӘ!
Wha!? HeвҖҷs already beginning to performвҖҰ!
(Free and unconventional, but somehow it sticks in your mind...)
It couldnвҖҷt beвҖҰ youвҖҷre playingвҖҰ вҖңA Thousand Blossoms, the Night of Crimson MoonвҖқ, arenвҖҷt you? 1 It's a largely different take on the original song, so I didn't recognize it immediately, but there's no doubt about it. Why are you able to play this song?
I told you, didnвҖҷt I~ That IвҖҷm gonna play an AKATSUKI song? None of the other pairs have started performing yet, yвҖҷknow~? This is a golden opportunity, so why don't you play along with me, Hasumi-san? вҷӘ Look, look! ThatвҖҷs a shamisen over there, right? Jam sesh with me~вҷӘ
YouвҖҰ! Have you no consideration for where I standвҖҰ!
IвҖҷll just play the shamisen, thenвҖҰ!
вҷӘ~вҷӘ~вҷӘ (... Hmph. TakiвҖҷs proclivity to just act on his own is an inconvenience.) (He just starts appealing without thinkingвҖҰ DoesnвҖҷt he get that thereвҖҷs вҖңmusic enthusiastsвҖқ of all kinds out there?)
(That being said, this is the first time IвҖҷve heard A Thousand Blossoms, the Night of Crimson Moon sound like this.) (The song does use the electric guitar, but the unique way Taki plays it makes it sound innovative.) (The shamisen part completes the arrangement perfectly, so it mustвҖҷve taken some careful thought and practice by that Taki guy.)
(Taki, itвҖҷs just like Eichi predicted. You seem to be someone whoвҖҷll rock the boat of this competition...вҷӘ)
вҖңвҖҰ Oh ho. The blending of Western and Japanese influence in the Hasumi-kun-Taki-kun pairвҖҷs performance makes it quite interesting.вҖқ вҖңAs itвҖҷs only the beginning of the second day, the judges seem like theyвҖҷre being conservative with the [hearts] theyвҖҷre giving out.вҖқ "Still, even taking that into account, these two managed to gain a considerable number of [hearts]." "HasumiвҖҷs quick response to Taki's improvisation was Nice!"
Hundred 13 Second Day of the Twin Rooster Pagoda, Audience: 100 Music Enthusiasts Nice announces the results of the second day in this chapter. Wataru and Ibuki place first. Keito and Ibuki place after Wataru and Izumi. вҖңNext is the Taki-kun-Hasumi-kun pair, hm? Congratulations.вҖқ вҖңTaki-kun was daring, but moreover, Hasumi-kun, wrapped around his fingerвҖҰвҖқ вҖңThe two of you seem to make an interesting duo befitting a variety show, and the way you played off of each other gave off its own charm.вҖқ
I see. Nassan keeps a keen eye on things, huh~? Looks like me and Hasumi-san have an unexpected affinity with each other~вҷӘ
Put yourself in the shoes of someone who covers for you. I felt like I was clinging on for dear life.
вҖңHehe. It seems youвҖҷre gradually getting to cooperating with each other better. If you show that that virtue will serve you well in the coming days, IвҖҷll be glad for it.вҖқ
Hundred 14
At the end of the second day of the audition, Keito and Ibuki join Nazuna and Hiiro at the hotel to discuss strategy on surpassing Wataru and Izumi. On their way over, Keito warns Ibuki not to run and hurt himself. With your physical ability, you probably wouldn't get hurt if you ran a little, though. What you can do and what others can do are different. You also learned that in the Twin Rooster Pagoda, didnвҖҷt you?
ThatвҖҷs right~ ThatвҖҷs why I find Hasumi-san real interesting too, yвҖҷknow~? HeвҖҷs got something I donвҖҷt, so even just listeninвҖҷ to him talk is fun~ The same goes for you and your вҖңNazuna-senpaiвҖқ, right Amagi-san?
Yeah. The evaluations for the Twin Rooster Pagoda venue вҖ” like the two roosters that decorate the pagoda illustrate, you can discover a lot of different things by bringing two personalities together. As someone who ordinarily works in a four-person unit, IвҖҷve never really been cognizant of that.
There's more conversation between Keito, Ibuki, Hiiro and Nazuna. Then, Hiiro brings up that despite the fact they'd just met each other, Ibuki and Keito's performance meshed well together. AKATSUKI gets brought up. It might be as Nito said. During the evaluation, you get so concerned with the theme and the audience, you don't consider your partner enough. Taki and I had both just met each other, so we were still feeling our way around each other.
Despite that, I think Hasumi-senpai and Ibuki's ensemble fit together perfectly, though! I heard that Ibuki had known about AKATSUKI before this, but he seemed to know quite a lot about it back there. Did you know of them while you were in America?
Ah. I was wondering about that too. AKATSUKI is a Japanese-style unit, but how is it being received by foreign audiences?
Could it be that AKATSUKI has come into fashion overseasвҖҰ?
Nyahaha~ ItвҖҷs not like that at all~ It might be popular in places I donвҖҷt know of, but I havenвҖҷt heard much about it~? IвҖҷm from Okinawa, so I just happened to hear AKATSUKIвҖҷs music~2
It's disappointing when you say it so directly like thatвҖҰ... But if you think about it pragmatically, I suppose that makes sense. ItвҖҷs wishful thinking to assume that idols who are mainly active in Japan would have equal appreciation in America and the like, isnвҖҷt it?
Just like Japan and its idols, America has its own idols in America. But every once in a while, idols who transcend borders will turn up, so itвҖҷs not a one-size-fits-all rule. Though, It's rare for Japanese idols who are satisfied with their work in Japan to aim for overseas~
They have a conversation about MELLOW DEAR US, and the gaps between the pairs in the audition. Nazuna wonders aloud what he and Hiiro could do to get to know each other better and improve their compatibility as a pair. I think there was a hint in the conversation Hasumi-senpai and Ibuki were having. For instance, what if I listened to a Ra*bits song and Nazuna-senpai listened to an ALKALOID song? The songs of our units, in other words, represent our thoughts and feelings. Just like how Ibuki learned about Hasumi-senpai through an AKATSUKI song, I feel like we can deepen our understanding of each other through each otherвҖҷs songs.
Influence 6 Fourth Day of the Twin Rooster Pagoda, Audience: 100 Foreign Tourists; Theme: An Appeal in Place of a Greeting The participants must appeal to a hundred tourists from abroad. Wataru and Izumi choose to incorporate many different foreign languages in their appeal.
Grazie mille!! 3 Phew, we did some real good work.
Now letвҖҷs see. We gotвҖҰвҖҰвҖ” 62 hearts!? Th-This has to be a mistakeвҖҰ! My beautiful looks with a score as low as thisвҖҰ!
I don't think the evaluation is based on beauty alone. Though, it seems that today's audience has a different perspective than the ones before. Were they looking for something different than what weвҖҷve prepared for them?
Nyahaha! TheyвҖҷre tourists, so duh~? If youвҖҷre playing to the overseas crowd, you should find a way to make stuff unique to this country easy to understand~ Also, getting a shoddy greeting in a foreign language is just gonna be seen as shoddy communication~вҷӘ
Hah? Are you bad-mouthing your senior? YouвҖҷre cocky through and through.
But I don't think the strategy I was talking about was wrong? If you want proof, just take a look at Hasumi-san's appeal.
HasumiвҖҷsвҖҰ?
вҖңEveryone. Now, I will be demonstrating one of my specialties: kyudo.вҖқ вҖңTaki. If it looks like any words and phrases are confusing the audience, could you help explain it so they can understand?вҖқ
вҖңNyahaha! Leave it to me!вҖқ
вҖңThis is a yumi, or a Japanese bow. I suppose itвҖҷs surprising how much longer it is than a Western-style bow, isnвҖҷt it?. Using this, you shoot a distant target by clearing your mind of every thought.вҖқ вҖңThis вҖ“ kyudo вҖ“ is one of JapanвҖҷs military arts.вҖқ вҖңNow then, watch closely.вҖқ
вҖңHah!вҖқ
What splendid ability, Keito-kun. Right on the mark on the first try......вҷӘ
Whew, thatвҖҷs Hasumi-san alright~вҷӘвҖқ
вҖңWeвҖҷre not done just yet. HereвҖҷs a second arrowвҖ“ a third arrow tooвҖ“вҖқ
Uwah~ Keito-chinвҖҷs so proficient. We should use that as reference for our appeal when the time comes, but letвҖҷs see what we should demonstrate to begin with.
If thatвҖҷs the case, I could try giving archery a shot too.
Nazuna and Hiiro proceed to do hunting archery, with Nazuna throwing balls as moving targets for Hiiro to shoot down. HmвҖҰ Even though they based their decision on what weвҖҷd done, itвҖҷs still an impressive skill.
Looks like I totally gave the two of them a hint, huh~? It coulda been our chance to get a lead, but I tend to say things inadvertently like that, huh~
No, itвҖҷs not as if you did anything wrong. BesidesвҖҰ give the monitor a look. We made out with 76 hearts, while Amagi and Nito earned 72.
Hunting is actually more popular outside of Japan. The excitement of being able to see a Japanese bow in such an elegant building probably led to a more favorable impression.
Huh, I see? I didnвҖҷt think of that! Could it be that you showed off your kyudo anticipating that? As expected of Hasumi-senpai.
Heheh, this is just how we do things~вҷӘ
Good grief, youвҖҷre getting carried awayвҖҰ
But letвҖҷs keep up this pace for the next one too.
Hmm. You're planning on performing a sword dance next, aren't you?
Hmph, who do you think I am? This is my chance to show off the skills I've honed as part of AKATSUKI: taking the traditional performing arts and evolving them into something one of a kind.
Influence 9 Fifth Day of the Twin Rooster Pagoda, Audience: 100 Elementary Schoolers While Izumi & Wataru and Nazuna & Hiiro have been working on their appeals the past few days, Keito & Ibuki work on theirs, earning enough to make it to the final round.
We did it~! We got a pretty high score, didnвҖҷt we, Hasumi-san~вҷӘ Yeah. Seems like we gotвҖҰ 78 hearts.
Even so. Your face is too scary when youвҖҷre in the presence of little kids? If I hadn't been tickling Hasumi-san, they all definitely woulda cried and peed their pants~!
Gh, youвҖҷre incorrigibleвҖҰ..!
There it is! Hasumi-sanвҖҷs вҖңIncorrigibleвҖқ! Nyahaha, one of your great points is how fast you go through different expressions! So youвҖҷd better show it off more~? CвҖҷmere, smile, smiiile~вҷӘ
вҖҰвҖҰ Taki. Next, it's your turn to be the butt of the joke. The stage is thinning out, so letвҖҷs go!
Wawah, hold on, Hasumi-san! Do you take me for a cat or somethinвҖҷ!? If you grab the scruff of my training uniform, itвҖҷs gonna stretch out~!?
(I can't stand being teased... but Taki's unexpected behavior is a boost for our pair.) (WeвҖҷre certainly still rough around the edges, but the fact is IвҖҷm looking forward to the next performance with this guy a little too.)
(All that's left is the performance on the final day. If Taki and I put on the finest performance we can together... we might be able to get a higher score than I thought)
Hey, Hasumi-san. The songвҖҷs about to start~?
Yeah. I'll give my all with what little time we have left here.
Right! LetвҖҷs keep up the pace weвҖҷve got going~вҷӘ гҖҺвҷӘ~вҷӘ~вҷӘгҖҸ Epilogue 1 Sixth Day of the Twin Rooster Pagoda, Final Show, Audience: 600 Audience Members It's the final day, and the participants take the stage.
Hm-phh. It seems like everyoneвҖҷs having a little fun somehow~?
It's like theyвҖҷre writing us off or something! This is a serious situation~! Up until yesterday from opening day, weвҖҷve been the ones getting consistent favorable impressions from the audience. Right?
Well we've made a good impression, but we haven't been given a score that stands out above the rest either. I guess you could call it "footage that makes the final cut." That's what we're lacking. But. Whether we like it or not, this is the final stage. To make sure weвҖҷre left with no regrets, weвҖҷve got no choice but to give it our all.
Taki. I sincerely want to thank you.
Huh? MeвҖҰ?
At first, I wasnвҖҷt sure what would happen. But as our battles stacked up, it began to become clear who you are as a person. Naturally, I don't think I have the full picture of you, butвҖҰ It looks as if you're a thoughtful person who seems like a loose cannon вҖ” a ruthless monster who seems like an innocent child. ThatвҖҷs Taki Ibuki.
Hey~ That feels like slander~? My lawyersвҖҷll be hearing about this, yвҖҷknow~? Haha, lay off the joke. ThatвҖҷs what made it a truly fun time pairing up with you. Maybe this is what I wanted to get out of 4piece. How about you, Taki?
Mnn~ All I wanted was to follow YoshihideвҖҷsвҖҰ NassanвҖҷs footsteps and become an idol, but~?
A song that makes you think of Japan, nostalgicвҖ” It was unforgettable, even across the ocean. I never dreamed IвҖҷd meet the bizarre idol who belongs to the AKATSUKI that sings that song here, in this place~вҷӘ Nyahaha, IвҖҷm the one who should be thanking you! Hasumi-san~вҷӘ
вҖҰвҖҰ Yeah.
Hey, look, that kinda turned into something like a final goodbye, but the audition isn't over yet~! We gotta show our true potential...вҳҶ The battle starts here! Let's go fight and get what we want, вҖҳkay~? гҖҺвҷӘ~вҷӘ~вҷӘгҖҸ Heheh. You always burst out in song so suddenlyвҖҰвҖҰ But, this time IвҖҷll get in line with you and sing and dance. Here we goвҖҰ! гҖҺ~......вҷӘгҖҸ
гҖҺвҷӘ~вҷӘ~вҷӘгҖҸ
(Forgive me, Hasumi-san. I told a lie~?) (At first, following in YoshihideвҖҷs footsteps was the reason I went through these matches and competitions! But now, what I really want isвҖҰ)
(... Nyahaha, Life is fun, вҖҳcuz you never know whatвҖҷs going to happen~ Dontcha think~вҷӘ)
Epilogue 3 After the filming ends, Kuro and Souma meet Keito at the dome pathway to pick him up.
Hasumi-dono~! You did a wonderful jobвҖҰвҷӘ
Yo. Good work~вҷӘ
Kanzaki? Kiryu tooвҖҰ? WhatвҖҷs wrong, what made you come here?
HahвҖҰ? вҖҳCourse weвҖҷd come to pick ya up. LilвҖҷ Miss got вҖҳn contact and let us know the last round was just finishinвҖҷ up.
Yes. We saw Hasumi-donoвҖҷs great efforts on the broadcast, but we wanted to be the first to give you our thoughts~вҷӘ
There sure were a lotta great scenes, werenвҖҷt there? Made damn sure to record it too~вҷӘ I never woulda thought that Taki guy coulda possibly known any AKATSUKI songs, though. It felt pretty damn weird hearinвҖҷ someone else perform our songs.
ThereвҖҷs plenty more weвҖҷd like to talk with you about. Come, letвҖҷs hurry back home~вҷӘ
Heheh. I had something to tell the both of you too.
Lemme guess. It was when the audience was a hundred elementary school kids вҷӘ The look on yer face when that happened was just tooвҖҰвҖ”
No, itвҖҷs not that.
вҖҰвҖҰ?
вҖҰвҖҰ?
ItвҖҷs something that concerns the both of you too. ItвҖҷs about Taki Ibuki, the person I paired up with in the Twin Rooster PagodaвҖҰ
Epilogue 4 In this chapter, Seiya, Nice, Akiomi and Jin give their evaluations of the participants. Nice asks who wants to go first, and Seiya jumps in.
Well then, IвҖҷll jump in with my critiques this time.
Ohh. ItвҖҷs unusual for Seiya-san to raise his hand firstвҖҰ? Haha. If a super idol takes the lead on this, thereвҖҷll be nothing left for us to say, huh Akiyan?
Heheh. Hidaka-daisenpai4 was very enthusiastic about the evaluation of Twin Rooster Pagoda, so IвҖҷm interested in what critiques heвҖҷll give to the idols.
Of course, I havenвҖҷt forgotten about the other venues, you know. Here in the Twin Rooster Pagoda, the competition was carried out in pairs, so the interpersonal relationships that are essential to the recent unit-system were required as well. I was interested in it too. Well then, shall I begin my critiques?
First is Keito-kun. He relied on his knowledge and experience to handle everything carefully, but it seemed like everything ended with very little trouble HeвҖҷs level-headed compared to other idols his age, so I had high hopes for him, butвҖҰ His intense seriousness worked against him too, so I feel that it was a bit of a waste.
Next, Ibuki-kun. His techniqueвҖҷs unrefined, but his natural physical ability and ability to learn quickly shined through. He drags everyone into following his own pace without getting daunted by the senior idols... I never got tired of watching him take the lead so boldly.
ThatвҖҷs right. If I were to produce a unit, IвҖҷd wanna put someone like him in it.
Heheh. I feel the same. When IвҖҷd come across him in America, I thought the talent heвҖҷd shown were befitting of a solo idol, but I feel as if IвҖҷve seen a new side of him.
And this is the end of the Keito & Ibuki cut of VS AUDIENCE! Read the conclusion of Keito & Ibuki's story in Final Ceremony here. Return to the main VS AUDIENCE directory here.
Translation Notes вҶ‘ A Thousand Blossoms, the Night of Crimson Moon (Hyakkaryoran Akatsukiyo) is this song by AKATSUKI.вҶ‘ Referencing the fact AKATSUKI performed in Okinawa during the SS Preliminary Rounds in SubmarineвҶ‘ "Thank you" in Italian (lit. a thousand thanks)вҶ‘ еӨ§е…Ҳиј© (daisenpai) is an honorific used for someone who's way older or significantly more experienced than you.
